title: BRITE: A Benchmark for Reliable and Interpretable T2V Evaluation on Implausible Scenarios
summary: The rapid advancement of photorealistic Text-to-Video (T2V) generation brings in an urgent need for up-to-date evaluation methods. Existing benchmarks largely overlooked implausible scenarios and do not measure audio-visual alignment. We introduce BRITE, the first framework that unifies (1) implausible prompting, (2) fine-grained assessment of audio-visual consistency, and (3) QA-based interpretable evaluation into a comprehensive T2V benchmark. Unlike fully automated Multimodal LLM-based pipelines, which are prone to hallucination and prompt ambiguity, BRITE guarantees reliability through a rigorous human-in-the-loop protocol for benchmark creation. Evaluating five state-of-the-art models (Sora 2, Veo 3.1, Runway Gen4.5, Pixverse V5.5, and Qwen3Max), we reveal a critical performance gap: while models excel at static object composition, they exhibit significant degradation in object-action binding and audio-visual synchronization. Our framework offers the community a reliable, interpretable benchmark and evaluation framework that can detect and locate limitations in the next generation of T2V models, especially for off-manifold prompts

AI.tldr: BRITE是一个统一的T2V评估框架，包含离谱提示、细粒度音视频一致性评估和QA可解释评估，通过人类参与保证可靠性，发现现有模型在物体-动作绑定和音视频同步方面存在显著性能差距。
AI.motivation: 现有T2V基准大多忽略离谱场景且不测量音视频对齐，需要更全面、可靠的评估方法。
AI.method: BRITE框架通过(1)离谱提示生成、(2)细粒度音视频一致性评估和(3)基于QA的可解释评估三个维度，结合人类参与的严格协议构建基准。
AI.result: 评估5个SOTA模型（Sora 2、Veo 3.1、Runway Gen4.5、Pixverse V5.5、Qwen3Max），发现模型在静态物体合成上表现优异，但在物体-动作绑定和音视频同步上显著退化。
AI.conclusion: BRITE提供了一个可靠、可解释的基准框架，能够检测和定位下一代T2V模型的局限性，尤其针对离流形提示。

title: OceanPile: A Large-Scale Multimodal Ocean Corpus for Foundation Models
summary: The vast and underexplored ocean plays a critical role in regulating global climate and supporting marine biodiversity, yet artificial intelligence has so far delivered limited impact in this domain due to a fundamental data bottleneck. Specifically, ocean data are highly fragmented across disparate sources and inherently exhibit multi-modal, high-noise, and weakly labeled characteristics, lacking unified schemas and semantic alignment. Although Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable success in general domains, their application to ocean science remains severely constrained by the absence of large-scale, well-aligned multimodal datasets tailored to marine environments. To bridge this gap, we introduce OceanPile, a large-scale multimodal corpus designed for ocean foundation models. It comprises three key components: OceanCorpus, a unified collection integrating sonar data, underwater imagery, marine science visuals, and scientific text from diverse authoritative sources; OceanInstruction, a high-quality instruction dataset synthesized via a novel pipeline guided by a hierarchical Ocean Concept Knowledge Graph; and OceanBenchmark, a manually curated evaluation benchmark for rigorous assessment. We establish a multi-stage quality control process to ensure scientific validity and alignment across modalities. Experimental validation demonstrates significant performance improvements for models trained on our data. All datasets are publicly released to advance the field of marine artificial intelligence and empower domain-specific MLLMs.

AI.tldr: 针对海洋领域多模态数据碎片化、高噪声、弱标注等问题，本文构建了大规模多模态语料库OceanPile，包含统一语料集OceanCorpus、指令数据集OceanInstruction及评估基准OceanBenchmark，实验证明其能显著提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 海洋AI因数据碎片化、多模态高噪声、弱标注且缺乏统一语义对齐而发展受限，现有MLLM因缺失大规模海洋多模态数据集无法有效应用于该领域。
AI.method: 构建OceanPile：（1）OceanCorpus集成声纳、水下影像、海洋科学视觉图及科学文本等异构数据；（2）OceanInstruction基于海洋概念知识图谱的分层合成管道生成高质量指令数据；（3）OceanBenchmark人工标注评测基准；配合多阶段质量控制流程。
AI.result: 基于OceanPile训练的模型在海洋领域任务上取得显著性能提升，所有数据集已公开发布。
AI.conclusion: OceanPile有效填补了海洋多模态大规模数据集的空白，推动了海洋基础模型及领域专用MLLM的发展。

title: PRISM: Exposing and Resolving Spurious Isolation in Federated Multimodal Continual Learning
summary: While current federated multimodal continual learning over mixture-of-experts low-rank adaptation (MoE-LoRA) is built on the unverified assumption that routing isolates task-specific knowledge into disjoint experts, we argue that routing operates per-sample, while forgetting accumulates across the task sequence, and gradient conflict persists within each expert even when routing is maximally polarized. Moreover, activation-subspace protection can also fail because, under parameter-efficient fine-tuning, it entangles tasks due to a dimension-counting bound, and federated averaging (FedAvg) disrupts client-side orthogonality. To address this, we propose PRISM (Per-expert Routing-projection Interference-informed Subspace Method), which maintains a per-expert gradient subspace basis whose orthogonality is preserved under FedAvg and reinterprets MoE routing as a capacity allocator. Our results show that, on LLaVA-1.5-7B, LLaVA-1.5-13B, and Qwen2.5-VL-7B across CoIN-6 and CoIN-Long-10, PRISM outperforms sixteen the state of the art baselines in average accuracy. Compared to the best federated multimodal baseline, the performance margin increases from +3.23 pp on CoIN-6 to +6.06 pp on CoIN-Long-10.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PRISM方法，解决联邦多模态持续学习中MoE-LoRA路由假设的缺陷，通过每专家梯度子空间保持正交性，在三个模型和两个基准上超越16个SOTA方法。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦多模态持续学习基于MoE-LoRA的假设（路由将任务知识隔离到不同专家）未被验证，实际上路由是逐样本操作，遗忘沿任务序列累积，且每个专家内存在梯度冲突；同时激活子空间保护因参数高效微调中的维度计数界限而纠缠任务，FedAvg破坏客户端正交性。
AI.method: 提出PRISM，维护每专家的梯度子空间基，该基的正交性在FedAvg下得以保持，并将MoE路由重新解释为容量分配器。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-1.5-7B/13B和Qwen2.5-VL-7B上，在CoIN-6和CoIN-Long-10基准中，PRISM在平均准确率上超越16个SOTA基线；相对于最佳联邦多模态基线，性能优势从CoIN-6的+3.23个百分点扩大到CoIN-Long-10的+6.06个百分点。
AI.conclusion: PRISM有效解决了现有方法中路由假设的缺陷和子空间保护失效问题，在长序列任务上优势更为显著。

title: Multimodal Confidence Modeling in Audio-Visual Quality Assessment
comment: Accepted at ICIP 2026, 6 pages, 4 figures, no supplementary material
summary: Audio-visual quality assessment (AVQA) is essential for streaming, teleconferencing, and immersive media. In realistic streaming scenarios, distortions are often asymmetric, where one modality may be severely degraded while the other remains clean. Still, most contemporary AVQA metrics treat audio and video as equally reliable, causing confidence-unaware fusion to emphasize unreliable signals. This paper proposes MCM-AVQA, a multimodal confidence-aware AVQA framework that explicitly estimates modality-specific confidence and injects it into a dedicated audio-visual mixer for cross-modal attention. The Audio-Visual Mixer utilizes frame-level, confidence-guided channel attention to gate fusion, modulating feature interaction between modalities so that high-confidence streams dominate while unreliable inputs are suppressed, preserving temporal degradation patterns. A multi-head visual confidence estimator turns frame-level artifact probabilities into temporally smoothed, clip-level visual confidence scores, while an audio confidence module derives confidence from speech-quality cues without requiring a clean reference. Experiments on multiple AVQA benchmarks show that MCM-AVQA, and specifically its confidence-guided Audio-Visual Mixer, improve correlation with human mean opinion scores and yield more interpretable behavior under real-world asymmetric audio-visual distortions.

AI.tldr: 提出MCM-AVQA框架，通过显式估计模态置信度并注入音频-视觉混合器进行交叉模态注意力，在非对称失真场景下提升AVQA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有AVQA指标将音视频视为同等可靠，在非对称失真场景下（如一个模态严重退化）会导致置信度无感知的融合加强不可靠信号，影响评估准确性。
AI.method: 提出MCM-AVQA框架：1）多模态置信度感知机制，显式估计各模态置信度；2）音频-视觉混合器，利用帧级置信度引导通道注意力进行融合门控，高置信度主导、低置信度抑制；3）多头部视觉置信度估计器将帧级伪影概率转为平滑的片段级分数；4）音频置信度模块从语音质量线索推导，无需干净参考。
AI.result: 在多个AVQA基准上，MCM-AVQA（特别是置信度引导的音频-视觉混合器）提升了与人类平均意见得分的相关性，并在真实非对称音视频失真下展现出更可解释的行为。
AI.conclusion: 引入模态置信度感知机制能有效提升非对称失真场景下的音视频质量评估性能，使模型更符合人类感知判断。

title: Understanding the Performance Plateau in Text-to-Video Retrieval: A Comprehensive Empirical and Linguistic Analysis
summary: Text-to-video retrieval enables users to find relevant video content using natural language queries, a task that has grown increasingly important with the rapid expansion of online video. Over the past six years, research has produced numerous methods, such as dual encoders, attention-driven models, and multimodal fusion approaches; however, fundamental questions remain about model behavior, dataset influence, and query difficulty. In this work, we evaluate 14 state-of-the-art retrieval methods across 3 widely used datasets under a unified preprocessing and evaluation framework. We analyze caption characteristics, including length, clarity, semantic category, and Action vs. Scene balance, and link these to model performance. Our results show that short, clear, and simple captions, such as those describing single actions or color attributes, achieve higher recall, while complex events, multi-step activities, or fine-grained scene descriptions remain challenging for all existing models. Attention-driven architectures better handle temporally dependent or multi-step queries, whereas dual-encoder and multimodal fusion models perform well primarily on simpler or single-category captions. Cross-dataset generalization improves with larger, more diverse caption sets, but generative captions do not consistently enhance retrieval accuracy. Overall, our findings highlight key dataset factors, benchmark challenges, and the interplay between query content and model architecture, providing guidance for developing more effective text-to-video retrieval systems.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了14种最先进的文本-视频检索方法在3个数据集上的表现，发现简短清晰的描述召回率高，复杂事件对所有模型仍是挑战；注意力驱动架构擅长处理多步查询，而双编码器与多模态融合模型在简单描述上表现良好；跨数据集泛化能力随数据多样性和规模提升，但生成式描述并不一致提升检索准确率。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有大量文本-视频检索方法，但关于模型行为、数据集影响和查询难度的基础问题仍不明朗，缺乏系统性的统一比较和理解。
AI.method: 在统一预处理和评估框架下，评估14种SOTA检索方法在3个数据集上的表现；分析描述文本的长度、清晰度、语义类别、动作与场景平衡等特征，并将其与模型性能关联。
AI.result: 1) 简短、清晰、简单的描述召回率更高，复杂事件/多步活动/细粒度场景对所有模型仍是挑战；2) 注意力驱动架构擅长时间依赖或多步查询，双编码器与多模态融合模型在简单描述上表现更好；3) 跨数据集泛化随数据规模和多样性提升，但生成式描述不一贯提升检索准确率。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了数据集因素、基准挑战以及查询内容与模型架构之间的交互关系，为开发更有效的文本-视频检索系统提供了指导。

title: H-Probes: Extracting Hierarchical Structures From Latent Representations of Language Models
summary: Representing and navigating hierarchy is a fundamental primitive of reasoning. Large language models have demonstrated proficiency in a wide variety of tasks requiring hierarchical reasoning, but there exists limited analysis on how the models geometrically represent the necessary latent constructions for such thinking. To this end, we develop \textit{H-probes}, a collection of linear probes that extract hierarchical structure, specifically depth and pairwise distance, from latent representations. In synthetic tree traversal tasks, the H-probes robustly find the subspaces containing hierarchical structure necessary to complete the tasks; furthermore, in comprehensive ablation experiments, we show that these hierarchy-containing subspaces are low-dimensional, causally important for high task performance, and generalize within- and out-of-domain. Furthermore, we find analogous, though weaker, hierarchical structure in real-world hierarchical contexts such as mathematical reasoning traces. These results demonstrate that models represent hierarchy not only at the level of syntax and concepts, but at deeper levels of abstraction -- including the reasoning process itself.

AI.tldr: 本文通过开发名为H-probes的线性探针，从大语言模型的隐层表示中提取层级结构信息（深度和成对距离），发现模型在合成树遍历任务中编码了低维、因果重要的层级子空间，并在数学推理等真实场景中也观察到类似的层级结构。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在各类层级推理任务中表现出色，但我们对模型如何在几何空间中对层级结构进行潜在建构缺乏深入分析。现有研究多关注模型能否完成层级推理，而较少探究其内部表征的几何组织形式。
AI.method: 提出H-probes——一组线性探针，用于从隐层表征中提取层级结构的深度和成对距离信息。在合成树遍历任务上进行训练和检测，并通过全面的消融实验验证层级子空间的低维性、因果重要性及泛化能力。
AI.result: H-probes能稳健定位包含层级结构的子空间；这些子空间是低维的、对任务性能具有因果重要性，且能在域内和域外泛化。在数学推理等真实层级任务中也发现了类似（虽较弱）的层级结构。
AI.conclusion: 模型不仅在语法和概念层面表示层级，还在更深层次的抽象层面（包括推理过程本身）编码了层级结构。

title: Agentopic: A Generative AI Agent Workflow for Explainable Topic Modeling
summary: Agentopic is a novel agent-based workflow for explainable topic modeling that leverages the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). Existing topic modeling approaches such as Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) and BERTopic often lack transparency on how topics are assigned or grouped. Agentopic addresses this by using multiple agents that collaboratively perform topic identification, validation, hierarchical grouping, and natural language explanation. This design enables users to trace the reasoning behind topic assignments, enhancing interpretability without sacrificing accuracy. When seeded with topics from the British Broadcasting Corporation (BBC) dataset, Agentopic achieves an F1-score of 0.95, matching GPT-4.1, improving on LDA (0.93), and close to BERTopic (0.98). We used Agentopic to augment the BBC dataset with generated explanations to improve the dataset's richness and context. The unseeded Agentopic generated 2045 semantically coherent topics organized across six hierarchical levels, vastly enriching the original five-category structure. By embedding explainability throughout the workflow, Agentopic offers an interpretable alternative to black-box models, making it particularly valuable for crucial applications like finance and healthcare.

AI.tldr: Agentopic是一种基于多智能体协作的可解释主题建模方法，利用LLM的推理能力实现主题识别、验证、层次分组和自然语言解释，在BBC数据集上达到0.95的F1分数，并生成2045个语义连贯的主题。
AI.motivation: 现有主题建模方法（如LDA、BERTopic）在主题分配或分组的透明度上不足，难以解释推理过程。
AI.method: 采用多智能体协作流程，包括主题识别、验证、层次分组和自然语言解释，利用LLM的推理能力实现可解释性。
AI.result: 在BBC数据集上达到0.95的F1分数，与GPT-4.1持平；无种子引导下生成2045个语义连贯主题，覆盖6个层次。
AI.conclusion: Agentopic提供了可替代黑盒模型的可解释方案，在金融、医疗等关键领域具有重要价值。

title: Benchmarking local Hebbian learning rules for memory storage and prototype extraction
summary: Associative memory or content-addressable memory is an important component function in computer science and information processing, and at the same time a key concept in cognitive and computational brain science. Many different neural network architectures and learning rules have been proposed to model the brain's associative memory while investigating key component functions like figure-ground segmentation, perceptual reconstruction and rivalry. A less investigated but equally important capability of associative memory is prototype extraction where the training set comprises distorted prototype instances and the task is to recall the correct generating prototype given a new distorted instance. In this paper we benchmark associative memory function of seven different Hebbian learning rules employed in non-modular and modular recurrent networks with winner-take-all dynamics operating on moderately sparse binary patterns. We measure pattern storage and weight information capacity, prototype extraction capabilities, and sensitivity to correlations in data. The original additive Hebb rule comes out with worst capacity, covariance learning proves to be robust but with moderate capacity, and the Bayesian-Hebbian learning rules show highest capacity in almost all different conditions tested.

AI.tldr: 本文基准测试了七种赫布学习规则在循环神经网络中的联想记忆能力，包括模式存储、原型提取和相关性敏感性。贝叶斯-赫布规则在大多数条件下表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 尽管联想记忆（尤其是原型提取）是认知科学和计算神经科学的核心功能，但现有研究多聚焦于图-地分割、知觉重建等，而原型提取能力尚未被系统比较。
AI.method: 在非模块化和模块化循环网络中使用赢者全拿动力学，对七种赫布学习规则（原始加法、协方差、贝叶斯-赫布等）在中等稀疏二值模式上进行基准测试，测量存储容量、权重信息容量、原型提取能力及数据相关性敏感性。
AI.result: 原始加法赫布规则容量最差；协方差学习稳健但容量中等；贝叶斯-赫布学习规则在几乎所有测试条件下表现最高容量。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯-赫布规则在处理含畸变模式的原型提取任务中具有最优的联想记忆性能，为神经网络的记忆机制设计提供了重要参考。

title: Implicit Evaluation Under Minimal Information: Price Formation in Hierarchical Component Selection
summary:
We study hierarchical component selection under severe information constraints. Component quality is not directly observable, each selector observes only the outcome of the chosen pathway, and no explicit evaluation channel crosses module boundaries. We analyse a proportional-redistribution mechanism in which each selector maintains a weight vector over its children and updates that vector from observed outcomes. The sign of a parent's weight change can be read locally as an implicit binary evaluation signal by the selected child, yielding a decentralised evaluation mechanism with no explicit reporting channel.
  We give a full formal treatment. Proportional redistribution preserves market integrity algebraically. The sign of the weight change propagates without loss through the active path. The single-selector dynamics admit a unique interior equilibrium; for $N{=}2$ the equilibrium is exact and closed-form, while for general $N$ an equi-ratio condition yields an explicit affine equilibrium. Hierarchical composition is informationally clean, with each node's active-round dynamics identical to a standalone instance observed on a thinned clock.
  All structural results, the equilibrium formula, and the composition theorem are fully proved. Illustrative cases on synthetic hierarchies with up to 32,768 leaves and on three natural-hierarchy datasets confirm the mechanism's operation under constructed and applied conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文研究信息严重受限条件下的层级组件选择问题，提出一种比例再分配机制，每个选择器维护一个子节点权重向量并根据观测结果更新，通过权重变化的符号作为隐式二元评价信号，实现去中心化的评价机制。理论证明了该机制的代数完整性、信号传播无损失、单选择器动力学的唯一内部均衡以及层级组合的信息清洁性。在合成层次（多达32768个叶子）和三个自然层次数据集上验证了机制的有效性。
AI.motivation: 在层级系统中，组件质量不可直接观测，选择器只能观测到所选路径的结果，且模块间不存在显式的评估通道。因此需要一种在严苛信息约束下仍能进行层级组件选择的去中心化机制。
AI.method: 提出比例再分配机制：每个选择器维护对子节点的权重向量，根据观测结果进行更新。被选子节点通过父节点权重变化的符号获取隐式二元评价信号，无需显式报告通道。给出了完整的代数分析、均衡理论证明及层级组合定理。
AI.result: 比例再分配保持市场代数的完整性；权重变化符号沿活动路径无损传播；单选择器动力学存在唯一内部均衡（N=2时有精确闭式解，一般N下等比率条件给出显式仿射均衡）；层级组合具有信息清洁性，每个节点的活跃轮动力学等价于在稀疏时钟上运行的独立实例。
AI.conclusion: 所有结构结果、均衡公式和组合定理均获得完整证明。在包含32768个叶子的合成层次和三个自然层次数据集上的实验验证了该机制的有效性。

title: To Vibe Research or Not to Vibe Research? Generative AI in Qualitative Research
comment: 13 pages, 2 figures. Accepted to VibeX 2026: 1st International Workshop on Vibe Coding and Vibe Researching
summary: There has been intense debate among qualitative researchers about whether generative AI is suitable for qualitative research. In this paper, we summarize the broader ongoing discussion of generative AI in qualitative research and its implications for software engineering researchers. The qualitative research approach, small-q (positivist or post-positivist) or Big Q (non-positivist), is among the major criteria for determining whether generative AI can be used in qualitative research. In addition to research philosophy and research approach, skills, ethics, and personal preferences also play a role in researchers' decisions about whether to use AI in qualitative research.

AI.tldr: 本文总结了生成式AI在定性研究中适用性的争论，指出研究哲学（小q/大Q）是决定是否使用AI的关键标准，同时技能、伦理和个人偏好也影响研究者的选择。
AI.motivation: 定性研究者之间对生成式AI是否适用于定性研究存在激烈争论，本文旨在梳理这一讨论并阐明其对软件工程研究者的启示。
AI.method: 通过文献综述和讨论总结的方式，梳理生成式AI在定性研究中的适用性争论，并分析影响研究者决策的关键因素（研究哲学、研究取向、技能、伦理、个人偏好）。
AI.result: 识别出研究哲学（小q/大Q）是决定生成式AI能否用于定性研究的主要标准，同时技能、伦理和个人偏好也起重要作用。
AI.conclusion: 生成式AI在定性研究中的适用性取决于研究者的哲学立场（小q vs 大Q），并结合技能、伦理和个人偏好综合决策。

title: Synthetic Designed Experiments for Diagnosing Vision Model Failure
summary: Current synthetic data pipelines for computer vision generate images without diagnosing what the downstream model actually needs. This open-loop paradigm treats synthetic data as cheap real data, randomly sampling the generator's output space and hoping to cover the model's failure modes. We argue this fundamentally misuses synthetic data's unique property: the controllable, independent variation of scene factors.Drawing on the statistical theory of Design of Experiments (DoE), we propose Synthetic Designed Experiments for Representational Sufficiency (SDRS). SDRS treats the downstream model as a black-box system and the synthetic generator as an experimental apparatus. Using fractional factorial designs, SDRS efficiently audits a model's factor-sensitivity profile via ANOVA decomposition. It classifies failures into two actionable types: Type I gaps (coverage failures on underrepresented factor levels) and Type II gaps (reliance on spurious nuisance dependencies). The audit then prescribes targeted synthetic data to address each gap type. We validate SDRS on three experiments: (1) a controlled diagnostic on dSprites with planted biases, where the audit correctly identifies both gap types and targeted data improves accuracy from 49.9% to 79.0%; (2) a dense segmentation task on procedural scenes, where detecting background-complexity shortcuts and applying targeted data improves mIoU from 0.948 to 0.998; and (3) an entanglement detection experiment showing that the ANOVA audit identifies cross-factor contamination in imperfect generators. Finally, we show that per-factor invariance penalties can transfer sensitivity between factors, identifying an open problem for representation-level correction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SDRS方法，将实验设计（DoE）统计理论应用于合成数据生成，通过因子敏感性审计识别模型的两类失败（覆盖不足和虚假关联），并针对性地生成数据，实验验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有合成数据流水线是开环的，随机采样生成器输出空间，未能诊断下游模型的真实需求，浪费了合成数据可独立控制场景因子这一独特性质。
AI.method: SDRS将下游模型视为黑箱系统，合成生成器视为实验装置，利用分数阶乘设计进行ANOVA分解，审计模型的因子敏感性，将失败分为Type I（覆盖不足）和Type II（虚假关联），并针对性生成数据。
AI.result: (1) dSprites上准确率从49.9%提升至79.0%；(2) 密集分割任务mIoU从0.948提升至0.998；(3) 成功检测到生成器中的交叉因子污染。
AI.conclusion: 因子不变性惩罚可在因子间传递敏感性，揭示了一个表征级修正的开放问题。

title: 2026 Roadmap on Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning for Smart Manufacturing
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication in the Journal Machine Learning: Engineering
summary: The evolution of artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning (ML) is reshaping smart manufacturing by providing new capabilities for efficiency, adaptability, and autonomy across industrial value chains. However, the deployment of AI and ML in industrial settings still faces critical challenges, including the complexity of industrial big data, effective data management, integration with heterogeneous sensing and control systems, and the demand for trustworthy, explainable, and reliable operation in high-stakes industrial environments. In this roadmap, we present a comprehensive perspective on the foundations, applications, and emerging directions of AI and ML in smart manufacturing. It is structured in three parts. The first highlights the foundations and trends that frame the evolution of AI in smart manufacturing. The second focuses on key topics where AI is already enabling advances, including industrial big data analytics, advanced sensing and perception, autonomous systems, additive and laser-based manufacturing, digital twins, robotics, supply chain and logistics optimization, and sustainable manufacturing. The third section explores non-traditional ML approaches that are opening new frontiers, such as physics-informed AI, generative AI, semantic AI, advanced digital twins, explainable AI, RAMS, data-centric metrology, LLMs, and foundation models for highly connected and complex manufacturing systems. By identifying both opportunities and remaining barriers across these areas, this roadmap outlines the advances needed in methods, integration strategies, and industrial adoption. We hope this roadmap will serve as a guide for researchers, engineers, and practitioners to accelerate innovation, align academic and industrial priorities, and ensure that AI-driven smart manufacturing delivers reliable, sustainable, and scalable impact for the future of manufacturing ecosystems.

AI.tldr: 本文系统梳理了AI与ML在智能制造中的基础、应用与新兴方向，涵盖工业大数据、数字孪生、机器人、生成式AI、物理信息AI等关键主题，并指出了方法创新、集成策略与产业落地等方面的挑战与机遇。
AI.motivation: 智能制造中AI/ML部署面临工业大数据复杂性、数据管理、异构系统集成以及高可靠性需求等关键挑战，亟需一份系统性路线图来指导研究与实践。
AI.method: 文章采用路线图（roadmap）结构，分为三部分：第一部分阐述AI在智能制造中的基础与趋势；第二部分聚焦工业大数据分析、先进感知、自主系统、增材制造、数字孪生、机器人、供应链优化与可持续制造等关键应用；第三部分探讨物理信息AI、生成式AI、语义AI、可解释AI、大语言模型与基础模型等非传统ML新前沿。
AI.result: 识别了各领域的机遇与现有障碍，概述了在方法、集成策略和工业采纳方面所需的进展。
AI.conclusion: 该路线图旨在为研究人员、工程师和实践者提供指导，加速创新，协调学术与产业优先事项，确保AI驱动的智能制造为制造生态系统带来可靠、可持续且可扩展的影响。

title: Contextual Wireless Video Semantic Communication in MIMO-OFDM Systems
comment: This paper has been accepted by the IEEE Wireless Communications Letters
summary: This paper proposes a MIMO-OFDM-based context video semantic transmission framework, namely M-CVST, for robust video communication over multi-path multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) channels. It introduces a context-subcarrier correlation map that aligns video feature context with groups of MIMO subcarriers. To leverage the time-correlated nature of multi-path channels, a recursive subcarrier sampling method paired with time-correlated reference embedding is designed, enabling the use of previously sampled MIMO subcarrier CSI to enhance channel state awareness in the entropy coding model. Numerical results verify the superiority of proposed M-CVST over MIMO multi-path channels compared to other semantic schemes and traditional separated schemes.

AI.tldr: 提出基于MIMO-OFDM的上下文视频语义传输框架M-CVST，通过上下文-子载波相关图对齐特征与子载波，结合递归子载波采样和时间相关参考嵌入，利用多径信道时间相关性提升熵编码模型信道感知能力，在多径MIMO信道上优于其他语义方案和传统分离方案。
AI.motivation: 在多径MIMO信道环境下，现有视频语义通信方案未充分考虑MIMO-OFDM系统的子载波结构与信道时间相关性，导致信道状态感知不足，影响鲁棒视频传输性能。
AI.method: 1）提出M-CVST框架，将视频语义特征与MIMO子载波分组对齐；2）设计上下文-子载波相关图（context-subcarrier correlation map）；3）提出递归子载波采样方法，结合时间相关参考嵌入，利用历史MIMO子载波CSI信息增强熵编码模型的信道状态感知。
AI.result: 数值结果表明，所提M-CVST在多径MIMO信道下性能优于其他语义方案和传统分离方案。
AI.conclusion: M-CVST通过充分利用MIMO-OFDM多径信道的时间相关性，有效提升了视频语义通信在复杂信道环境下的鲁棒性。

title: SCARV: Structure-Constrained Aggregation for Stable Sample Ranking in Redundant NLP Datasets
summary: Sample-level rankings are increasingly used in data-centric NLP for analysis, filtering, debugging, and curation, yet existing pipelines typically score training examples pointwise and rank them as if they were independent. This assumption is fragile in the presence of exact duplicates, near-duplicates, paraphrases, and other redundant structure common in NLP corpora, where stochastic training can make highly similar examples receive unstable relative orderings across random seeds. We study stable sample-level ranking under redundancy and propose \textsc{SCARV}, a modular aggregation framework that operates on top of an existing scoring proxy. \textsc{SCARV} combines robust multi-seed aggregation with a structure-aware aggregation/allocation step over redundancy clusters. Across synthetic redundancy, naturally mined QQP redundancy, multiple proxy families, several NLP tasks, and end-to-end DistilBERT fine-tuning, \textsc{SCARV} substantially improves over bare proxy rankings in global and local stability and yields more reproducible ranking-based decisions such as subset selection and suspicious-example retrieval. Our decomposition and compute-aware frontier sharpen the mechanism: robust multi-seed aggregation is the dominant generic stabilizer, while the structure-aware component adds value mainly under low aggregation budgets or when redundancy clusters are informative, naturally occurring, or sufficiently covered. These results position \textsc{SCARV} not as a universal data selector or a universally dominant replacement for seed-only aggregation, but as a stability-oriented aggregation layer for proxy-induced rankings in redundant NLP datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出SCARV框架，通过多种子鲁棒聚合和结构感知聚合/分配步骤，提升冗余NLP语料中样本级排序的稳定性，优于现有的点式评分排序方法。
AI.motivation: 现有样本级排序管道假设样本独立，忽略了NLP语料中存在的重复、近重复、释义等冗余结构，导致随机训练下相似样本的排序不稳定。
AI.method: SCARV框架包含两个核心模块：1）鲁棒的多种子聚合（multi-seed aggregation）；2）冗余簇上的结构感知聚合/分配（structure-aware aggregation/allocation）。运行在现有评分代理之上。
AI.result: 在合成冗余、QQP自然冗余、多种代理族、多个NLP任务和端到端DistilBERT微调中，SCARV在全局和局部稳定性上显著优于裸代理排序，并提升子集选择和异常样本检索等排序决策的可复现性。
AI.conclusion: SCARV不是通用数据选择器，而是面向稳定性的排序聚合层。鲁棒多种子聚合是主导稳定器，结构感知组件在低聚合预算或冗余簇有信息量时更有价值。

title: DIAGRAMS: A Review Framework for Reasoning-Level Attribution in Diagram QA
summary: Diagram question answering (Diagram QA) requires reasoning-level attribution that links each question-answer pair to all visual regions needed to derive the answer, rather than only the region containing the final response. Creating such structured evidence across diagrams, charts, maps, circuits, and infographics is time-consuming, and existing annotation tools tightly couple their interfaces to dataset-specific formats. We present DIAGRAMS, a lightweight, schema-driven review framework that decouples interface logic from dataset-specific JSON structures through an internal meta-schema and dataset adapters. Given an image and QA pair with optional candidate regions, the system performs QA-conditioned evidence selection and proposes the regions required for reasoning. When QA pairs or candidate regions are missing, it generates them and supports human verification and refinement. Across six Diagram QA datasets, model-suggested evidence achieves 85.39% precision and 75.30% recall against reviewer-final selections (micro-averaged). These results indicate that the review-first framework reduces manual region creation while maintaining high agreement with final reasoning-level attributions. We release a public demo and installable package to support dataset auditing, grounded supervision creation, and grounded evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DIAGRAMS，一个轻量级、模式驱动的审核框架，用于图表问答中的推理级归因标注。它将界面逻辑与数据集特定格式解耦，通过模型建议证据达到85.39%的精确率和75.30%的召回率，显著减少人工标注工作。
AI.motivation: 图表问答需要定位支撑推理的所有视觉区域（而非仅包含最终答案的区域），但现有标注工具与数据集特定格式强耦合，且手动创建此类结构化证据耗时费力。
AI.method: 提出DIAGRAMS框架，通过内部元模式（meta-schema）和数据集适配器（dataset adapters）将界面逻辑与JSON结构解耦。系统根据图像和QA对进行条件化证据选择，自动推荐推理所需的视觉区域；缺失QA对或候选区域时可自动生成并支持人工验证与精炼。
AI.result: 在六个Diagram QA数据集上，模型建议的证据与审校者最终选择相比，微平均精确率85.39%，召回率75.30%。
AI.conclusion: 审核优先（review-first）框架可显著减少人工区域创建的工作量，同时保持与最终推理级归因的高度一致性。框架已发布为公开demo和可安装包，支持数据集审计、有监督标注创建和评估。

title: Polynomial-Time Optimal Group Selection via the Double-Commutator Eigenvalue Problem
summary: The algebraic diversity framework replaces temporal averaging over multiple observations with algebraic group action on a single observation for second-order statistical estimation. The central open problem in this framework is $\textit{group selection}$: given an $M$-dimensional observation with unknown covariance structure, find the finite group whose spectral decomposition best matches the covariance. Naive enumeration of all subgroups of the symmetric group $S_M$ requires exponential time in $M$. We prove that this combinatorial problem reduces to a generalized eigenvalue problem derived from the double commutator of the covariance matrix, yielding a polynomial-time algorithm with complexity $O(d^2M^2 + d^3)$, where $d$ is the dimension of a generator basis. The minimum eigenvector of the double-commutator matrix directly constructs the optimal group generator in closed form, with no iterative optimization. The reduction is exact: the double-commutator minimum eigenvalue is zero if and only if the optimal generator lies in the span of the basis, and its magnitude provides a certifiable optimality gap when it does not. This problem does not appear in the standard catalogs of computational complexity (Garey and Johnson, 1979) and represents a new class linking group theory, matrix analysis, and statistical estimation. We establish connections to independent component analysis (JADE), structured matrix nearness problems, and simultaneous matrix diagonalization, and we show that the double-commutator formulation is the unique approach that is simultaneously polynomial-time, closed-form, and certifiable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了代數多樣性框架下的群選擇問題，並證明該組合問題可簡化為雙交換子廣義特徵值問題，從而得到一個多項式時間的封閉形式解，同時提供可認證的最優性間隙。
AI.motivation: 代數多樣性框架中的核心開放問題是群選擇：給定一個M維觀測量及其未知協方差結構，需要找到有限群使得其譜分解最匹配該協方差。然而，直接枚舉S_M的所有子群需要指數級時間，這在計算上不可行。
AI.method: 證明該組合問題可簡化為由協方差矩陣的雙交換子導出的廣義特徵值問題。該演算法複雜度為O(d^2M^2 + d^3)，其中d為生成子基的維度。雙交換子矩陣的最小特徵向量可直接構造最優群生成子的封閉形式解。
AI.result: 雙交換子最小特徵值為零若且唯若最優生成子位於基的張成空間中；否則其大小提供了可認證的最優性間隙。該問題在Garey和Johnson的標準計算複雜度目錄中未出現，代表了一個新的問題類別。
AI.conclusion: 該雙交換子公式是唯一同時具備多項式時間、封閉形式解與可認證最優性間隙的方法。該工作建立了與獨立成分分析（JADE）、結構化矩陣逼近問題以及同時矩陣對角化的聯繫。

title: ShiftLIF: Efficient Multi-Level Spiking Neurons with Power-of-Two Quantization
summary: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) are promising for edge sensing due to their event-driven computation and temporal filtering capability. However, standard leaky integrate-and-fire (LIF) neurons communicate only through binary spikes, which severely limit representational capacity. Existing multi-level spiking neurons improve information transmission, but often rely on uniform quantization that mismatches membrane-potential distributions or introduces costly synaptic multiplications. In this paper, we propose ShiftLIF, a multi-level spiking neuron that maps membrane potentials to a logarithmically spaced power-of-two spike set. This design provides finer representation in the small-amplitude regime, where membrane potentials are densely concentrated, while enabling multiplier-free synaptic computation through bit-shift and accumulation operations. As a result, ShiftLIF improves spike-level expressiveness without sacrificing the hardware-friendly nature of standard SNN computation. We evaluate ShiftLIF on 10 datasets spanning wireless, acoustic, motion, and visual sensing tasks. Results show that ShiftLIF consistently matches or exceeds the accuracy of existing multi-level spiking neurons while maintaining synaptic energy consumption close to standard binary LIF. These results indicate that ShiftLIF provides a favorable accuracy-efficiency trade-off for cross-modal edge sensing.

AI.tldr: ShiftLIF是一种新型多级脉冲神经元，通过对数间隔的2的幂次脉冲集实现膜电位映射，在不牺牲硬件友好性的前提下提升脉冲神经网络的表达能力，在10个跨模态数据集上实现了与现有方法相当或更优的精度，同时保持接近标准二元LIF的突触能耗。
AI.motivation: 标准LIF神经元仅通过二元脉冲通信，严重限制了表征能力；现有多级脉冲神经元依赖均匀量化，与膜电位分布不匹配或引入昂贵的突触乘法运算。
AI.method: 提出ShiftLIF多级脉冲神经元，将对数间隔的2的幂次脉冲集映射到膜电位，利用位移和累加操作替代乘法，在小幅度区域提供更精细的表示。
AI.result: 在10个跨模态数据集（无线、声学、运动、视觉）上，ShiftLIF精度匹配或超越现有多级脉冲神经元，突触能耗接近标准二元LIF。
AI.conclusion: ShiftLIF为跨模态边缘感知提供了有利的精度-效率权衡。

title: Induced Representations in Cooperative Games with Homogeneous Groups of Players
summary: Oftentimes, the Shapley value becomes infeasible for games with many players. However, establishing symmetry allows for polynomial-time computation. To examine this reduction, we identify the spectrum of homogeneous group games by using an induced representation from a Young subgroup. We then prove that such games are supported solely by irreducible representations, via the Littlewood-Richardson rule, where the depth of interactions is strictly bounded by the size of the minority group. Therefore, the algebraic structure of the game filters out the complexities of the general kernel $W$. We then show that this filtration constrains any symmetric linear value to a specific subspace. This recovers the Shapley value uniquely for $m=2$ under standard axioms. Finally, we explore applications to the UN Security Council and complementary goods markets to illustrate the practical power of this approach.

AI.tldr: 本文通过表示论和Littlewood-Richardson规则，证明在对称性条件下（同质群体博弈），Shapley值可多项式时间计算，并展示其在联合国安理会和互补品市场中的应用。
AI.motivation: 传统Shapley值在多玩家博弈中计算不可行，作者希望利用对称性降低计算复杂度，并揭示其代数结构。
AI.method: 利用Young子群的诱导表示刻画同质群体博弈的谱，通过Littlewood-Richardson规则证明博弈仅由不可约表示支撑，且交互深度受少数群体规模严格约束。
AI.result: 代数结构过滤了核W的复杂性，将任意对称线性值约束到特定子空间；在m=2且标准公理下唯一恢复Shapley值。
AI.conclusion: 对称性可大幅降低Shapley值计算复杂度，并在联合国安理会投票权分配和互补品市场定价中展现实用价值。

title: Code World Model Preparedness Report
summary: This report documents the preparedness assessment of Code World Model (CWM), a model for code generation and reasoning about code from Meta. We conducted pre-release testing across domains identified in our Frontier AI Framework as potentially presenting catastrophic risks, and also evaluated the model's misaligned propensities. Our assessment found that CWM does not pose additional frontier risks beyond those present in the current AI ecosystem. We therefore release it as an open-weight model.

AI.tldr: Meta对代码世界模型（CWM）进行了预备性评估，测试其在代码生成与推理方面的能力，确认该模型不构成超出当前AI生态系统的额外前沿风险，因此以开放权重形式发布。
AI.motivation: 对CWM模型进行预备性安全评估，识别其在代码生成与推理中可能存在的灾难性风险，确保开放发布前不会造成重大安全隐患。
AI.method: 基于前沿AI框架，在可能构成灾难性风险的领域进行预发布测试，同时评估模型的错误倾向性。
AI.result: CWM不构成超出当前AI生态系统的额外前沿风险。
AI.conclusion: CWM可安全地作为开放权重模型发布。

title: Latent Space Probing for Adult Content Detection in Video Generative Models
comment: To be published in 2026 56th Annual IEEE International Conference on Dependable Systems and Networks Workshops (DSN-W)
summary: The rapid proliferation of AI-powered video generation systems has introduced significant challenges in content moderation, particularly with respect to adult and sexually explicit material. Existing detection methods operate on either prompts or decoded pixel-space outputs. Therefore, both approaches are blind to the rich internal representations formed during generation. In this paper, we propose a novel latent space probing framework that intercepts the denoised latent representations produced by the CogVideoX video diffusion model during inference and attaches lightweight classifiers to perform real-time adult content detection. To support this work, we construct a large-scale binary dataset of 11039 ten-second video clips (5086 violating, 5953 non-violating) sourced from adult websites and YouTube respectively. We introduce two lightweight probing classifier architectures. We train and evaluate it on the dataset. Our work demonstrates that latent-space signals encode strong discriminative features for harmful content detection, achieving 97.29% F1 on our held-out test set with an overhead in the 4-6ms range. Our results suggest that probing the latent space results in improvements in both detection performance as well as cost.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新颖的潜在空间探测框架，在CogVideoX视频扩散模型推理过程中拦截去噪潜在表示，附加轻量级分类器进行实时成人内容检测。构建了包含11039个10秒视频片段的大规模二分类数据集，提出的两种轻量级探测分类器在测试集上达到97.29% F1值，额外开销仅4-6ms，在检测性能和成本上均优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有AI生成视频的成人内容检测方法要么基于提示词（prompt），要么基于解码后的像素空间输出，两者都忽视了生成过程中形成的丰富内部表征（潜在空间表征），因此存在检测盲区。
AI.method: 1) 在CogVideoX视频扩散模型推理阶段拦截去噪潜在表示；2) 在潜在表示上附加两种轻量级探测分类器架构；3) 构建包含11039个10秒视频片段（5086个违规，5953个非违规）的大规模二分类数据集。
AI.result: 在保留测试集上达到97.29%的F1值，额外推理开销仅为4-6ms，在检测性能和计算成本上均实现了改进。
AI.conclusion: 潜在空间信号编码了用于有害内容检测的强判别特征，相比基于提示词或像素空间的方法，探测潜在空间在检测性能和成本两方面都更具优势。

title: AI Agents for Sustainable SMEs: A Green ESG Assessment Framework
summary: This study presents a novel, AI-driven framework for assessing Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) performance in European small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs). An initial phase established expert-validated ESG baseline scores from a subset of the Flash Eurobarometer FL549 survey data. In the second phase, a scalable AI agent system, built on the n8n automation platform, applied these baselines to perform automated ESG classification and generate contextual recommendations using large language models (LLMs). The results demonstrate the AI system's high consistency with human-derived outputs, thereby supporting more effective monitoring and intervention strategies aligned with the European Green Deal.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种基于AI的框架，用于评估欧洲中小企业的ESG表现。通过专家验证的ESG基线分数和n8n自动化平台上的AI代理系统，实现了自动化的ESG分类和上下文建议生成。结果表明，AI系统与人工输出的高度一致性，支持了更有效的监测和干预策略。
AI.motivation: 现有ESG评估方法对欧洲中小企业而言成本高、复杂度大，缺乏可扩展的自动化评估工具，难以有效支持《欧洲绿色协议》的监测与干预需求。
AI.method: 第一阶段：从Flash Eurobarometer FL549调查数据中提取子集，建立专家验证的ESG基线分数；第二阶段：基于n8n自动化平台构建可扩展的AI代理系统，利用大语言模型（LLMs）依据基线进行自动化ESG分类并生成情境化建议。
AI.result: AI系统产生的评估结果与人工输出具有高度一致性，验证了该自动化方法的可靠性和有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该AI驱动的ESG评估框架能够高效、一致地替代传统人工评估，为欧洲中小企业的ESG监测和干预提供了可扩展的解决方案，符合《欧洲绿色协议》的目标。

title: RenCon 2025: Revival of the Expressive Performance Rendering Competition
summary: This paper presents a comprehensive documentation of RenCon 2025, the revival of the expressive performance rendering competition which took place at ISMIR 2025 in Daejeon, Korea. The competition attracted 9 entries from international research groups, representing diverse approaches to expressive piano performance rendering. The two-phase assessment structure comprised a preliminary online evaluation and live real-time rendering at the conference. We analyze the competition format, participant demographics, system performance, and lessons learned for future iterations. The results demonstrate significant advances in expressive rendering capabilities while highlighting remaining challenges in achieving human-level musical expression.

AI.tldr: 本文记录了RenCon 2025（ISMIR 2025上举办的表达性演奏渲染竞赛）的全面情况，共有9支国际团队参赛，采用两阶段评估（线上初评+现场实时渲染），展示了表达性演奏渲染技术的显著进步，但仍面临达到人类水平音乐表达的挑战。
AI.motivation: 复苏并记录RenCon表达性演奏渲染竞赛，为不同方法提供标准化比较平台，推动音乐表现力渲染技术的发展，并分析当前进展与不足。
AI.method: 采用两阶段评估结构：1）初步在线评估；2）会议现场实时渲染。吸引9支国际团队参赛，通过竞赛形式系统比较不同方法。
AI.result: 9支国际研究团队参赛，系统分析了竞赛形式、参与者人口统计、系统性能等，展示了表达性渲染能力的显著进步。
AI.conclusion: 表达性演奏渲染技术取得显著进展，但实现人类水平的音乐表达仍是挑战，为未来竞赛迭代提供了经验教训。

title: "I Don't Know" -- Towards Appropriate Trust with Certainty-Aware Retrieval Augmented Generation
comment: To be published in VALE 2025 Proceedings
summary: Achieving the right amount of trust in AI systems is important, but challenging. The problem is exacerbated with the rise of Large Language Models (LLMs) as they provide human-level communication capabilities, but potentially hallucinate in the content that they generate. Moreover, they express over-confidence in their answers, making it difficult for users to judge their truthfulness. An important human value that users seek is benevolence, which can be met by LLM's self-reflection leading to reliable and honest answers. Accordingly, this paper proposes conveying appropriate levels of self-reflected certainty to build appropriate trust. Our contributions are twofold: 1) We develop CERTA (Certainty Enhanced RAG for Trustworthy Answers), a specialized Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) system that incorporates the relevance between question, context, and answer to reflect its uncertainty in answering questions; 2) We create the Certainty Benchmark with 90 question-context pairs of non-objective questions, divided over four categories (factuality, preference, sycophancy, morality) and three types of contexts (relevant, incomplete, irrelevant). We run experiments with a baseline RAG system and three CERTA settings using two LLMs. Our evaluations indicate that CERTA helps identify answers that are uncertain, decreases the cases of over-agreeing, and provides cautious behavior when prompted for moral judgments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CERTA系统，通过检索增强生成（RAG）结合自我反思的不确定性表达，在非客观问题上构建适度信任，实验表明其能更可靠地识别不确定答案、减少过度迎合行为。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型（LLMs）具有人类水平的沟通能力，但可能产生幻觉并表现出过度自信，使用户难以判断回答的真实性。用户期望的"善意"价值需要模型通过自我反思提供可靠诚实的答案，因此需要一种能表达适当确定性水平的方法来建立适度信任。
AI.method: 1) 提出CERTA系统，一种专门化的检索增强生成（RAG）系统，通过整合问题、上下文和答案之间的相关性来反映回答的不确定性；2) 创建Certainty Benchmark，包含90个非客观问题的问答-上下文对，覆盖事实性、偏好、谄媚、道德四个类别，以及相关、不完整、不相关三种上下文类型；3) 使用两种LLM在基线RAG系统和三种CERTA设置下进行实验。
AI.result: CERTA能够更有效地识别不确定的答案，减少过度迎合（over-agreeing）的情况，并在面对道德判断提示时表现出谨慎行为。
AI.conclusion: 通过表达适当的自我反思确定性，CERTA有助于在LLM系统中建立适度信任，特别是在非客观问题上，能够提升回答的可靠性和诚实度。

title: Model Organisms Are Leaky: Perplexity Differencing Often Reveals Finetuning Objectives
summary: Finetuning can significantly modify the behavior of large language models, including introducing harmful or unsafe behaviors. To study these risks, researchers develop model organisms: models finetuned to exhibit specific known behaviors for controlled experimentation. Identifying these behaviors remains challenging. We show that a simple perplexity-based method can surface finetuning objectives from model organisms by leveraging their tendency to overgeneralize their finetuned behaviors beyond the intended context. First, we generate diverse completions from the finetuned model using short random prefills drawn from general corpora. Second, we rank completions by decreasing perplexity gap between reference and finetuned models. The top-ranked completions often reveal the finetuning objectives, without requiring model internals or prior assumptions about the behavior. We evaluate this on a diverse set of model organisms (N=76, 0.5 to 70B parameters), including backdoored models, models finetuned to internalize false facts via synthetic document finetuning, adversarially trained models with hidden concerning behaviors, and models exhibiting emergent misalignment. For the vast majority of model organisms tested, the method surfaces completions revealing finetuning objectives within the top-ranked results, with models trained via synthetic document finetuning or to produce exact phrases being particularly susceptible. We further show that the technique can be effective even without access to the exact pre-finetuning checkpoint: trusted reference models from different families can serve as effective substitutes. As the method requires only next-token probabilities from the finetuned model, it is compatible with API-gated models that expose token logprobs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于困惑度（perplexity）的简单方法，通过分析微调模型对微调目标的过度泛化倾向，从模型生成的补全中识别其微调目标。该方法在76个模型生物体（0.5B至70B参数）上测试，包括后门模型、伪造事实模型、对抗训练模型等，能有效揭示微调目标，且无需访问原始模型内部或精确的微调前检查点。
AI.motivation: 微调可能引入有害行为，研究这些风险需要开发"模型生物体"（即被微调以展示特定已知行为的模型），但识别这些行为仍然具有挑战性。作者希望提出一种简单、无需模型内部信息的方法来检测和揭示微调目标。
AI.method: 1) 从通用语料库中抽取短随机前缀，输入微调模型生成多样化补全；2) 按参考模型与微调模型之间困惑度差距递减排序；3) 排名靠前的补全往往能揭示微调目标。该方法仅需微调模型的下一词元概率，兼容API型模型。
AI.result: 在76个模型生物体（0.5B至70B参数）上测试，包括后门模型、合成文档微调模型、对抗训练模型和涌现失调模型。绝大多数情况下，该方法能在排名靠前的结果中揭示微调目标。对合成文档微调或精确短语训练的模型尤为有效。甚至可以使用不同系列的参考模型作为替代。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种简单有效的基于困惑度的微调目标检测方法，无需模型内部信息或先验假设，仅需访问微调模型的token logprobs即可。该方法有助于检测和识别微调引入的潜在有害行为。

title: Sparse Regression under Correlation and Weak Signals: A Reproducible Benchmark of Classical and Bayesian Methods
summary: Choosing between classical and Bayesian sparse regression methods involves a real trade-off: penalized estimators like Lasso run in milliseconds but give no uncertainty estimates,while Horseshoe and Spike-and-Slab priors produce full posteriors but need MCMC chains that take minutes per fit.Surprisingly few studies compare these two families head-to-head under the conditions that actually make sparse regression hard -- correlated features, weak signals, and growing dimensionality. We benchmark six methods (OLS, Ridge,Lasso, Elastic Net, Horseshoe, Spike-and-Slab) on synthetic data with three covariance structures (rho up to 0.9), four SNR levels, and p in {20, 50, 100}, plus the Diabetes dataset,totalling over 2,600 experiments. The results are clear on some points and nuanced on others. Bayesian methods win on prediction error (MSE 72 vs. 108-267), and the Horseshoe delivers near-nominal 95% coverage (94.8%). But Spike-and-Slab,despite narrower intervals, under-covers at 91.9% -- its continuous relaxation likely plays a role. For variable selection, Lasso and Spike-and-Slab tie at F1 ~ 0.47, making Lasso the practical default when posteriors are not needed. Code and data are available at https://github.com/xiao98/sparse-bayesian-regression-bench.

AI.tldr: 本文在相关特征、弱信号和高维性等实际困难条件下，系统比较了经典惩罚回归（Lasso、Ridge、Elastic Net）与贝叶斯稀疏回归（Horseshoe、Spike-and-Slab）等六种方法，进行了超过2600次实验。结果表明贝叶斯方法在预测误差上更优，Horseshoe覆盖率达到近名义水平（94.8%），但Spike-and-Slab覆盖率不足（91.9%）；在变量选择上，Lasso与Spike-and-Slab的F1分数相当（约0.47），当不需要后验分布时Lasso是实际默认选择。
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏回归研究中，经典惩罚方法与贝叶斯方法的头对头比较很少，尤其是在实际困难条件（特征相关、信号弱、维度增长）下进行的系统对比几乎空白，导致研究者难以在不同方法间做出有据可循的选择。
AI.method: 在合成数据上设置三种协方差结构（相关性高达0.9）、四个信噪比水平、三种维度（p=20,50,100），并在Diabetes真实数据集上进行验证，总共超过2600次实验。对比方法包括OLS、Ridge、Lasso、Elastic Net、Horseshoe和Spike-and-Slab。
AI.result: 贝叶斯方法在预测误差上胜出（MSE 72 vs 108-267）；Horseshoe覆盖率达94.8%（接近名义水平），而Spike-and-Slab虽有更窄的区间但覆盖率仅91.9%；变量选择方面Lasso与Spike-and-Slab的F1分数持平（约0.47）。
AI.conclusion: 贝叶斯方法在预测和不确定性量化上有优势（尤其是Horseshoe），但若仅需变量选择且不需要后验分布，Lasso是更实用的默认选择。研究者应根据实际需求（预测/不确定性 vs. 效率/变量选择）在两类方法间做出取舍。

title: SNNF: An SNN-based Near-Sensor Noise Filter for Dynamic Vision Sensors
summary: Dynamic Vision Sensors (DVS) exhibit exceptional dynamic range and low power consumption, making them ideal for edge applications in the Internet of Video Things (IoVT). However, their output is often degraded by spurious Background Activity (BA) noise, leading to unnecessary computational overhead. This paper proposes SNNF, a near-sensor BA noise filter that integrates a compact Event-Based Binary Image (EBBI) representation, a parallel memory architecture, and a single-layer Spiking Neural Network (SNN) classifier. Trained on representative DVS data, the SNN distinguishes signal events from noise with an AUC of 0.89 on standard datasets. The binary-array-based EBBI eliminates timestamp dependency, significantly reducing memory footprint. Moreover, the SNN's spike-based computation replaces power-hungry multipliers with simple accumulation logic and minimizes inter-neuron data width, resulting in an extremely hardware-efficient design. FPGA implementation results show that SNNF reduces memory and logic resources to approximately 11% and 40%, respectively of state-of-the-art filters, while achieving a throughput of 29 Mega events per second (Meps). In a 65 nm CMOS ASIC implementation, SNNF achieves 44.4 Meps with an area and power consumption of only ~13% and <5% of the corresponding ANN-based designs. These results demonstrate that SNNF provides an excellent balance between filtering accuracy and hardware efficiency, making it highly suitable for resource-constrained, near-sensor deployment.

AI.tldr: 提出SNNF——一种基于脉冲神经网络(SNN)的近传感器背景活动(BA)噪声滤波器，通过事件型二值图像(EBBI)表示和并行存储架构，在FPGA和65nm CMOS ASIC上实现了高吞吐量(29-44.4 Meps)、极低资源消耗(逻辑和内存仅为现有方法的11%-40%)，同时保持AUC 0.89的滤波精度。
AI.motivation: DVS传感器的输出常被背景活动(BA)噪声污染，导致不必要的计算开销。现有滤波器在资源受限的边缘场景中难以兼顾精度与硬件效率。
AI.method: 1) 提出事件型二值图像(EBBI)表示，消除时间戳依赖，大幅降低内存占用；2) 设计并行存储架构；3) 采用单层SNN分类器，以脉冲计算替代乘累加，仅需累加逻辑，降低神经元间数据宽度。
AI.result: FPGA上内存和逻辑资源分别降至现有方法的~11%和~40%，吞吐量29 Meps；65nm ASIC实现面积和功耗仅为ANN设计的~13%和<5%，吞吐量44.4 Meps；AUC达0.89。
AI.conclusion: SNNF在滤波精度与硬件效率间取得优秀平衡，非常适合资源受限的近传感器部署场景。

title: Your Loss is My Gain: Low Stake Attacks on Liquid Staking Pools
summary:
Permissionless Proof-of-Stake (PoS) economic security is predicated on the high cost of violating consensus safety or liveness. We show that liquid staking introduces additional risks that are not captured by standard PoS economic security arguments. Through an empirical study of Ethereum data, we find that the operational performance of liquid staking pools is positively associated with subsequent normalized liquid staking token (LST) returns. Motivated by this, we present a cross-layer attack: a low-stake adversary can manipulate the consensus protocol to degrade a target pool's performance and take application-layer positions that profit if the market reprices the corresponding \gls{LST} in-line with the historically observed association.
  To make the consensus layer manipulation concrete, we develop a deep reinforcement learning (DRL) framework to automatically discover attack strategies. Our evaluation shows that the learned strategies can recover near-optimal theoretical attacks and uncover new manipulation behaviors that significantly degrade target pool performance. We further characterize feasible application-layer monetization channels and analyze leveraged shorting in detail using Monte Carlo simulations, showing that such attacks can be profitable with over one-half probability for LSTs of major staking pools. Our findings reveal a previously overlooked attack surface in PoS systems with liquid staking and expose a gap between consensus and economic security.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了权益证明（PoS）系统中流动性质押带来的新型跨层攻击：低 stakes 攻击者可通过操控共识层降低目标质押池性能，进而利用应用层 LST（流动性质押代币）价格偏差获利。通过以太坊数据实证、深度强化学习框架及蒙特卡洛模拟，证明了攻击的可行性与盈利性，暴露了 PoS 系统共识安全与经济安全之间的鸿沟。
AI.motivation: 现有 PoS 经济安全分析未考虑流动性质押引入的额外风险，本文旨在揭示这一被忽视的攻击面，并填补共识安全与经济安全之间的分析空白。
AI.method: 1）以太坊数据实证分析：发现质押池操作性能与 LST 收益正相关；2）提出跨层攻击框架：共识层攻击 + 应用层套利；3）开发深度强化学习（DRL）框架自动发现攻击策略；4）利用蒙特卡洛模拟分析应用层盈利渠道（重点分析杠杆做空）。
AI.result: 1）DRL 学到的策略可恢复近最优理论攻击，并发现新的操控行为；2）对主流质押池 LST 的杠杆做空攻击有超过 50% 的概率盈利；3）证实了共识层与经济层之间存在可被利用的安全鸿沟。
AI.conclusion: 流动性质押为 PoS 系统引入了新的跨层攻击面，当前 PoS 经济安全模型需要重新审视，以纳入流动性质押带来的额外风险。

title: PPO guided Agentic Pipeline for Adaptive Prompt Selection and Test Case Generation
summary: Developing effective test cases capable of thoroughly exercising large-scale software systems is inherently difficult, especially if such systems have voluminous, complex, and deeply nested source codes. In this work, we present a novel approach for generating test cases using a reinforcement learning-driven agentic framework where Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) is coupled with an LLM engine to guide prompt selection during test generation. Our approach consists of two phases. In Phase I, the ToT-guided optimization agent partitions and minimizes the source code by removing redundancies without changing the functional behavior of the source code. In Phase II, a PPO-based policy network is trained to solve the problem of selecting prompts among eight different prompting techniques, such as Boundary Value Analysis, Random Fuzzing, etc., based on the inputted 11-dimensional state vector representing the source code complexity metrics and live coverage metrics to direct the LLM engine towards exploring unvisited paths in the program. The PPO agent receives rewards based on a combination of increases in line and branch coverages, penalties for unexplored branches, and rewards for reducing source code length. From experiments conducted on twenty benchmark programs, it is evident that the proposed approach, PPO-LLM, outperforms CBMC, kS-LLM, and kS-LLM++ in terms of branch and line coverage in almost all cases, for various loop bound values ranging from BOUND~1 to BOUND~2000. While at BOUND~1, the coverage of branches is 100\% using PPO-LLM on the PALS suite, in comparison, it is around 86.8\% using kS-LLM++. This confirms that adaptive prompt selection driven by PPO substantially outperforms static prompting strategies on PALS type programs.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合PPO强化学习与LLM的智能体框架（PPO-LLM），通过两阶段流程（代码精简+自适应提示选择）自动生成测试用例，在20个基准程序上相比CBMC、kS-LLM等基线方法显著提升了分支覆盖率和行覆盖率。
AI.motivation: 大规模软件系统代码庞大、嵌套复杂，手动生成能充分覆盖代码路径的测试用例极其困难，现有静态提示策略效果有限，亟需一种能自适应选择提示策略的自动化测试生成方法。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：Phase I 使用ToT引导的优化智能体对源代码进行分区和精简（去除冗余且不改变功能行为）；Phase II 训练基于PPO的策略网络，根据11维状态向量（代码复杂度指标+实时覆盖指标）从8种提示技术（如边界值分析、随机模糊测试等）中选择最优提示，引导LLM探索未覆盖路径，奖励函数综合考虑行/分支覆盖率提升、未探索分支惩罚和代码长度缩减。
AI.result: 在20个基准程序上，PPO-LLM在分支和行覆盖率上几乎全面优于CBMC、kS-LLM和kS-LLM++；在PALS测试集上，循环边界BOUND~1时PPO-LLM分支覆盖率达100%，而kS-LLM++仅为86.8%。
AI.conclusion: PPO驱动的自适应提示选择显著优于静态提示策略，验证了强化学习与LLM结合在自动化测试用例生成中的有效性。

title: Visual Chart Representations for Cryptocurrency Regime Prediction: A Systematic Deep Learning Study
comment: 9 pages, 8 figures, 9 tables. Stevens Institute of Technology course project, Fall 2025
summary: Technical traders have long relied on visual analysis of candlestick charts to identify market patterns and predict price movements. While deep learning has achieved remarkable success in image classification, its application to financial chart images remains underexplored. This paper presents a systematic study comparing different visual representations for cryptocurrency regime prediction. We evaluate three image encoding methods (raw candlestick charts, Gramian Angular Fields, and multi-channel GAF), five chart component configurations, four neural network architectures (CNN, ResNet18, EfficientNet-B0, and Vision Transformer), and the impact of ImageNet transfer learning. Through eight controlled experiments on Bitcoin, Ethereum, and S&P 500 data spanning 2018-2024, we identify optimal configurations for visual regime classification. Our results show that a simple 4-layer CNN on raw candlestick charts achieves 0.892 AUC-ROC, outperforming larger pretrained models. Surprisingly, simpler representations (price-only charts, 128x128 resolution) consistently outperform more complex alternatives. We provide interpretability analysis using GradCAM and demonstrate that transfer learning improves performance by 4-16% despite the domain gap between natural images and financial charts.

AI.tldr: 系统比较了三种图像编码方法、五种图表组件配置、四种神经网络架构以及迁移学习在加密货币市场状态预测中的效果，发现简单的4层CNN在原始K线图上表现最佳（AUC-ROC 0.892），且简单表示（纯价格图、128x128分辨率）优于复杂方案。
AI.motivation: 技术交易者长期依赖K线图的视觉分析来识别市场形态，但深度学习在金融图表图像上的应用尚未被充分探索，现有研究缺乏对不同视觉表示方法的系统比较。
AI.method: 通过八组控制实验，在2018-2024年的比特币、以太坊和S&P 500数据集上，比较三种图像编码方法（原始K线图、GAF、多通道GAF）、五种图表组件配置、四种神经网络（CNN、ResNet18、EfficientNet-B0、Vision Transformer）及ImageNet迁移学习的影响。
AI.result: 简单4层CNN在原始K线图上达到0.892 AUC-ROC，优于更大的预训练模型；简单表示（纯价格图、128x128分辨率）持续优于复杂替代方案；迁移学习带来4-16%的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 在金融图表分类任务中，简单的模型架构和图像表示比复杂的方案更有效，尽管领域存在差距，迁移学习仍能带来显著性能提升。

title: Understanding Emergent Misalignment via Feature Superposition Geometry
summary: Emergent misalignment, where fine-tuning on narrow, non-harmful tasks induces harmful behaviors, poses a key challenge for AI safety in LLMs. Despite growing empirical evidence, its underlying mechanism remains unclear. To uncover the reason behind this phenomenon, we propose a geometric account based on the geometry of feature superposition. Because features are encoded in overlapping representations, fine-tuning that amplifies a target feature also unintentionally strengthens nearby harmful features in accordance with their similarity. We give a simple gradient-level derivation of this effect and empirically test it in multiple LLMs (Gemma-2 2B/9B/27B, LLaMA-3.1 8B, GPT-OSS 20B). Using sparse autoencoders (SAEs), we identify features tied to misalignment-inducing data and to harmful behaviors, and show that they are geometrically closer to each other than features derived from non-inducing data. This trend generalizes across domains (e.g., health, career, legal advice). Finally, we show that a geometry-aware approach, filtering training samples closest to toxic features, reduces misalignment by 34.5%, substantially outperforming random removal and achieving comparable or slightly lower misalignment than LLM-as-a-judge-based filtering. Our study links emergent misalignment to feature superposition, providing a basis for understanding and mitigating this phenomenon.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于特征叠加几何的解释，说明为什么在窄领域、非有害任务上进行微调会意外引发LLM的有害行为。通过梯度推导和实验验证（Gemma-2、LLaMA-3.1等多模型），发现引发有害行为的数据特征与有害特征在表示空间中几何距离更近，而基于几何感知的数据筛选可降低34.5%的有害性。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有实证表明微调窄领域非有害任务可能引发有害行为（emergent misalignment），但其背后的机制尚不明确。作者旨在揭示这一现象的根本原因。
AI.method: 1) 提出基于特征叠加几何的理论解释，给出梯度层面的推导；2) 使用稀疏自编码器（SAEs）识别与有害行为相关的特征；3) 计算特征间的几何距离，验证有害特征与诱发数据特征更接近；4) 提出几何感知的数据筛选方法，过滤靠近有害特征的训练样本。
AI.result: 1) 在多模型（Gemma-2 2B/9B/27B、LLaMA-3.1 8B、GPT-OSS 20B）上验证了该现象；2) 在健康、职业、法律等多领域特征上，有害相关特征几何距离更近；3) 几何感知筛选降低34.5%有害性，优于随机去除，与LLM裁判过滤相当或略优。
AI.conclusion: 将涌现的有害行为与特征叠加几何联系起来，为理解和缓解该现象提供了理论基础和实用方法。

title: Period-conscious Time-series Reconstruction under Local Differential Privacy
summary: Periodic patterns are fundamental cues in multimedia signals and systems, including repetitive motion in video (e.g., gait cycles), rhythmic and pitch-related structure in audio, and recurring textures in image sequences. When such user-generated streams are collected from edge devices, local differential privacy (LDP) is appealing because it perturbs data before upload; however, the injected noise can corrupt spectral peaks and induce phase drift, making period estimation unreliable and degrading reconstruction quality. We propose \textbf{CPR} (\textit{Cycle and Phase Recovery}), a period-aware reconstruction framework for periodic time series under LDP. CPR performs multi-scale period probing and multi-consensus selection to suppress noise-induced spectral interference, then aggregates perturbed samples at matched within-cycle phase positions to stabilize phase alignment across cycles. To recover the underlying per-phase values, CPR combines EM-based denoising with kernel density estimation, improving robustness under tight privacy budgets. Experiments on two real-world periodic datasets demonstrate that CPR better preserves periodic structure and consistently achieves lower reconstruction error than representative LDP baselines, especially in the low-$ε$ regime.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CPR框架，用于在本地差分隐私下恢复周期性时间序列的周期和相位结构，通过多尺度周期探测、多共识选择和EM去噪等方法，有效降低噪声干扰，在低隐私预算下表现优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 边缘设备采集的用户生成流数据中存在周期性模式（如步态、音频节奏、图像纹理），但本地差分隐私（LDP）引入的噪声会破坏频谱峰值、导致相位漂移，使周期估计不可靠、重建质量下降。
AI.method: 提出CPR框架，包含三个关键组件：1）多尺度周期探测与多共识选择，抑制噪声引起的频谱干扰；2）在匹配的周期内相位位置聚合扰动样本，稳定相位对齐；3）结合EM去噪与核密度估计恢复底层相位值，提升紧隐私预算下的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在两个真实周期性数据集上的实验表明，CPR能更好地保留周期结构，在重建误差上一致优于代表性LDP基线方法，尤其在低ε（紧隐私预算）场景下优势明显。
AI.conclusion: CPR框架有效解决了LDP下周期性时间序列的周期与相位恢复难题，为边缘设备上的隐私保护周期性数据分析提供了可行方案。

title: Seeking Information with RAG-Assistants: Does Model Size Matter in Human-AI Collaborations?
summary: Much research on LLMs has focused on increasing benchmark performance. However, the evaluation of such models in real-world collaborative human-AI workflows has stayed behind. This work evaluates a chatbot-style assistant based on Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) in a realistic multi-turn information-seeking scenario inspired by workplace settings where compliance with local legislation and secure handling of sensitive data are often key. Specifically, we examine the performance of humans (N=112) assisted by RAG-assistants compared to LLM-only or LLM+RAG baselines. In this setting, we investigate how underlying model size (3B, 8B, and 70B) shapes the human-AI collaborative dynamic and how it influences perceived usability and satisfaction. Results show that the performance gain of human-AI collaboration over the model-only baselines is significant, irrespective of model size, suggesting that hybrid systems are beneficial in information-seeking scenarios. Interestingly, however, perceived usability and satisfaction among participants showed little difference across model sizes. This demonstrates a nuanced trade-off between model size, performance, and user perception. Our work highlights the added value of evaluating AI applications in actual multi-turn interactions with human users, looking at usability and satisfaction besides accuracy, rather than focusing on benchmark performance only.

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于RAG的聊天助手在多人机协作信息检索场景中的表现，发现人机协作显著优于纯模型（3B/8B/70B）基线，但不同规模模型在用户感知可用性和满意度上差异不大。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM研究多关注基准测试性能，缺乏对实际人机协作场景中模型效用的评估，尤其在工作场所合规性与敏感数据处理的背景下。
AI.method: 在模拟工作场所的多轮信息检索场景中，招募112名参与者，比较RAG助手与纯LLM或LLM+RAG基线，并考察3B、8B、70B三种模型规模对人机协作动态及用户感知的影响。
AI.result: 人机协作的性能增益在任何模型规模下均显著优于纯模型基线；但不同模型规模在用户感知的可用性和满意度上无明显差异。
AI.conclusion: 混合人机系统在信息检索场景中具有优势，但模型规模对用户体验的影响有限，提示评估AI应用应关注实际交互中的可用性与满意度，而非仅依赖基准成绩。

title: Can AI Debias the News? LLM Interventions Improve Cross-Partisan Receptivity but LLMs Overestimate Their Own Effectiveness
summary: Partisan news media erode cross-partisan trust, but large language models (LLMs) offer a potential means of debiasing such content at scale. Across two pre-registered experiments, we tested whether LLM-generated debiasing of liberal news headlines could improve conservative readers' trust-relevant judgments. Study 1 found that subtle lexical debiasing (replacing emotive words with more moderate synonyms) had no effect on any outcome. Study 2 found that a more substantive reframing intervention significantly increased conservatives' perceived trustworthiness, completeness, and willingness to engage with liberal news headlines, without producing a backfire effect among a sample of liberals. In Study 1, the intervention produced robust effects among LLM-simulated silicon participants, whereas it had no impact on human readers. In Study 2, the intervention's effects among silicon participants aligned directionally with human responses but were significantly larger in magnitude for some outcomes. Moderation analyses revealed that the model's implicit theory of who responds to debiasing diverged from the psychological profile that actually predicted human responsiveness. These findings demonstrate that LLM-based debiasing can improve cross-partisan receptivity when targeting ideological framing rather than surface-level language, but that current models lack both the quantitative accuracy and qualitative psychological fidelity to evaluate their own interventions without human oversight.

AI.tldr: 本文通过两项预注册实验，测试了LLM对自由派新闻标题去偏能否改善保守派读者的信任判断。研究发现：表面词汇去偏无效，而实质性框架重构能显著提升保守派对自由派新闻的信任度、完整性和参与意愿，且不会在自由派中产生反效果。但LLM模拟的"硅基参与者"与真实人类的反应在量级和心理机制上存在显著偏差。
AI.motivation: 党派性新闻媒体侵蚀跨党派信任，LLM提供了一种大规模去偏的潜在手段，但需要验证其实际效果和心理保真度。
AI.method: 两项预注册实验：研究1使用细微词汇去偏（用温和同义词替换情绪化词汇）；研究2使用实质性框架重构。同时对比了人类读者和LLM模拟的硅基参与者的反应。
AI.result: 研究1：词汇去偏对人类无效果，但对硅基参与者有显著效果。研究2：框架重构显著提升保守派的信任、完整性和参与意愿，无反效果；硅基参与者的反应方向一致但量级更大。模型对谁会对去偏产生反应的隐性理论与真实人类反应的心理画像不一致。
AI.conclusion: 基于LLM的去偏可以改善跨党派接受度，但需要针对意识形态框架而非表层语言。然而，当前模型缺乏定量准确性和定性心理保真度，无法在没有人类监督的情况下评估自身干预效果。

title: From Euler to Dormand-Prince: ODE Solvers for Flow Matching Generative Models
summary: Sampling from Flow Matching generative models requires solving an ordinary differential equation (ODE) whose computational cost is dominated by neural network forward passes. We derive four classical ODE solvers -- Euler, Explicit Midpoint, Classical Runge-Kutta (RK4), and Dormand-Prince 5(4) -- from first principles via Taylor expansion, implement them from scratch in PyTorch, and systematically benchmark their efficiency on Conditional Flow Matching tasks ranging from 2D toy distributions to MNIST digits. On the quantitative side, we use sliced Wasserstein distance to construct NFE-quality Pareto frontiers,finding that RK4 at 80 function evaluations achieves sample quality comparable to Euler at 200. Beyond reproducing known convergence rates, we report two empirical observations: (1) the Jacobian eigenvalue spectrum of the learned velocity field stiffens sharply near t=1, explaining why the adaptive Dormand-Prince solver automatically concentrates its step budget at the end of the trajectory; (2) the quality gap between low-order and high-order solvers widens for undertrained and smaller models, indicating that solver choice matters most when the model is imperfect. Code and all experiment scripts are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文从泰勒展开出发推导了四种经典ODE求解器（Euler、Explicit Midpoint、RK4、Dormand-Prince 5(4)），并在Conditional Flow Matching任务上系统对比了它们的效率。主要发现：RK4在80次函数评估时即可达到Euler在200次时的样本质量；速度场的雅可比特征值在t=1附近急剧变硬，解释了自适应求解器为何将步长集中在轨迹末端；求解器阶数间的质量差距在欠训练和小模型上更为显著。
AI.motivation: Flow Matching生成模型的采样效率受限于ODE求解所需的神经网络前向传播次数，现有研究缺乏对经典ODE求解器在该场景下系统性的效率对比和深入的行为分析。
AI.method: 从泰勒展开第一性原理推导Euler、Explicit Midpoint、RK4和Dormand-Prince 5(4)四种求解器，在PyTorch中从头实现，并在2D toy分布到MNIST手写数字的Conditional Flow Matching任务上进行系统基准测试，使用sliced Wasserstein距离构建NFE-质量Pareto前沿。
AI.result: (1) RK4在80次函数评估时达到Euler在200次时的样本质量；(2) 速度场的雅可比特征值谱在t=1附近急剧变硬（stiffens），自适应Dormand-Prince求解器自动将步长集中在轨迹末端；(3) 低阶与高阶求解器之间的质量差距在欠训练和小模型上更大。
AI.conclusion: 高阶求解器能显著提升Flow Matching采样效率，尤其在模型不完美（欠训练或小容量）时，求解器选择更为关键。速度场的刚性特性（stiffness）是影响步长分配的核心因素。

title: Neuromorphic Control for 3D Navigation in Minecraft Using Genetic Algorithms
summary: The popular 2009 voxel based videogame, Minecraft, contains several distinct disciplines. One of which is "parkour," gameplay that focuses on traversing a world's environment with maximum efficiency. The Minecraft online community has turned the game's physics engine into dynamic puzzles, requiring players to masterfully manipulate motion mechanics through frame precise timing of keystrokes. Actions such as sprinting, sneaking, and mouse direction are all combined to clear specific difficult jumps. Through this project, we design a genetic algorithm to generate weights for a neural network to autonomously evaluate inputs for block distances, terrain, and obstacles to determine the most optimal pathing.

AI.tldr: 本文使用遗传算法优化神经网络权重，实现Minecraft游戏中跑酷路径的自动规划与优化。
AI.motivation: Minecraft跑酷玩法需要玩家掌握精确的按键时机和运动机制，手动操作难度高，研究者希望用AI自动优化路径。
AI.method: 设计遗传算法来生成神经网络的权重，神经网络负责评估方块距离、地形和障碍物等输入，以确定最优路径。
AI.result: 论文目前仅描述方法设计，未明确报告实验结果或性能指标。
AI.conclusion: 遗传算法与神经网络结合可有效解决Minecraft跑酷中的路径优化问题。

title: Partition function form games with probabilistic beliefs
summary: We revisit games in partition function form, i.e. cooperative games where the payoff of a coalition depends on the partition of the entire set of players. We assume that each coalition computes its worth having probabilistic beliefs over the coalitional behavior of the outsiders, i.e., it assigns various probability distributions over the set of partitions that the outsiders can form. These beliefs are not necessarily consistent with respect to the actual choices of the outsiders. We apply this framework to symmetric partition function form games characterized by either positive or negative externalities and we derive conditions on coalitional beliefs that guarantee the non-emptiness of the core of the induced games.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了分区函数形式的合作博弈，提出联盟对外部参与者的分区行为持有概率信念，并在正/负外部性对称博弈中推导出保证核心非空的条件。
AI.motivation: 传统合作博弈假设联盟知晓对手的确切行为，但现实中联盟对外部参与者的结盟方式往往存在不确定性，作者希望引入概率信念来更真实地刻画这种不确定性。
AI.method: 将联盟对外部参与者分区行为的概率信念引入分区函数博弈；在正外部性和负外部性两类对称博弈中，分析不同信念条件对诱导博弈核心非空性的影响。
AI.result: 推导出了在正/负外部性对称分区函数博弈中，保证诱导博弈核心非空的具体信念条件。
AI.conclusion: 联盟的信念（即使与外部实际行为不一致）可以显著影响合作博弈的稳定性（核心非空性），为不确定性下的合作博弈提供了新视角。

title: Semantics-Based Verification of an Implemented Shor Oracle for ECDLP in Qrisp
comment: 7 pages, 1 figure, and 1 table; accepted by The 20th International Symposium on Theoretical Aspects of Software Engineering (TASE 2026)
summary: Shor-style quantum algorithms for the elliptic-curve discrete logarithm problem (ECDLP) are highly sensitive to the exact semantics of their group-operation oracles. Consequently, minor implementation choices can invalidate the intended mathematical model and lead to misleading conclusions. This paper introduces a semantics-first verification perspective for an end-to-end, compilable ECDLP implementation built on Qrisp. We specify the implemented oracle at the level of program semantics, derive refinement-style verification obligations for its key components, and provide a high-level complexity argument for the resulting oracle family. A small case study highlights that (i) the core point-update primitive agrees with a classical reference on well-formed inputs, yet (ii) controlled execution may violate the expected control law under the evaluated toolchain, despite a passing trivial control sanity check. These results position semantic auditing as a practical prerequisite for trustworthy ECDLP-oriented quantum software.

AI.tldr: 本文针对基于Qrisp的椭圆曲线离散对数问题(ECDLP)量子算法实现，提出了一种语义优先的验证方法。研究发现，尽管核心点更新原语在良好输入下与经典参考一致，但在控制执行下可能违反预期控制律，强调了语义审计对于可信量子软件的重要性。
AI.motivation: Shor风格的ECDLP量子算法对群操作oracle的精确语义高度敏感，微小的实现选择会破坏数学模型并导致误导性结论，因此需要严格的语义验证来确保实现的正确性和可信性。
AI.method: 采用语义优先的验证视角，在程序语义层面规范实现的oracle，推导其关键组件的精化风格验证义务，并通过小规模案例研究对比核心点更新原语与经典参考的一致性，以及检查控制执行下的控制律符合性。
AI.result: 核心点更新原语在良好输入上与经典参考一致，但控制执行下可能违反预期控制律，尽管通过了简单的控制健全性检查。
AI.conclusion: 语义审计应作为构建可信ECDLP量子软件的实际前提条件，对于确保量子算法的正确实现至关重要。

title: Single Image Defogging Using a Fourth-Order Telegraph PDE Guided by Physical Haze Modeling
summary: In real-world scenarios, image defogging is an inverse problem due to unknown scene depth, atmospheric scattering, and the common absence of ground truth . To resolve the issue, we propose a hybrid defogging model that integrates a fourth-order nonlinear PDE with a physical haze formation model. We used Dark Channel Prior to estimate atmospheric parameters and to generate a guidance image, while the final restoration is performed via a fourth-order PDE-based evolution. A fourth-order PDE of the type telegraph is then evolved, incorporating an edge-adaptive diffusion coefficient and a fidelity term weighted by the transmission map. Fourth-order diffusion effectively suppresses haze while preserving structural details, and the hyperbolic formulation improves numerical stability and convergence behavior. We use relative error norm criteria for the convergence of our PDE. The proposed method is compared with Dark Channel prior, modified Dark Channel prior, and variational-based single-image defogging techniques. When we have ground truth available, we use MSE and SSIM for quantitative evaluation, whereas no-reference metrics, including FADE, Contrast Restoration Index, Average Gradient, and Entropy, are applied to real-world foggy images. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed hybrid PDE-based method provides comparable visual quality and maintains structural details.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种结合四阶非线性PDE与物理雾霾形成模型的混合图像去雾方法，利用暗通道先验估计大气参数，通过四阶电报型PDE演化实现去雾，在保持结构细节的同时有效抑制雾霾。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中图像去雾面临场景深度未知、大气散射未知以及缺乏真实参考图像的逆问题，现有方法在这些挑战下效果有限。
AI.method: 1) 使用暗通道先验估计大气参数并生成引导图像；2) 构建四阶电报型PDE，融合边缘自适应扩散系数和由透射图加权的保真项；3) 采用相对误差范数作为PDE收敛准则。
AI.result: 与DCP、改进DCP及基于变分的去雾方法相比，该方法在视觉质量和结构细节保持方面具有竞争力；有真实参考时使用MSE和SSIM评估，无参考时使用FADE、对比度恢复指数、平均梯度和熵评估。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的混合PDE去雾方法能够提供可比的视觉质量并有效保持结构细节，四阶扩散在抑制雾霾和保留细节之间取得了良好平衡，双曲型公式提升了数值稳定性和收敛性。

title: ClinicBot: A Guideline-Grounded Clinical Chatbot with Prioritized Evidence RAG and Verifiable Citations
summary: Clinical diagnosis requires answers that are accurate, verifiable, and explicitly grounded in official guidelines. While large language models excel at natural language processing, their tendency to hallucinate undermines their utility in high-stakes medical contexts where precision is essential. Existing retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems treat all evidence equally, producing noisy context and generic answers misaligned with clinical practice. We present ClinicBot, an AI system that translates guideline recommendations into trustworthy clinical support through three key advances: (1) structured extraction of clinical guidelines into semantic units (recommendations, tables, definitions, narrative) with explicit provenance, (2) evidence prioritization that ranks content by clinical significance and guideline structure rather than textual similarity, and (3) a web-based interface that presents concise, actionable answers with verifiable evidence. We will demonstrate ClinicBot using diabetes questions from real patients and an additional diabetes risk assessment tool that is faithful to the American Diabetes Association (ADA) Standards of Care in Diabetes (2025). The demonstration will illustrate how semantic knowledge extraction and hierarchical evidence ranking can reliably operate in a multi-agent setting to process complex clinical guidelines at scale.

AI.tldr: ClinicBot是一个AI系统，通过结构化提取临床指南、按临床重要性排序证据以及提供可验证的界面，将指南建议转化为可信的临床支持，减少幻觉并提升诊断可靠性。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在医疗场景中容易出现幻觉，而现有RAG系统平等对待所有证据，导致上下文嘈杂且答案与临床实践不符，无法满足临床诊断对准确性、可验证性和指南依从性的要求。
AI.method: (1) 将临床指南结构化提取为语义单元（建议、表格、定义、叙述）并附带显式来源；(2) 基于临床意义和指南结构而非文本相似性对证据进行优先级排序；(3) 构建Web界面呈现简洁可操作的答案并附带可验证证据。
AI.result: 基于真实患者的糖尿病问题及ADA 2025糖尿病护理标准进行演示，展示语义知识提取和分层证据排序如何在多智能体环境中可靠地大规模处理复杂临床指南。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构化知识提取和分层证据排序，ClinicBot能够为临床决策提供更可信、可验证的AI支持，有望提升AI在医学诊断中的实用性和安全性。

title: The Streaming Reservoir Convergence Theorem: A Prospect-Theoretic Framework for Multi-Provider Adaptive Streaming
summary:
We present the Streaming Reservoir Convergence Theorem (SRCT), a novel mathematical framework for multi-provider adaptive bitrate streaming that addresses three fundamental structural weaknesses in current systems: linear provider probing, reactive failover, and cold standby transitions. SRCT models stream acquisition as a concurrent reservoir filling problem$-$probing all $N$ providers simultaneously rather than in batches$-$and maintains $k$ pre-verified, pre-fetched standby streams alongside the active stream to enable sub-second failover with zero user-visible disruption.
  We prove four principal results: (1) a harmonic lower bound on reservoir safety showing that $k$ independent streams provide $H_k / \barλ$ expected uptime where $H_k$ is the $k$-th harmonic number; (2) a concurrent acquisition speedup $S(N,b) = (N/b) \cdot (1-F^b)/(1-F^N)$ over batched probing, yielding $3$-$5\times$ practical improvement; (3) monotonic non-decreasing quality under lazy-refill with convergence to the Pareto-optimal frontier; and (4) a prospect-weighted switching rule$-$using Kahneman-Tversky value functions with $α=β=0.88$, $λ=2.25$ $-$ that provably eliminates thrashing between similar-quality streams via a no-thrash bound on the expected switch count.
  We implement SRCT across two production streaming pipelines: a primary movie/TV system serving 12+ HLS providers with $k=3$ reservoir slots, and a live sports system with multi-format DASH/HLS failover. Empirical verification via Monte Carlo simulation (5000 trials) confirms all four theorems across 22 independent checks. The reservoir of $k=3$ streams achieves $9.15\times$ mean time to depletion versus a single stream, and concurrent probing of 12 providers at 40% failure rate yields a $4.27\times$ speedup over the current batched-by-3 default.

AI.tldr: 本文提出流媒体 Reservoir 收敛定理（SRCT），通过多提供商同时探测、k个预验证备用流、基于前景理论的无抖动切换规则，显著提升多提供商自适应码率流媒体的可靠性，蒙特卡洛模拟验证了所有理论结果。
AI.motivation: 当前自适应码率流媒体系统存在三个结构性缺陷：线性提供商探测（逐个探测效率低）、反应性故障切换（故障后才切换导致中断）、冷备用过渡（备用流未预取造成延迟）。本文旨在从数学上解决这些固有问题。
AI.method: SRCT 框架：将流获取建模为并发 reservoir 填充问题（同时探测N个提供商），维护k个预验证/预取备用流；提出四种定理（调和数下界、并发加速比、单调收敛到帕累托前沿、基于 Kahneman-Tversky 前景理论的无抖动切换规则）。
AI.result: k=3时平均耗尽时间提升9.15倍；12个提供商40%故障率下并发探测比批处理加速4.27倍；蒙特卡洛5000次模拟验证了所有四个定理。
AI.conclusion: SRCT 在理论和实践上均证明了多提供商并发探测与预验证备用机制能大幅提升流媒体系统可靠性，且前景理论切换规则有效消除质量抖动，适用于电影/TV和直播两大场景。

title: Multimodal Data Curation Through Ranked Retrieval
summary: Shared embedding spaces are widely used for multimodal search and data curation. In practice, two problems often limit how well this works. First, embeddings can reflect modality more than meaning, so examples cluster by input type even when the underlying content matches. Second, the paired supervision used to train these spaces is often noisy. When we blend many heterogeneous, human-labeled datasets, these issues reinforce each other and degrade cross-modal retrieval. We present a framework that improves alignment by acting on both the training pairs and the embedding model. Symmetric Nucleus Subsampling (SNS) refines training pairs by trimming raw inputs and annotations to the portions that best support each other. Expert Embedding Engine (EEE) combines complementary embedding experts using a learned projection network, together with a bias-aware objective that reduces modality-driven separation in the embedding space. We demonstrate that this approach collapses the modality gap by over 90% on average vs base embedding experts and is a strong data curator, with datablends from our method outperforming stratified sampling and traditional curation baselines in downstream model performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个框架，通过对称核子采样（SNS）优化训练对，以及专家嵌入引擎（EEE）融合多个互补嵌入专家，配合偏置感知目标，将模态差距缩小90%以上，并在多模态检索和数据策展任务中显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有共享嵌入空间存在两个核心问题：1）嵌入向量更多地反映模态信息而非语义内容，导致相同语义的不同模态数据在嵌入空间中分离；2）用于训练配对监督数据常带有噪声，当混合多个异质、人工标注的数据集时，这两个问题相互强化，降低跨模态检索性能。
AI.method: 提出两个核心组件：1）Symmetric Nucleus Subsampling (SNS)——通过修剪原始输入和标注，仅保留最能相互支持的部分，从而优化训练对的质量；2）Expert Embedding Engine (EEE)——利用可学习的投影网络融合多个互补的嵌入专家，并结合偏置感知目标函数，减少嵌入空间中的模态驱动分离。
AI.result: 该方法相比基础嵌入专家，平均将模态差距缩小90%以上；在数据策展任务中，该方法生成的数据混合优于分层采样和传统策展基线，显著提升了下游模型表现。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了多模态嵌入空间中的模态偏差和噪声标注问题，在跨模态检索和数据策展方面展现出强大能力。

title: CLEAR: Revealing How Noise and Ambiguity Degrade Reliability in LLMs for Medicine
summary: Medical large language model (LLM) evaluations rely on simplified, exam-style benchmarks that rarely reflect the ambiguity of real-world medical inquiries. We introduce the CLinical Evaluation of Ambiguity and Reliability (CLEAR) framework, which assesses how decision-space presentation, ambiguity, and uncertainty affect LLMs' reasoning on medical benchmarks. CLEAR systematically perturbs (1) the number of plausible answer options, (2) the presence of a ground truth or abstention option, and (3) the semantic framing of answer options. Applying CLEAR on three benchmarks evaluated across 17 LLMs reveals three notable limitations of existing evaluation methods. First, increasing the number of plausible answers degrades a model's ability to identify the correct answer and abstain against incorrect ones. Second, this lack of caution intensifies as the framing of abstention shifts from assertive rejection like "None of the Above" to uncertainty admission like "I don't know" (IDK). Notably, just including IDK in the answer space increases incorrect answer selections. Lastly, we formalize the performance gap between identifying the correct answer and abstaining from incorrect ones as the humility deficit, which worsens with model scale. Our findings reveal limitations in standard medical benchmarks and underscore that scaling alone does not resolve LLM reliability issues.

AI.tldr: CLEAR框架系统评估了决策空间、模糊性和不确定性对医学LLM推理的影响，发现增加合理选项数量会降低模型正确识别和弃权能力，弃权选项的措辞从“以上都不对”变为“我不知道”会加剧错误选择，并且模型规模越大，“谦逊赤字”越严重，表明规模扩展无法解决LLM的可靠性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有医学LLM评估依赖简化的考试式基准，无法反映真实医学问题中的模糊性，需要更严谨的评估框架来揭示模型在不确定性下的推理局限。
AI.method: CLEAR框架通过三种系统扰动进行评估：(1)合理选项数量、(2)是否存在正确答案或弃权选项、(3)选项的语义措辞，在17个LLM上对三个医学基准进行测试。
