AI.result: 增加合理选项数量降低模型识别正确答案和弃权能力；弃权措辞从“以上都不对”变为“我不知道”会增加错误选择；“谦逊赤字”（识别正确答案与弃权错误答案之间的差距）随模型规模扩大而恶化。
AI.conclusion: 现有医学基准存在显著局限，单纯增加模型规模无法解决LLM的可靠性问题。

title: Fast Log-Domain Sinkhorn Optimal Transport with Warp-Level GPU Reductions
summary: Entropic regularized optimal transport (OT) via the Sinkhorn algorithm has become a fundamental tool in machine learning, yet existing implementations either suffer from numerical instability for small regularization parameters or incur significant overhead from deep learning frameworks. We present FastSinkhorn, a lightweight, native CUDA implementation of the log-domain Sinkhorn algorithm that combines warp-level shuffle reductions with shared-memory tiling to achieve high GPU utilization without sacrificing numerical stability. Our solver operates entirely in the log-domain, enabling robust computation for regularization parameters as small as epsilon = 10^{-4} where standard-domain methods fail. On dense OT problems with n = m = 8192, our implementation achieves 12x speedup over the widely-used POT library and 5.9x speedup over GPU-accelerated PyTorch baselines, while consuming only 256 MB of GPU memory. We validate our solver on image color transfer, 3D point cloud matching, and convergence analysis, demonstrating that native CUDA kernels with careful numerical treatment provide a practical and efficient foundation for large-scale optimal transport computation.

AI.tldr: 提出FastSinkhorn，一个轻量级原生CUDA实现的log-domain Sinkhorn算法，结合warp-level shuffle归约和共享内存分块，在保持数值稳定性的同时实现高GPU利用率，在密集OT问题上相比POT库实现12倍加速，相比PyTorch基线实现5.9倍加速。
AI.motivation: 现有熵正则化最优传输的Sinkhorn算法实现存在两个主要问题：小正则化参数下数值不稳定，以及深度学习框架带来的显著开销。亟需一种既保持数值稳定性又高效利用GPU的计算方案。
AI.method: 采用原生CUDA实现log-domain Sinkhorn算法，关键设计包括：(1) 全log-domain计算确保数值稳定性，支持epsilon低至10^{-4}；(2) warp-level shuffle归约减少通信开销；(3) 共享内存分块(tiling)提高GPU访存效率。
AI.result: 在n=m=8192的密集OT问题上，相比POT库实现12倍加速，相比GPU加速的PyTorch基线实现5.9倍加速，GPU内存消耗仅256 MB。在图像颜色迁移、3D点云匹配和收敛性分析中均验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: 原生CUDA核函数配合精心的数值处理，能够为大规模最优传输计算提供实用高效的解决方案，在速度和稳定性上均优于现有框架级实现。

title: Robust volatility updates for Hierarchical Gaussian Filtering
summary: Hierarchical Gaussian Filtering (HGF) networks allow for efficient updating of posterior distributions (beliefs) about hidden states of an agent's environment. HGF parent nodes can target the mean or variance of their children. New information entering at input nodes leads to a cascade of belief updates across the network according to one-step update equations for each node's mean and precision (inverse variance). However, the original form of the update equations for variance-targeting parents(volatility coupling) can in some regions of parameter space lead to negative posterior precision, a logical impossibility which causes the updating algorithm to terminate with an error. In this report, we introduce a modified quadratic approximation to the variational energy of volatility-coupled nodes that avoids negative posterior precision. The key idea is to interpolate between two quadratic expansions of the variational energy: one at the prior prediction and one at a second mode whose location is obtained in closed form via the Lambert W function. The resulting update equations are robust across the entire parameter space and faithfully track the variational posterior even for large prediction errors.

AI.tldr: 针对HGF网络中波动率耦合节点导致的负后验精度问题，提出了一种基于Lambert W函数的改进二次近似方法，使更新方程在整个参数空间内鲁棒且准确。
AI.motivation: 原始HGF的波动率耦合更新方程在某些参数空间会导致负后验精度（逻辑上不可能），使算法报错终止，亟需修正。
AI.method: 在变分能量的先验预测处和第二个模态（通过Lambert W函数闭合形式求解）之间进行插值，形成改进的二次近似，替代原始的单一二次展开。
AI.result: 改进后的更新方程在整个参数空间内保持鲁棒，即使在大预测误差下也能准确追踪变分后验。
AI.conclusion: 提出的修正方法有效解决了负后验精度问题，使HGF的波动率耦合更新在所有参数区域内都能稳定运行。

title: The (Marginal) Value of a Search Ad: An Online Causal Framework for Repeated Second-price Auctions
summary: Existing auto-bidding algorithms in digital advertising often treat the value of an ad opportunity as the revenue obtained when an ad is shown and/or clicked, and bid accordingly. This can lead to wasteful spending because the true value is the marginal gain from paid exposure: even without winning a sponsored slot, an advertiser may still earn revenue via an organic search result (e.g., on Google or Amazon). Motivated by recent work, we model ad value as a treatment effect--the outcome difference between winning and losing the auction--and study online learning for bidding in second-price (Vickrey) auctions under this causal perspective. We develop algorithms that attain rate-optimal regret under several feedback models. A key ingredient exploits the information revealed by the second-price payment rule, which strictly improves regret relative to analogous learning problems in first-price auctions.

AI.tldr: 本文针对数字广告中传统出价算法忽略自然搜索结果影响的问题，提出将广告价值建模为因果处理效应（赢得与失去拍卖的结果差异），并研究在第二价格拍卖下的在线学习出价策略，开发了在多种反馈模型下达到最优遗憾率的算法。
AI.motivation: 现有自动出价算法通常将广告展示/点击的即时收入视为广告价值，忽略了即使未赢得广告位，广告主仍可能通过自然搜索结果获得收益，导致出价过高和浪费性支出。作者希望从因果推断视角更准确地建模广告的真实边际价值。
AI.method: 将广告价值建模为"赢得拍卖"相对于"输掉拍卖"的结果差异（处理效应），在第二价格（Vickrey）拍卖框架下研究在线学习出价问题。关键创新是利用第二价格拍卖的支付规则所揭示的信息，相较于第一价格拍卖的类似学习问题，实现了更优的遗憾界。
AI.result: 在多种反馈模型下，提出的算法达到了速率最优的遗憾界（rate-optimal regret）。
AI.conclusion: 从因果视角建模广告价值是更合理的方式，且第二价格拍卖的支付结构为在线学习提供了额外信息优势，能够设计出理论上最优的出价学习算法。

title: ProMoTA: a model-driven framework for end-to-end traceability analysis
summary: In this paper, we propose an approach that integrates end-to-end traceability with process modelling. OurprocessmodelsrepresentMDEworkflowsthatspan platform-independent-modelling, platform-specificmodelling, andcodegenerationphases. Processexecutionisautomated using megamodels and model transformation chains. The generation of end-to-end traceability information enables global model traceability, from high-level input models to generated code, forming the basis for traceability analysis. We have built an Eclipse-based framework, ProMoTA, to support our approach. ProMoTA extends the Acceleo model transformation language, introducing local traceability support. It also includes a global traceability map generator and end-to-end traceability analysis modules, providing users with a holistic view of the entire transformation process. Our framework is demonstrated with the use of a Wireless Sensor Network-Based IoT application.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将端到端可追溯性与过程建模相结合的方法，通过ProMoTA框架（基于Eclipse、扩展Acceleo语言）支持MDE工作流中的全局模型可追溯性分析，并在WSN-IoT应用中进行了验证。
AI.motivation: 现有MDE（模型驱动工程）工作流中缺乏端到端的可追溯性支持，难以从高层输入模型到生成代码实现全局追溯，导致分析和维护困难。
AI.method: 采用过程建模表示MDE工作流（覆盖PIM、PSM和代码生成阶段），利用megamodels和模型转换链实现流程自动化，并扩展Acceleo语言引入局部可追溯性支持，同时构建全局可追溯性地图生成器和分析模块。
AI.result: 开发了ProMoTA框架，成功实现了从高层输入模型到生成代码的端到端可追溯性，并提供了全局视图的追溯分析能力。
AI.conclusion: 端到端可追溯性与过程建模的集成能有效支持MDE工作流的全局追溯分析，ProMoTA框架在实际物联网应用案例中展示了其可行性。

title: Adversarial Flow Matching for Imperceptible Attacks on End-to-End Autonomous Driving
summary: Autonomous driving (AD) is evolving towards end-to-end (E2E) frameworks through two primary paradigms: monolithic models exemplified by Vision-Language-Action (VLA), and specialized modular architectures. Despite their divergent designs, both paradigms increasingly rely on Transformer backbones for complex reasoning, potentially causing a shared vulnerability: visually imperceptible perturbations can manipulate E2E AD models into hazardous maneuvers by targeting the Transformer module. Most existing adversarial attack approaches against AD systems operate under white-box or black-box settings; yet, they typically necessitate full model transparency, or suffer from either prohibitive query latency or limited attack transferability. In this paper, we propose Adversarial Flow Matching (AFM), a novel gray-box attack framework that exploits Transformer structural vulnerabilities in E2E AD models. AFM enables efficient one-step generation of adversarial examples via a neural average velocity field. Additionally, the proposed technique yields effective and visually imperceptible attacks by synergistically perturbing the generative latent space and the neural average velocity field. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AFM achieves a superior trade-off between attack effectiveness and imperceptibility: it substantially degrades the performance of both VLA and modular AD agents across various scenarios compared to baselines, while maintaining state-of-the-art visual imperceptibility. Furthermore, adversarial examples generated by AFM exhibit robust cross-model transferability, indicating that AFM closely approximates a black-box attack setting while requiring only the prior knowledge that the target AD model incorporates a Transformer-based module.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种名为对抗性流匹配（AFM）的灰盒攻击框架，利用端到端自动驾驶模型中Transformer模块的结构脆弱性，通过单步生成对抗样本实现高效、视觉不可察觉的攻击，并在多种场景下显著降低自动驾驶性能，同时具备跨模型迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击方法要么需要完全模型透明度（白盒），要么面临查询延迟高或攻击可迁移性有限的问题（黑盒）。需要一种更实用的灰盒攻击方法。
AI.method: AFM框架利用神经平均速度场实现单步生成对抗样本，通过协同扰动生成潜在空间和神经平均速度场来产生高效且视觉不可察觉的攻击。
AI.result: 在多种场景下显著降低VLA和模块化自动驾驶代理的性能，优于基线方法；保持最先进的视觉不可察觉性；生成的对抗样本具有鲁棒的跨模型迁移性。
AI.conclusion: AFM在攻击有效性和不可察觉性之间实现了优越的权衡，仅需知道目标模型包含Transformer模块这一先验知识，就近似达到黑盒攻击的效果。

title: Accelerating battery research with an AI interface between FINALES and Kadi4Mat
comment: Main manuscript: 21 pages, 9 figures. Supporting material: 3 pages, 5 figures. Submitted to "Batteries & Supercaps", currently under revision
summary: The time-consuming formation process critically impacts the longevity of sodium-ion coin cells and End Of Life (EOL) performance. This study aims to optimize formation protocols for duration efficiency, targeting high-performance outcomes while minimizing the number of experiments to reduce resource consumption and accelerate discovery. Specifically, we consider two potentially competing objectives: minimizing formation time and maximizing EOL performance. Beyond this application focus, we also present a methodological contribution: a framework designed to enable interoperability between the FINALES and Kadi RDM ecosystems, which we employ to tackle our optimization problem. In this setup, the FINALES framework orchestrates experiment planning and execution on the POLiS MAP, while an active-learning agent implemented within Kadi4Mat guides experiment selection, using multi-objective batched Bayesian optimization to efficiently explore the parameter space. This interoperability enhancement enables coordinated, distributed collaboration across automated systems and human-operated workflows, bridging multiple research centers. Using this approach, we iteratively explore the trade-off between formation time and EOL performance and identify candidate solutions approximating the Pareto front. The resulting workflow demonstrates the capability of interoperable infrastructures to facilitate data-driven optimization in battery research, and establishes a transferable framework applicable to diverse materials science and engineering optimization tasks.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出一个跨平台框架（FINALES与Kadi RDM互操作），通过多目标贝叶斯优化，在减少实验次数的前提下，探索钠离子电池化成时间与EOL性能之间的权衡，找到帕累托最优方案。
AI.motivation: 钠离子电池化成过程耗时过长，严重影响电池寿命和EOL性能。传统实验方法资源消耗大、效率低，急需一种既能优化化成时间又能保证高性能的加速实验方法。
AI.method: 构建FINALES与Kadi RDM互操作的框架：FINALES负责实验规划与执行（在POLiS MAP上），Kadi4Mat中的主动学习代理使用多目标批量贝叶斯优化指导实验选择，迭代探索参数空间，逼近帕累托前沿。
AI.result: 成功识别出逼近帕累托前沿的候选解决方案，展示了跨平台互操作基础设施在数据驱动优化中的能力，并建立了可迁移至其他材料科学优化任务的框架。
AI.conclusion: 该框架不仅优化了钠离子电池化成协议，更证明了分布式、跨平台的自动化协作在材料科学优化中的可行性，为未来数据驱动的电池研究及更广泛的工程优化提供了通用方案。

title: The Pre-Training Study of Expanded-SPLADE Models on Web Document Titles
summary:
Masked Language Modeling (MLM) pre-training is one of the primary ways to initialize Neural Information Retrieval (IR) models prior to retrieval fine-tuning. However, studies show that MLM pre-trained models have limited readiness and transfer learning issues for fine-tuning them into Neural Bi-Encoder models. This paper studies the effect of different pre-training datasets and pre-training options on the MLM pre-trained models for retrieval fine-tuning. The study focuses on the SPLADE-style model, which uses the MLM layer also at fine-tuning time. More specifically, we experimented with Expanded-SPLADE (ESPLADE) models, a specific instance of SPLADE models, and in-house web document titles are used as datasets. Pre-training, fine-tuning, and evaluation with optional test-time pruning of sparse vectors are conducted.
  Our observations are three-fold: First, fine-tuned models of higher retrieval effectiveness at both unpruned and most strict pruned settings are mostly pre-trained on a general corpus, and pre-trained with a higher learning rate, showing lower MLM accuracies. Second, in the most strict pruned setting, those models show higher-level retrieval cost and a higher variance in the length of the individual postings list. Third, the repetition of the general pre-training dataset does not have much effect on retrieval effectiveness. The experimentation empirically identifies the potential limitations for aligning MLM pre-training to ESPLADE fine-tuning. Also, the experimentation provides an empirical observation that, at most strict pruned settings, the retrieval effectiveness is better maintained by the higher-level retrieval cost, showing the trade-off relationship between the two in our setting.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了MLM预训练对ESPLADE（SPLADE变体）检索微调的影响，发现：在通用语料上以较高学习率预训练的模型（尽管MLM准确率较低）在未剪枝和严格剪枝设置下检索效果更好；严格剪枝下检索成本更高且倒排列表长度方差更大；通用预训练数据重复对效果影响不大。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明MLM预训练模型在微调为神经双编码器检索模型时存在准备不足和迁移学习问题，本文旨在系统探究不同预训练数据集和选项对检索微调效果的具体影响。
AI.method: 以ESPLADE模型为研究对象，使用网页文档标题作为数据集，进行预训练、微调及可选的测试时稀疏向量剪枝实验，对比不同预训练语料和超参数对检索效果的影响。
AI.result: 1) 通用语料+高学习率预训练的模型（MLM准确率较低）在未剪枝和严格剪枝下检索效果更好；2) 严格剪枝下检索成本更高、倒排列表长度方差更大；3) 预训练数据重复对检索效果影响不大；4) 严格剪枝下检索效果与检索成本存在权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 实证揭示了MLM预训练与ESPLADE微调之间的对齐问题，并指出在严格剪枝设置下检索效果与检索成本存在权衡关系。

title: Psychologically Potent, Computationally Invisible: LLMs Generate Social-Comparison Triggers They Fail to Detect
summary: We introduce Xiaohongshu Social Comparison Reader Elicitation (XHS-SCoRE), a reader-grounded benchmark for detecting if a text-only Xiaohongshu (RedNote) post elicits UPWARD, DOWNWARD, or NEUTRAL/no clear social comparison from a first-person reader perspective. The task targets a socially meaningful relational signal that is behaviorally real yet not reducible to sentiment. Across prompted LLM classifiers and supervised Chinese encoder baselines, we find a consistent mismatch between generation fluency and reliable detection ability: the signal is textually learnable in-domain, but not robustly accessible to prompt-based classification. Prompted LLM classifiers exhibit stable, interpretable failure modes, especially neutralization of comparison-triggering posts and model-specific directional skew. A controlled pilot further shows that LLM-generated Xiaohongshu-style posts can shift perceived standing and comparison-related affect even when prompt-based detection of the same construct remains fragile. XHS-SCoRE contributes both a benchmark for reader-grounded comparison detection and a diagnostic framework for studying when socially meaningful relational cues remain only partially visible to prompt-based inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了XHS-SCoRE基准，用于检测小红书帖子是否引发向上、向下或无社会比较。研究发现：虽然该信号在域内可学习，但基于提示的分类器难以稳健检测，存在中立化偏差和方向性倾斜。即使LLM生成内容能影响读者感知，提示检测仍脆弱。
AI.motivation: 社会比较是社交媒体上真实存在但无法简化为情感分析的行为信号，现有方法缺乏针对第一人称读者视角的社会比较检测基准。
AI.method: 构建XHS-SCoRE基准，包含三种社会比较标签（向上/向下/中性）；对比基于提示的LLM分类器与有监督中文编码器基线；进行受控实验评估LLM生成内容对读者感知的影响。
AI.result: 1) 域内有监督编码器表现良好，但基于提示的LLM分类器检测能力脆弱；2) 提示分类器存在稳定失败模式：中立化触发比较的帖子、模型特有方向性偏差；3) LLM生成内容可影响读者感知，但提示检测仍不可靠。
AI.conclusion: XHS-SCoRE为社会比较检测提供了基准和诊断框架，揭示出有社会意义的关系线索对基于提示的推理仅部分可见这一重要现象。

title: GAZE: Grounded Agentic Zero-shot Evaluation with Viewer-Level Tools and Literature Retrieval on Rare Brain MRI
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) read an image and produce text in a single forward pass, whereas radiologists typically inspect an image several times and consult the literature before writing a report. We introduce GAZE (Grounded Agentic Zero-shot Evaluation), a framework that lets a medical VLM work in this iterative way by calling viewer-level tools (zoom, windowing, contrast, edge detection) and two retrieval tools backed by the U.S. National Library of Medicine (PubMed for medical literature, Open-i for radiological images), with structured outputs validated against a schema and full tool-call traces recorded for auditability. On NOVA, a benchmark of 906 brain MRI cases covering 281 rare neurological conditions, GAZE reaches 58.2 mean average precision (mAP) at intersection-over-union (IoU) 0.3 for lesion localisation and 34.9% Top-1 diagnostic accuracy under a joint protocol that scores captioning, diagnosis, and localisation from the image alone, without task-specific fine-tuning. Before any tool is used, structured prompting and schema-validated outputs already improve over the published Gemini 2.0 Flash baseline (20.2 to 29.4 mAP@0.3), so framework design is itself an experimental variable. Tool use helps rare pathologies disproportionately: the fraction of cases with IoU > 0.3 rises from 17% to 58% for diagnoses with three or fewer examples versus 25% to 68% for common conditions ($\geq$10 cases), with gains tracking engagement (Gemini 3 Flash: Cohen's d = 0.79, 11.8 tool calls per case; Gemini 2.0 Flash: tools used in 8.2% of cases, no significant benefit). Retrieval ablations additionally reveal a model-dependent trade-off in which gains in diagnosis can coincide with losses in localisation, reinforcing the case for joint evaluation of diagnosis, localisation, and captioning in medical VLMs.

AI.tldr: GAZE框架让医疗VLM像放射科医生一样迭代使用工具（缩放、窗口、检索等），在无需微调的情况下，对罕见神经系统疾病的病灶定位mAP达58.2%，诊断准确率34.9%，且对罕见病提升显著（IoU>0.3从17%升至58%）。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM一次前向完成图像理解，而放射科医生需要多次查看图像并查阅文献；现有方法缺乏这种迭代式、工具辅助的推理能力。
AI.method: 提出GAZE框架，赋予医疗VLM调用多类工具的能力（缩放、窗宽窗位、对比度、边缘检测；PubMed文献检索、Open-i影像检索），输出由schema验证的结构化结果并记录完整工具调用轨迹。
AI.result: 在NOVA基准（906例脑MRI，281种罕见病）上，病灶定位mAP@0.3达58.2%，Top-1诊断准确率34.9%；工具使用前结构化提示已提升基线（20.2→29.4 mAP）；罕见病IoU>0.3从17%升至58%。
AI.conclusion: 工具使用对罕见病帮助更大；检索存在模型依赖的权衡（诊断提升可能伴随定位下降），需对诊断、定位、描述进行联合评估。

title: Probe-Geometry Alignment: Erasing the Cross-Sequence Memorization Signature Below Chance
summary: Recent attacks show that behavioural unlearning of large language models leaves internal traces recoverable by adversarial probes. We characterise where this retention lives and show it can be surgically removed without measurable capability cost. Our central protocol is a leave-one-out cross-sequence probe that tests whether a memorisation signature generalises across held-out sequences. The signature is real and consistent across scale: memorisation-specific gaps of +0.32, +0.19, +0.30 on Pythia-70M, GPT-2 medium, and Mistral-7B; on Pythia-70M, the random-initialisation control collapses to -0.04 at the deepest layer where the pretrained signature peaks. The probe direction is causally separable from recall -- projecting it out collapses the signature locally (+0.44 -> -0.19) while behavioural recall barely changes -- and a probe trained on naturally memorised content does not classify fine-tuning-injected secrets, marking two representationally distinct regimes. We then introduce probe-geometry alignment (PGA), a surgical erasure that aligns activations along the probe's live readout direction at each depth. PGA drives the cross-sequence probe below random chance at all four scales tested (toy depth-4: 0.17; Pythia-70M: 0.07; Mistral-7B: 0.45; GPT-2 medium: 0.06 via MD-PGA k=2) and remains robust to six adversarial probe variants. Against a re-fitting attacker who trains a fresh probe on PGA-treated activations, we extend PGA adversarially, defeating the re-fit probe at every memorisation-relevant depth while preserving five zero-shot capability benchmarks within 2.8 percentage points per task (mean Δacc = +0.2pp). The cross-sequence signature is a real, causally separable, regime-specific property of pretrained representations -- removable below chance with a single rank-one intervention per depth at no measurable capability cost.

AI.tldr: 本文发现大模型的行为遗忘会在内部留下可被探测的记忆痕迹，并提出了一种名为PGA（探针几何对齐）的手术级擦除方法，能在不损害模型能力的前提下将记忆信号降至随机水平以下。
AI.motivation: 现有行为级遗忘方法虽然表面上使模型不再输出记忆内容，但内部表征仍保留可被对抗探针恢复的记忆痕迹，需要从表征层面真正消除这些记忆。
AI.method: 提出留一法跨序列探针来检测记忆化签名，发现该签名是真实且一致的；进而提出探针几何对齐（PGA），通过在每层沿探针读出方向对齐激活值来手术式擦除记忆；并扩展到对抗性PGA以防御重新拟合攻击。
AI.result: PGA在四种规模（toy depth-4: 0.17; Pythia-70M: 0.07; Mistral-7B: 0.45; GPT-2 medium: 0.06）上将跨序列探针降至随机水平以下，对六种对抗探针变体保持鲁棒，且五个零样本能力基准平均变化仅+0.2个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 跨序列签名是预训练表征中真实、可因果分离且具有特定机制的性质，通过每层一次秩一干预即可在无能力损失的情况下将其移除到随机水平以下。

title: Efficient representations for team and imperfect-recall equilibrium computation
comment: Journal version. Combines and supersedes previous articles arXiv:2109.05284, arXiv:2202.00789, arXiv:2201.10377, and arXiv:2206.09161
summary: Equilibrium finding in two-player zero-sum games with perfect recall is a well-studied topic that has led to many breakthroughs in computational game theory. This paper aims to generalize such techniques to (timeable) two-player zero-sum games with imperfect recall, or equivalently to two-team zero-sum games. In this setting, the problem of computing a mixed-strategy Nash equilibrium (or, equivalently, a team maxmin equilibrium with correlation) is known to be NP-hard. We connect the imperfect-recall setting with its perfect-recall counterpart through a novel construction we call the belief game. This is a perfect-recall game equivalent to a given (timeable) two-player zero-sum game with imperfect recall. The belief game may be exponentially larger than the original game but can be solved using any standard method. We then show that the strategy spaces of the two players in the belief game can be directly represented as a DAG, leading to a possibly exponential speedup. We call this the team belief DAG (TB-DAG). The TB-DAG simultaneously enjoys essentially optimal parameterized complexity bounds and the advantages of efficient regret minimization techniques. Along the way, we show $Δ_2^P$-completeness and $Σ_2^P$-completeness of finding Nash equilibria in both mixed and behavioral strategies for the class of games we consider. Experimentally, we show that the TB-DAG, when paired with existing learning techniques, yields state-of-the-art performance on a wide variety of benchmark team games.

AI.tldr: 本文通过构造信念博弈（belief game）和团队信念DAG（TB-DAG），将完美回忆博弈中的均衡求解技术推广到不完美回忆（或双团队）的两人零和博弈，在理论上分析了参数化复杂度，并在实验上取得了最优性能。
AI.motivation: 完美回忆下两人零和博弈的均衡求解已有许多突破，但现实场景常涉及不完美回忆（或双团队博弈），而该问题已知是NP-hard的。本文旨在将成熟技术推广到这一更具挑战性的设定中。
AI.method: 提出信念博弈（belief game）构造，将不完美回忆博弈等价转化为完美回忆博弈（可能指数级增大）；进而利用策略空间可表示为DAG的特点，提出团队信念DAG（TB-DAG），实现指数级加速。同时给出了混合策略和行为策略下Nash均衡的复杂度完备性结果（Δ₂ᴾ-完备和Σ₂ᴾ-完备）。
AI.result: TB-DAG在参数化复杂度上达到最优，并能利用高效的遗憾最小化学习技术；在多种基准团队博弈任务上，结合现有学习方法达到了最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文为不完美回忆下的双人零和博弈（双团队博弈）提供了理论系统且实用的求解框架，在复杂度分析和实验表现上均具有优势。

title: RECAP: An End-to-End Platform for Capturing, Replaying, and Analyzing AI-Assisted Programming Interactions
summary: Understanding how developers interact with AI coding assistants requires more than chat logs or git histories in isolation; it requires reconstructing the full context: which prompt led to which edit, what the developer tried and discarded, and how their strategy evolved over time. We present RECAP (Replay and Examine Captured AI Programming), an open-source platform that (1) passively records AI chat sessions and fine-grained code edits inside VS Code without disrupting the developer's workflow, (2) merges them into a unified timeline for interactive session replay, and (3) exposes an extensible analysis layer, with example modules for behavioral classification and AI reliance measurement. Deployed in a university software engineering course, RECAP captured 2,034 prompts and 8,239 code edits from 41 students across a multi-week project. We demonstrate how the platform's linked data and replay capabilities enable analyses of developer-AI interaction patterns that no single data source could support.

AI.tldr: RECAP是一个开源平台，能在VS Code中被动记录AI聊天会话和细粒度代码编辑，合并为统一时间线进行交互式回放，并提供可扩展的分析层。在41名学生的课程中捕获了2,034个提示和8,239次代码编辑，展示了链接数据和回放能力如何支持单一数据源无法实现的分析。
AI.motivation: 理解开发者与AI编码助手的交互需要重构完整的上下文（哪个提示导致哪个编辑、开发者尝试和丢弃了什么、策略如何演变），而仅靠聊天日志或git历史无法提供这种全景视角。
AI.method: 开发了RECAP平台：(1)在VS Code中被动记录AI聊天会话和细粒度代码编辑，不干扰开发者工作流；(2)将数据合并为统一时间线，支持交互式会话回放；(3)提供可扩展的分析层，包含行为分类和AI依赖度测量等示例模块。
AI.result: 在大学的软件工程课程中部署，从41名学生的多周项目中捕获了2,034个提示和8,239次代码编辑。证明了该平台的链接数据和回放能力能支持单一数据源无法实现的分析。
AI.conclusion: RECAP通过统一记录和回放机制，为研究开发者-AI交互模式提供了更完整的数据基础，能够揭示从任何单一数据源（如仅聊天日志或仅git历史）中无法获得的交互洞察。

title: Intervention-Based Self-Supervised Learning: A Causal Probe Paradigm for Remote Photoplethysmography
summary: Remote Photoplethysmography (rPPG) enables convenient non-contact physiological measurement. Existing Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) methods commonly fall into a correlation trap: they tend to learn the most dominant periodic signals in the data, such as high-energy motion or illumination noise, rather than the faint, true rPPG signal, leading to poor model generalization. To address this, we propose a new SSL paradigm, Physiological Causal Probing (PCP), which treats the latent rPPG signal as the underlying physical source and the resulting pixel chrominance variations as its visual manifestation. Its core idea is to shift from passive correlation learning to active, precise intervention: it intervenes on the video based on a proposed rPPG hypothesis, and verifies whether the post-intervention changes match physical expectations. We propose the Interv-rPPG framework to implement PCP: an rPPG extractor named PhysMambaFormer hypothesizes the rPPG signal, while a Controllable Physiological Signal Editor conducts precise chrominance-domain interventions on videos based on this hypothesis. Interv-rPPG validates the physical realism of the hypothesis through `Falsifiability via Nulling' and `Axiomatic Equivariance'. Our editor achieves precise editing of the rPPG signal by intervening in the low-frequency chrominance components of the video. Our method improves both in-domain and cross-domain performance on challenging datasets such as VIPL-HR and MMPD. Furthermore, it surpasses the supervised baseline in complex cross-dataset settings, while remaining competitive on clean datasets where the intervention mechanism may introduce slight residual chrominance noise. Extensive experiments, including diagnostic analysis of nuisance sensitivity, demonstrate that the PCP paradigm effectively resists motion and illumination artifacts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出生理因果探针（PCP）自监督学习范式，通过主动干预视频的色度分量来验证rPPG假设的物理真实性，而非被动关联学习，从而避免模型陷入运动或光照噪声的"相关陷阱"。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督rPPG方法容易学到数据中最强的周期性信号（如运动、光照噪声），而非微弱的真实rPPG信号，导致模型泛化能力差。
AI.method: 提出PCP范式，核心是从被动关联学习转向主动干预验证。具体框架Interv-rPPG包含：PhysMambaFormer（rPPG信号提取器）和可控生理信号编辑器（基于rPPG假设对视频低频色度分量进行精确干预），通过"归零可证伪性"和"公理等变性"验证假设的物理真实性。
AI.result: 在VIPL-HR和MMPD等挑战性数据集上，域内和跨域性能均有提升；在复杂跨数据集设定下超越有监督基线；在干净数据集上因干预机制可能引入轻微残留色度噪声，竞争力相当。
AI.conclusion: PCP范式能有效抵抗运动和光照伪影，为自监督rPPG学习提供了新的因果干预视角。

title: Effect-Transparent Governance for AI Workflow Architectures: Semantic Preservation, Expressive Minimality, and Decidability Boundaries
summary: We present a machine-checked formalization of structurally governed AI workflow architectures and prove that effect-level governance can be imposed without reducing internal computational expressivity. Using Interaction Trees in Rocq 8.19, we define a governance operator G that mediates all effectful directives, including memory access, external calls, and oracle (LLM) queries. Our development compiles with 0 admitted lemmas and consists of 36 modules, ~12,000 lines of Rocq, and 454 theorems. We establishseven properties: (P1) governed Turing completeness, (P2) governed oracle expressivity, (P3) a decidability boundary in which governance predicates are total and closed under Boolean composition while semantic program properties remain non-trivial and undecidable by governance, (P4) goal preservation for permitted executions, (P5) expressive minimality of primitive capabilities (compute, memory, reasoning, external call, observability), (P6) subsumption asymmetry showing structural governance strictly subsumes content-level filtering, and (P7) semantic transparency: on all executions where governance permits, the governed interpretation is observationally equivalent (modulo governance-only events) to the ungoverned interpretation. Together, these results show that governance and computational expressivity are orthogonal dimensions: governance constrains the effect boundary of programs while remaining semantically transparent to internal computation.

AI.tldr: 本文通过Rocq 8.19的形式化验证（36个模块，~12,000行代码，454个定理，零 admitted lemmas），证明了一种基于Interaction Trees的结构化AI工作流治理架构，该架构在效果层面施加治理约束的同时，不降低内部计算表达能力。论文建立了七个核心性质，证明治理与计算表达性是正交维度。
AI.motivation: 当前AI工作流架构（尤其是涉及LLM调用的系统）缺乏形式化保证：治理机制是否真的只约束行为边界而不影响内部计算能力？现有方法多为非形式化的内容过滤或运行时监控，缺乏数学保证。作者试图从理论上严格回答"治理能否在不牺牲计算表达能力的前提下实现"这一核心问题。
AI.method: 基于Interaction Trees（ITrees）在Rocq 8.19中定义治理算子G，它中介所有效果指令（内存访问、外部调用、LLM查询）。采用形式化证明方法，通过36个模块、454个定理建立了七项性质的形式化证据。治理与计算分别作用于不同层面：治理约束效果边界，计算保持内部语义不变。
AI.result: 建立了七项核心性质：(P1) 治理下的图灵完备性；(P2) 治理下的oracle表达能力；(P3) 可判定性边界（治理谓词全且对布尔运算封闭，但语义属性不可判定）；(P4) 目标保持性；(P5) 原始能力的表达最小性；(P6) 结构治理严格优于内容过滤；(P7) 语义透明性（治理与无治理在观测上等价）。
AI.conclusion: 治理与计算表达力是正交的：治理可以约束程序的效果边界，同时保持内部计算的语义透明。这为AI工作流安全的形式化保障提供了理论基础，表明我们可以安全地施加治理而不必担心抑制系统的表达能力和功能正确性。

title: Interactive Multi-Turn Retrieval for Health Videos
summary: The growing availability of health-related instructional videos creates new opportunities for clinical training, patient rehabilitation, and health education, yet existing retrieval systems remain largely single-turn: a user submits one query and receives one ranked list. This interaction is brittle in health scenarios, where information needs are often vague at first and become clinically meaningful only after follow-up constraints such as posture, hand placement, contraindications, equipment, or patient condition are specified. We introduce interactive multi-turn semantic retrieval for health videos and construct MHVRC, a Multi-Turn Health Video Retrieval Corpus, by combining video-grounded descriptions from VideoChat-Flash with query refinements generated by DeepSeek. We further propose DATR, a Dialogue-Aware Two-Stage Retrieval framework. DATR first performs efficient coarse retrieval with a CLIP-style dual encoder and sparse frame sampling, then re-ranks the top candidates through multi-turn query fusion and a lightweight cross-encoder scoring module. Experiments on MHVRC show consistent gains over strong text-video retrieval baselines, while user studies indicate that refined multi-turn queries better capture fine-grained procedural semantics than single-turn annotations. The work establishes a benchmark and a scalable technical recipe for interactive health video retrieval.

AI.tldr: 本文提出面向健康教学视频的交互式多轮语义检索任务，构建了多轮健康视频检索语料库MHVRC，并设计了对话感知的两阶段检索框架DATR，实验证明其优于现有单轮检索方法。
AI.motivation: 现有健康视频检索系统多为单轮交互，而健康场景中用户需求往往初始模糊、需经多轮追问（如姿势、禁忌症、设备等）才能明确，因此需要支持多轮对话式的检索机制。
AI.method: (1) 构建MHVRC语料库：结合VideoChat-Flash的视频描述和DeepSeek生成的查询细化；(2) 提出DATR框架：第一阶段用CLIP双编码器+稀疏帧采样做粗检索，第二阶段通过多轮查询融合和轻量级交叉编码器进行重排序。
AI.result: 在MHVRC上的实验表明，DATR在多个强文本-视频检索基线上取得一致提升；用户研究显示多轮细化查询比单轮标注能更好捕捉细粒度程序语义。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为交互式健康视频检索建立了基准测试和可扩展的技术方案，证实了多轮交互在健康视频检索中的有效性。

title: A Theoretical Game of Attacks via Compositional Skills
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2505.20841
summary: As large language models grow increasingly capable, concerns about their safe deployment have intensified. While numerous alignment strategies aim to restrict harmful behavior, these defenses can still be circumvented through carefully designed adversarial prompts. In this work, we introduce a theoretical framework that formalizes a game between an attacker and a defender. Within this framework, we design a theoretical best-response attack strategy and show that it is closely related to many existing adversarial prompting methods. We further analyze the resulting game, characterize its equilibria, and reveal inherent advantages for the attacker. Drawing on our theoretical analysis, we also derive a provably optimal defense strategy. Empirically, we evaluate a practical instantiation of the theoretically optimal attack and observe stronger performance relative to existing adversarial prompting approaches in diverse settings encompassing different LLMs and benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个形式化攻击者与防御者博弈的理论框架，设计了理论最优攻击策略（与现有对抗性提示方法密切相关），分析了博弈均衡并揭示了攻击者的固有优势，同时推导了可证明最优的防御策略。实验表明，理论最优攻击的实践版本在多种LLM和基准测试中优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型的对齐策略旨在限制有害行为，但这些防御仍可通过精心设计的对抗性提示被绕过。现有方法缺乏统一的理论框架来理解攻击与防御的博弈关系。
AI.method: 形式化定义了攻击者与防御者的博弈框架；设计理论最优攻击策略，并与现有对抗性提示方法建立联系；分析博弈均衡，刻画攻击者的固有优势；基于理论分析推导可证明最优的防御策略。
AI.result: 理论最优攻击的实践实现在多种LLM和基准测试中展现出比现有对抗性提示方法更强的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解LLM安全中的攻防博弈提供了理论基石，揭示了攻击者的结构性优势，并提供了可证明最优的防御策略。

title: StyleShield: Exposing the Fragility of AIGC Detectors through Continuous Controllable Style Transfer
comment: 12 pages, 5 figures. Code and model weights will be released upon acceptance
summary: AI-generated content (AIGC) detectors are increasingly deployed in high-stakes settings such as academic integrity screening, yet their reliability rests on a fundamental paradox: as language models are trained on human-written corpora, the statistical boundary between AI and human writing will inevitably dissolve as models improve. Commercial incentives have further distorted this landscape -- detection services and "de-AIification" tools often operate within the same supply chain, replacing evaluation of content quality with judgment of content origin. We present StyleShield, the first flow matching framework for conditional text style transfer, operating directly in continuous token embedding space via a DiT backbone with zero-initialized cross-attention adapters conditioned on frozen Qwen-7B representations. At inference, we adapt the SDEdit paradigm from image synthesis to text embeddings, with a single parameter gamma providing smooth continuous control over the evasion-preservation trade-off. On a multi-domain Chinese benchmark, StyleShield achieves 94.6% evasion against the training detector and >=99% against three unseen detectors, maintaining 0.928 semantic similarity. We further introduce RateAudit, a document-level scheduling algorithm that demonstrates detection-rate verdicts can be set to arbitrary values, directly questioning the reliability of score-based evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了AIGC检测的根本悖论（随着语言模型进步，AI与人类写作的统计边界必然消失），并提出StyleShield——首个基于流匹配的条件文本风格迁移框架，通过连续token嵌入空间中的DiT骨干和零初始化交叉注意力适配器，实现对AI生成文本的高效规避（94.6%逃逸率，99%跨检测器逃逸率，0.928语义相似度）。同时提出RateAudit算法，证明检测分数可被任意操纵，质疑了基于分数的评估可靠性。
AI.motivation: AIGC检测器在高风险场景（如学术诚信筛查）中广泛应用，但其可靠性存在根本性悖论：随着语言模型在人类语料上训练，AI与人类写作的统计边界必然消失。同时，商业激励扭曲了检测生态——检测服务和"去AI化"工具常在同一供应链中运作，用内容来源判断替代了内容质量评估。
AI.method: 提出StyleShield框架，这是首个基于流匹配的条件文本风格迁移方法。核心创新包括：(1) 在连续token嵌入空间操作，使用DiT（Diffusion Transformer）骨干网络；(2) 零初始化交叉注意力适配器，以冻结的Qwen-7B表示为条件；(3) 推理阶段借鉴图像合成中的SDEdit范式到文本嵌入，通过单一参数gamma平滑控制规避与保留的权衡。
AI.result: 在多领域中文基准上，StyleShield对训练检测器实现94.6%逃逸率，对三个未见检测器实现≥99%逃逸率，同时保持0.928的语义相似度。提出的RateAudit算法证明检测分数判决可被设为任意值，直接质疑了基于分数的评估可靠性。
AI.conclusion: AIGC检测的可靠性从根本上受到质疑：一方面，检测与规避技术形成军备竞赛；另一方面，检测分数本身可被任意操纵。研究呼吁回归对内容质量的评估，而非对内容来源的判断。

title: Training Non-Differentiable Networks via Optimal Transport
comment: 52 pages, 20 tables, 9 figures, submitted to Transactions on Machine Learning Research
summary:
Neural networks increasingly embed non-differentiable components (spiking neurons, quantized layers, discrete routing, blackbox simulators, etc.) where backpropagation is inapplicable and surrogate gradients introduce bias. We present PolyStep, a gradient-free optimizer that updates parameters using only forward passes. Each step evaluates the loss at structured polytope vertices in a compressed subspace, computes softmax-weighted assignments over the resulting cost matrix, and displaces particles toward low-cost vertices via barycentric projection. This update corresponds to the one-sided limit of a regularized optimal-transport problem, inheriting its geometric structure without Sinkhorn iterations.
  PolyStep trains genuinely non-differentiable models where existing gradient-free methods collapse to near-random accuracy. On hard-LIF spiking networks we reach 93.4% test accuracy, outperforming all gradient-free baselines by over 60~pp and closing to within 4.4~pp of a surrogate-gradient Adam ceiling. Across four additional non-differentiable architectures (int8 quantization, argmax attention, staircase activations, hard MoE routing) we lead every gradient-free competitor. On MAX-SAT scaling from 100 to 1M variables, we sustain above 92% clause satisfaction while evolution strategies drop 8--12~pp. On RL policy search, we match OpenAI-ES on classical control and retain performance under integer and binary quantization that collapses gradient-based methods. We prove convergence to conservative-stationary points at rate $O(\log T/\sqrt{T})$ on piecewise-smooth losses, upgraded to Clarke-stationary on the headline architectures and extended to the piecewise-constant regime via a hitting-time bound. These rates match the known zeroth-order query-complexity lower bounds that all forward-only methods inherit. Code is available at https://github.com/anindex/polystep.

AI.tldr: PolyStep是一种仅使用前向传播的梯度自由优化器，通过结构化多面体顶点采样和软最大加权投影更新参数，在多种不可微架构上显著优于现有梯度自由方法，并理论证明了收敛率。
AI.motivation: 神经网络中越来越多地包含不可微组件（如脉冲神经元、量化层、离散路由等），反向传播无法适用，而代理梯度存在偏差。现有梯度自由方法在这些场景下表现极差（接近随机精度），需要一种高效的前向传播优化方法。
AI.method: PolyStep在压缩子空间中构建结构化多面体顶点，通过前向传播计算损失矩阵，再用softmax加权分配和重心投影将粒子向低损失顶点移动。该更新等价于正则化最优传输问题的单边极限，无需Sinkhorn迭代。
AI.result: 在硬LIF脉冲网络达到93.4%测试精度，领先梯度自由基线60+个百分点，接近代理梯度Adam方法（差距4.4pp）。在int8量化、argmax注意力、阶梯激活、硬MoE路由等四种不可微架构上全面领先。MAX-SAT达92%以上子句满足率。RL策略搜索匹配OpenAI-ES性能，量化场景下远超梯度方法。
AI.conclusion: PolyStep在分段光滑损失上以$O(\log T/\sqrt{T})$速率收敛到保守平稳点，在关键架构上提升到Clarke平稳点，并扩展到分段常数情形。该速率匹配前向传播方法的零阶查询复杂度下界。

title: Networked Information Aggregation for Binary Classification
comment: Accepted to the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary:
We study networked binary classification on a directed acyclic graph (DAG) where each agent observes only a subset of the feature columns of a shared dataset. Agents act sequentially along the DAG: each receives prediction columns from its parents (if any), augments its local features with these columns, fits a logistic predictor by minimizing binary cross-entropy (BCE), and forwards its prediction column to its outgoing neighbors. We ask whether this sequential distributed training procedure achieves information aggregation, meaning that some agent attains small excess loss compared to the best logistic predictor trained with access to all feature columns.
  This question was studied for linear regression under squared loss by Kearns, Roth, and Ryu (SODA 2026). Extending their guarantees to classification is nontrivial because their analysis relies on quadratic structure that does not directly transfer to BCE with a logistic link. We analyze the resulting sequential logit-passing protocol and prove: (i) an excess loss upper bound of $O(M/\sqrt{D})$ on depth-$D$ paths under the condition that every $M$ contiguous subsequence of $M$ agents collectively observe all features, and (ii) a close lower bound showing instances with excess loss of at least $Ω(k/D)$ where $k$ is the dimension of the feature space. Together, these results identify network depth as a fundamental bottleneck for information aggregation in networked logistic regression.

AI.tldr: 本文研究有向无环图上的网络化二分类问题，每个智能体仅观察共享数据集的部分特征列，通过顺序传递预测列来训练逻辑回归模型。作者证明了在深度为D的路径上，超额损失的上界为O(M/√D)，下界为Ω(k/D)，揭示了网络深度是信息聚合的基本瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 将Kearns等人（SODA 2026）在平方损失下线性回归的信息聚合保证扩展到分类任务，因为其分析依赖于平方结构，无法直接迁移到带逻辑链接的二元交叉熵（BCE）损失上。
AI.method: 提出顺序logit传递协议：智能体沿DAG顺序行动，接收父节点预测列，结合本地特征拟合逻辑回归，然后向前传递预测列。通过理论分析证明上界和下界。
AI.result: (i) 在每M个连续智能体共同观察到所有特征的条件下，深度D路径的超额损失上界为O(M/√D)；(ii) 下界为Ω(k/D)，其中k是特征空间维度。
AI.conclusion: 网络深度是网络化逻辑回归中信息聚合的基本瓶颈，深度越大聚合效果越差。

title: A Domain-Driven Design Simulator for Business Logic-Rich Microservice Systems
summary:
Developing business-logic-rich microservices requires navigating complex trade-offs between data consistency and distributed coordination. Although patterns like Sagas and Transactional Causal Consistency (TCC) provide mechanisms to manage distributed state, validating their behavior before production is challenging. Current architectural simulators prioritize network metrics over domain semantics, whereas industry frameworks demand full-scale infrastructure deployments, preventing early architectural experimentation.
  To bridge this gap, we introduce a \textit{Domain-Driven Design} (DDD) microservice simulator that isolates core business logic from communication and transactional infrastructure. By modeling microservice systems around aggregates, the simulator allows developers to evaluate identical application code under varying consistency guarantees and network constraints. It features support for multiple transactional models (Sagas, TCC) and seamless transitions across diverse deployment topologies, ranging from centralized execution to fully distributed environments.
  We validate the simulator through the implementation and rigorous concurrency testing of a complex, multi-aggregate microservice system. Through empirical benchmarks, we quantify the performance, coordination overhead, and resilience of different transactional models across localized and distributed execution environments. The findings confirm that the simulator minimizes developer effort while providing a powerful, deterministic environment for the shift-left validation and optimization of business logic implementation in microservice architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于领域驱动设计（DDD）的微服务模拟器，允许开发者在不同一致性模型和网络条件下，对相同的业务逻辑代码进行早期验证和优化，而无需部署完整的基础设施。
AI.motivation: 现有的微服务架构仿真工具要么只关注网络指标而忽略领域语义，要么需要完整的生产环境部署，导致无法在早期阶段对业务逻辑进行实验和验证。
AI.method: 基于领域驱动设计（DDD）构建微服务模拟器，围绕聚合（aggregates）对系统建模，将核心业务逻辑与通信和事务基础设施解耦；支持Sagas和TCC等多种事务模型，并允许在集中式到完全分布式等多种部署拓扑间无缝切换。
AI.result: 通过一个复杂多聚合微服务系统的实现和并发测试进行验证，通过经验基准测试量化了不同事务模型在性能、协调开销和弹性方面的差异。结果表明该模拟器能够最小化开发者工作量，同时为微服务业务逻辑的"左移"验证和优化提供强大、确定性的环境。
AI.conclusion: 该模拟器填补了早期架构实验与生产部署之间的鸿沟，为微服务系统中业务逻辑的早期验证和优化提供了有效工具。

title: Towards High Fidelity Face Swapping: A Comprehensive Survey and New Benchmark
summary: Face swapping has witnessed significant progress in recent years, largely driven by advances in deep generative models such as GANs and diffusion models.Despite these advances, existing methods remain fragmented across different paradigms, and their evaluation is highly inconsistent due to the lack of standardized datasets and protocols. Moreover, prior surveys primarily focus on broader deepfake generation or detection, leaving face swapping insufficiently studied as a standalone problem. In this paper, we present a comprehensive survey and benchmark for face swapping. We provide a structured review of existing methods, organizing them into five major paradigms and systematically analyzing their design principles, strengths, and limitations. To enable fair and controlled evaluation, we introduce CASIA FaceSwapping, a high-quality benchmark with balanced demographic distributions and explicit attribute variations, and establish standardized protocols to assess the robustness of different face swapping methods. Extensive experiments on representative approaches yield new insights into the performance characteristics and limitations of current techniques. Overall, our work provides a unified perspective and a principled evaluation framework to facilitate the development of more robust and controllable face swapping methods. More results can be found at https://github.com/CASIA-NLPRAI/face-swapping-survey.

AI.tldr: 本文对换脸技术进行了全面综述与基准测试，将现有方法归纳为五大范式，并引入标准化数据集CASIA FaceSwapping和评估协议，通过大量实验揭示了当前技术的性能特征与局限。
AI.motivation: 现有换脸方法分散在不同范式下，缺乏标准化数据集和协议导致评估不一致，且以往综述多聚焦于广义深度伪造生成或检测，对换脸这一独立问题的研究不够充分。
AI.method: 构建结构化综述，将换脸方法按五大范式分类并系统分析设计原理与优劣；引入CASIA FaceSwapping高质量基准数据集，包含均衡人口分布和显式属性变化；建立标准化评估协议；对代表性方法进行大规模实验。
AI.result: 通过实验获得对现有换脸技术性能特征和局限性的新见解，验证了标准化评估框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提供了统一视角和原则性评估框架，有助于推动更鲁棒、更可控的换脸方法发展。

title: Algebraic Semantics of Governed Execution: Monoidal Categories, Effect Algebras, and Coterminous Boundaries
comment: 26 pages, 1 figure, 1 table. Companion proofs: https://github.com/mashin-live/governance-proofs. Project: https://mashin.live
summary: We present an algebraic semantics for governed execution in which governance is axiomatized, compositional, and coterminous with expressibility. The framework, mechanized in 32 Rocq modules (~12,000 lines, 454 theorems, 0 admitted), is built on interaction trees and parameterized coinduction. A three-axiom GovernanceAlgebra record (safety, transparency, properness) induces a symmetric monoidal category with verified pentagon, triangle, and hexagon coherence, where every tensor composition preserves governance. An algebraic effect system constrains the handler algebra so that only governance-preserving handlers can be constructed in the safe fragment; programs in the empty capability set provably emit only observability directives. Capability-indexed composition bundles programs with machine-checked capability bounds, and a dual guarantee theorem establishes that within_caps and gov_safe hold simultaneously under all composition operators. The capstone result is the coterminous boundary: within our formal model, every program expressible via the four primitive morphism constructors is governed under interpretation, and every governed program is the image of such a program. Turing completeness is preserved inside governance; unmediated I/O is excluded from the governed fragment. Governance denial is modeled as safe coinductive divergence. The governance algebra is parametric: any system instantiating the three axioms inherits all derived properties, including convergence, compositional closure, and goal preservation. Extracted OCaml runs as a NIF in the BEAM runtime, with property-based testing (70,000+ random inputs, zero disagreements) confirming behavioral equivalence between the specification and the runtime interpreter.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于代数的治理执行语义（Governance Algebra），通过三条公理（安全性、透明性、适切性）构建对称幺半范畴，实现可组合、可表达、可机器验证的治理框架。在Rocq中机械化实现（32个模块，~12,000行，454个定理，0 admitted），并在BEAM运行时上通过OCaml提取和属性测试验证。
AI.motivation: 现有执行治理机制缺乏形式化、组合化、且与表达能力共终的代数语义框架，难以在保持图灵完备性的同时保证治理边界内程序的可证明安全性。
AI.method: 1. 定义GovernanceAlgebra记录（三条公理：安全性、透明性、适切性），诱导对称幺半范畴（验证五边形、三角形、六边形协调性）。2. 代数效应系统约束handler代数，仅允许治理保持的handler。3. 能力索引组合（capability-indexed composition）提供机器检验的能力边界。4. 机械化实现于Rocq（32模块），提取OCaml为BEAM NIF。
AI.result: 1. 共终边界定理：可表达程序 ⇔ 被治理程序。2. 双重保证定理：within_caps与gov_safe在所有组合算子下同时成立。3. 图灵完备性在治理内保持；未中介I/O被排除。4. 属性测试（70,000+随机输入，零分歧）验证规范与运行时解释器行为等价。
AI.conclusion: 治理代数是参数化的：任何实例化三条公理的系统继承所有导出性质（收敛性、组合封闭性、目标保持性）。治理拒绝被建模为安全的余归纳发散。该框架为可验证的受治理执行提供了通用代数基础。

title: Post-hoc Provider Fairness Adaptation via Hierarchical Exposure Alignment
summary: Provider exposure fairness is crucial for sustaining a healthy content ecosystem and preventing monopolization in recommender systems. Yet, most existing methods either incorporate fairness constraints during model training, requiring expensive retraining when fairness objectives change, or rely on post-hoc reranking with fixed criteria, which lacks adaptability to diverse fairness requirements. To overcome these limitations, we propose Post-hoc Fairness Adaptation (PFA), a lightweight framework that equips a frozen recommender with a fairness adapter, enabling flexible fairness control without retraining the backbone model. Specifically, the fairness adapter learns personalized additive score adjustments from user-item embeddings, which are injected into the original ranking scores to steer provider exposure toward fairness. To train the adapter, we minimize the KL divergence between the actual and the target fair exposure distributions. However, this global objective implicitly treats all providers equally, ignoring structural disparities such as imbalanced provider group sizes and heterogeneous exposure within groups. Consequently, fairness may appear satisfied at an aggregate level while severe inter-group and intra-group exposure imbalances persist, undermining practical fairness. To address this, we design Hierarchical Exposure Fairness Alignment (HEFA), which explicitly balances inter- and intra-group provider exposure disparities, enabling flexible adaptation to diverse fairness requirements. To mitigate potential accuracy degradation, PFA jointly optimizes HEFA with a differentiable NDCG loss, enabling end-to-end fairness optimization while preserving ranking quality. Extensive experiments on three public datasets demonstrate that PFA achieves substantial fairness gains with negligible accuracy loss, consistently outperforming strong baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出Post-hoc Fairness Adaptation (PFA)框架，通过轻量级公平适配器实现对预训练推荐系统灵活的后处理公平性控制，并设计Hierarchical Exposure Fairness Alignment (HEFA)以平衡组间和组内的曝光差异，在保持排序质量的同时显著提升公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统公平性方法要么需要昂贵的模型重训练，要么依赖固定标准的后处理重排序，缺乏对不同公平性需求的灵活适应性。
AI.method: 提出PFA框架，在冻结的推荐模型上附加公平适配器学习个性化分数调整；设计HEFA同时优化组间和组内曝光差异；联合优化HEFA与可微分NDCG损失以保持排序质量。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上，PFA实现了显著的公平性提升，且准确率损失可忽略不计，持续优于强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: PFA框架为推荐系统公平性提供了一种灵活、高效且无需重训练的后处理方案，HEFA有效解决了聚合级公平性掩盖组间/组内失衡的问题。

title: Compared to What? Baselines and Metrics for Counterfactual Prompting
summary: Counterfactual prompting (i.e., perturbing a single factor and measuring output change) is widely used to evaluate things like LLM bias and CoT faithfulness. But in this work we argue that observed effects cannot be attributed to the targeted factor without accounting for baseline ``meaning-preserving'' modifications to text that establish general model sensitivity. This is because every counterfactual edit is a compound treatment that bundles the variable of interest with incidental surface-form variation; this violates treatment variation irrelevance. We observe prediction flip rates on MedQA of 14.9% when we surgically change patient gender. However, this is statistically indistinguishable from the flip rates induced by simply paraphrasing inputs (14.1%). In this case, it would therefore be unwarranted to conclude that the LLM is especially sensitive to patient gender. To account for this and robustly measure the effects of targeted interventions, we propose a framework in which we compare (via statistical testing) differences observed under target interventions to those induced by paraphrasing inputs. We then use this framework to revisit a analysis done on the MedPerturb dataset, which reported evidence of model sensitivity to patient demographics and stylistic cues. We find that these effects largely dissipate when we account for general model sensitivity, with only 5 of 120 tests reaching statistical significance. Applying the same framework to occupational biography classification, we detect clearly significant directional gender bias, showing that the framework identifies real directional effects even when they are small. We evaluate a range of metrics -- aggregate, per-sample distributional, and regression -- and find that per-sample metrics are dramatically more powerful than aggregate metrics and regression powerfully and uniquely characterizes effect direction and magnitude.

AI.tldr: 本文指出，反事实提示（如改变患者性别）导致的预测变化与简单改写输入导致的预测变化在统计上无显著差异（14.9% vs 14.1%），因此不能归因于目标因素。作者提出通过统计检验比较目标干预与改写基线的框架，发现先前分析中报告的模型对人口统计特征的敏感效应大多不显著，而该方法能有效检测出真正的方向性偏见。
AI.motivation: 反事实提示被广泛用于评估LLM偏见和思维链忠实性，但每种反事实编辑都是复合处理，将目标变量与偶然的表面形式变化捆绑在一起，违反了"处理变异无关性"原则。因此，有必要建立基线来区分真正的因果效应与一般的模型敏感性。
AI.method: 提出一个统计检验框架：将目标干预（如改变性别）引起的预测变化与简单改写输入引起的预测变化进行比较，通过统计检验判断差异是否显著。评估了聚合指标、逐样本分布指标和回归指标等多种度量方式。
AI.result: 在MedPerturb数据集的120项测试中，仅5项达到统计显著性（原本报告的敏感效应大多消散）。但应用于职业传记分类时，该方法成功检测到了清晰显著的方向性性别偏见。逐样本指标比聚合指标更具统计功效，回归指标能独特地表征效应方向和大小。
AI.conclusion: 使用反事实提示评估LLM时必须考虑基线模型敏感性，否则结论可能不可靠。提出的框架能有效区分真正的因果效应与一般敏感性，为更可靠的LLM评估提供了方法学基础。

title: Linking spatial biology and clinical histology via Haiku
summary: Integrating molecular, morphological, and clinical data is essential for basic and translational biomedical research, yet systematic frameworks for jointly modeling these modalities remain limited. Here we present Haiku, a tri-modal contrastive learning model trained on multiplexed immunofluorescence (mIF). It comprises 26.7 million spatial proteomics patches from 3,218 tissue sections across 1,606 patients spanning 11 organ types, with matched hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) histology and clinical metadata aligned in a shared embedding space. Haiku enables three-way cross-modal retrieval, improves downstream classification and clinical prediction tasks over unimodal baselines, and supports zero-shot biomarker inference through fusion retrieval conditioned on clinical metadata-only text descriptions. Across tasks, Haiku outperforms competing approaches, achieving cross-modal retrieval (Recall@50 up to 0.611 versus near-zero baseline), survival prediction (C-index 0.737, +7.91% relative improvement), and zero-shot biomarker inference (mean Pearson correlation 0.718 across 52 biomarkers). Furthermore, we introduce a counterfactual prediction framework in which modifying only clinical metadata while fixing tissue morphology surfaces niche-specific molecular shifts associated with breast cancer stage progression and lung cancer survival outcomes. In a lung adenocarcinoma case study, the counterfactual analysis recovers niche-specific shifts characterized by increased CD8 and granzyme B, reduced PD-L1, and decreased Ki67, broadly consistent with patterns reported for favorable outcomes. We present these counterfactual results as exploratory, hypothesis-generating signals rather than mechanistic claims. These capabilities demonstrate that tri-modal alignment via Haiku enables integrative analysis of spatial biology, bridging molecular measurements with clinical context for biological exploration.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Haiku，一个基于三重模态对比学习的模型，整合了空间蛋白质组学（mIF）、组织学（H&E）和临床元数据，实现跨模态检索、下游任务提升及零样本生物标志物推断。
AI.motivation: 分子、形态学和临床数据的联合建模缺乏系统框架，现有方法多限于单模态或双模态，难以全面整合多模态信息用于生物医学研究。
AI.method: 构建三重模态对比学习模型Haiku，使用2670万空间蛋白质组学 patches（来自1606名患者的3218张切片），将mIF、H&E和临床元数据对齐到共享嵌入空间，并引入反事实预测框架。
AI.result: 跨模态检索Recall@50达0.611（基线近零），生存预测C-index 0.737（相对提升7.91%），零样本生物标志物推断平均Pearson相关系数0.718。
AI.conclusion: 三重模态对齐通过Haiku实现了空间生物学的整合分析，桥接分子测量与临床背景，为生物探索提供新工具。

title: Combining Trained Models in Reinforcement Learning
comment: 6 pages, 2 figures, 3 tables; Literature Review, Hochschule Bonn-Rhein-Sieg
summary:
Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) has delivered strong results in domains such as Atari and Go, but it still suffers from high sample cost and weak transfer beyond the training setting. A common response is to reuse information from previously trained models through transfer, distillation, ensemble methods, or federated training instead of learning each target task from random initialization. The literature on these mechanisms is fragmented, and published comparisons are hard to interpret because tasks, baselines, and compute budgets differ.
  This paper presents a PRISMA-guided systematic review of empirical studies on pretrained knowledge reuse in DRL. Starting from 589 records retrieved from IEEE Xplore, the ACM Digital Library, and citation tracing, we screened 570 unique records and assessed 89 full texts. After applying the final eligibility criteria, 15 empirical studies remained in the main synthesis. We analyzed them qualitatively across three factors: source-target similarity, diversity among reused models, and the fairness of comparisons against from-scratch baselines.
  Three patterns recur across the surviving corpus. First, positive results are concentrated in settings where source and target tasks share substantial structure or where the method includes an explicit gating or alignment mechanism. Second, evidence for ensembles and federated aggregation is promising but sparse and mostly limited to narrow settings. Third, compute-matched comparisons are rare, which weakens claims about efficiency gains over stronger single-agent baselines. The paper contributes a narrower and internally consistent review scope, a study-level synthesis of empirical evidence, and a provisional independence spectrum that should be treated as a hypothesis for future benchmarking rather than a validated metric.

AI.tldr: 本文对深度强化学习中预训练知识复用（迁移、蒸馏、集成、联邦训练）的实证研究进行了PRISMA系统性综述，从589篇文献筛选出15篇核心研究，发现知识复用在源-目标任务结构相似时有效，集成与联邦方法有潜力但证据有限，且计算量公平对比极少。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习在样本效率和迁移泛化方面存在不足，现有知识复用研究碎片化且难以比较，缺乏系统性综述来整合证据。
AI.method: 采用PRISMA指南进行系统综述：从IEEE Xplore、ACM数字图书馆检索589条记录，筛选570条唯一记录，评估89篇全文，最终纳入15篇实证研究，从源-目标任务相似性、复用模型多样性、与从头训练基线对比的公平性三个维度进行定性分析。
AI.result: 发现三个模式：（1）正向结果集中在源-目标任务结构高度相似或有显式门控/对齐机制的设置；（2）集成与联邦聚合方法有前景但证据稀疏且局限于狭窄场景；（3）计算量匹配的对比极其罕见，削弱了效率提升的可信度。
AI.conclusion: 贡献了范围一致的系统综述、实证证据的综合分析，以及一个暂定的独立性频谱（需作为假设而非验证指标用于未来基准测试）。

title: The Productivity-Reliability Paradox: Specification-Driven Governance for AI-Augmented Software Development
summary: Since 2022, AI-powered coding assistants have produced contradictory evidence: controlled studies report 20-56% productivity gains on well-scoped tasks, while the most rigorous RCT documents a 19% slowdown for experienced developers, and telemetry across 10,000+ developers shows 98% more pull requests but 91% longer review times with flat delivery metrics. This paper argues these findings constitute the Productivity-Reliability Paradox (PRP): a systematic phenomenon emerging from non-deterministic code generators and insufficient specification discipline. Through a multivocal literature review of 67 sources (2022-2026), this paper: (1) formally defines the PRP with three moderating variables (task abstraction, codebase maturity, developer experience) and two amplifying mechanisms (code review bottleneck, context window constraint); (2) proposes the AI-Augmented Methodology Taxonomy (AAMT), classifying six methodologies under three AI integration tiers; (3) introduces the Specification Governance Model (SGM), grounded in Transaction Cost Economics, with a practical governance decision guide; and (4) evaluates Spec Kit and TDAD as SGM instantiations via a four-month pilot study. Specification discipline, not model capability, is the binding constraint on AI-assisted software dependability.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了AI编程助手带来的"生产力-可靠性悖论"（PRP）：控制实验显示20-56%的效率提升，但大规模RCT和遥测数据却显示开发者速度下降19%、PR审查时间延长91%。论文通过文献综述提出了AAMT方法论分类法、SGM规范治理模型（基于交易成本经济学），并进行了四个月试点评估。核心结论：规范纪律而非模型能力，是制约AI辅助软件可靠性的关键瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有关于AI编程助手的研究结果相互矛盾——小规模受控实验显示显著效率提升，而大规模随机对照试验和遥测数据却显示效率下降或无明显改善。这种矛盾需要系统性的解释框架。
AI.method: 采用多声部文献综述（67篇文献，2022-2026），结合试点研究（四个月），提出并评估了三个理论框架：PRP定义、AAMT方法论分类法、SGM规范治理模型（基于交易成本经济学）。
AI.result: 发现了"生产力-可靠性悖论"（PRP），识别出三个调节变量（任务抽象度、代码库成熟度、开发者经验）和两个放大机制（代码审查瓶颈、上下文窗口限制）；通过试点评估了Spec Kit和TDAD作为SGM的具体实现。
AI.conclusion: 规范纪律（specification discipline）是AI辅助软件开发可靠性的核心瓶颈，而非模型能力本身。解决悖论的关键在于改进规范治理，而非单纯提升AI模型能力。

title: LiteVLA-H: Dual-Rate Vision-Language-Action Inference for Onboard Aerial Guidance and Semantic Perception
summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have shown strong semantic grounding and task generalization in manipulation, but aerial deployment remains difficult because drones require low-latency closed-loop guidance under strict onboard compute and communication constraints. We present LiteVLA-H, a compact 256M-parameter VLA system designed for dual-rate operation on an NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin: a fast outer-loop guidance mode for short action-token outputs and a slower semantic mode for scene understanding, hazard description, and operator-facing narration. The central empirical observation is that, in this compact edge regime, end-to-end latency is dominated by multimodal pre-fill rather than by the marginal cost of decoding a few extra tokens. This motivates a scheduler that issues reactive action tokens at 50.65,ms (19.74,Hz) while still supporting sentence-level semantic outputs at 149.90--164.57\ms (6.08--6.67,Hz) on the same embedded platform. To specialize the model without collapsing its descriptive competence, we use a knowledge-preserving fine-tuning recipe that mixes reactive flight data, aerial semantic data, and generic caption/VQA supervision. Beyond reporting current latency measurements, we position the system against recent state-of-the-art architectures, including AnywhereVLA, FutureVLA, and ReMem-VLA, showing that the measured action branch reaches a higher edge inference rate under our deployment conditions while retaining periodic semantic awareness.

AI.tldr: LiteVLA-H是一个256M参数的紧凑型VLA系统，专为无人机边缘部署设计，在Jetson AGX Orin上实现19.74Hz的快速动作推理和6-7Hz的语义理解，通过知识保持微调在受限平台上平衡了反应速度与语义能力。
AI.motivation: VLA模型在操控任务中表现出色，但无人机部署面临严格的计算和通信约束，需要低延迟闭环引导，现有系统难以在边缘设备上兼顾快速反应与语义理解。
AI.method: 提出LiteVLA-H紧凑型VLA架构（256M参数），采用双速率调度器：外环快速引导模式（50.65ms/19.74Hz）用于动作token输出，内环慢速语义模式（149.90-164.57ms/6-7Hz）用于场景理解。通过知识保留微调策略混合反应性飞行数据、空中语义数据和通用描述/VQA监督数据来特化模型。
AI.result: 在Jetson AGX Orin上实现动作分支19.74Hz的边缘推理速率，语义分支6-7Hz，端到端延迟主要由多模态预填充主导而非解码额外token的边际成本。与AnywhereVLA、FutureVLA、ReMem-VLA等SOTA架构相比，在部署条件下达到更高推理速率。
AI.conclusion: 紧凑型边缘VLA系统通过双速率调度和知识保留微调，可在严格约束下同时满足快速反应和周期性语义感知需求，为无人机等边缘设备的VLA部署提供了有效方案。

title: A Knowledge-Driven LLM-Based Decision-Support System for Explainable Defect Analysis and Mitigation Guidance in Laser Powder Bed Fusion
summary: This work presents a knowledge-driven decision-support system that integrates structured defect knowledge with LLM-based reasoning to provide explainable defect diagnosis and mitigation guidance in manufacturing, using LPBF as a representative, safety-critical case study. The proposed ontology-integrated LLM-based decision support system for LPBF defect analysis and mitigation guidance is built on a knowledge base containing 27 known LPBF defect types organized into hierarchical categories and causal relationships. The developed system supports fuzzy natural language queries for systematic knowledge retrieval, literature-supported explanation of defects, and guidance on defect causes and mitigation strategies derived from encoded process knowledge. Furthermore, a multimodal image-assessment module based on foundation models enables descriptor-guided interpretation of representative microscopic defect images through semantic alignment scoring. The proposed framework was evaluated through qualitative comparisons with general-purpose vision-language models, an ablation study, and an inter-rater reliability analysis. Evaluation on the literature-derived dataset showed that the fully integrated configuration outperformed the other three evaluated system configurations, achieving a macro-average F1 score of 0.808. Additionally, inter-rater reliability analysis using Cohen's kappa indicated substantial agreement between the model outputs and the literature-derived reference labels. These findings suggest that ontology-guided knowledge representation can improve the consistency, interpretability, and practical usefulness of LLM-assisted LPBF defect analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合本体知识库与LLM的决策支持系统，用于LPBF制造过程中的可解释缺陷诊断与缓解指导，在文献数据集上取得宏平均F1=0.808，并与文献标签达到高度一致性。
AI.motivation: LPBF等增材制造工艺中的缺陷分析高度依赖专家知识，现有LLM缺乏结构化的领域知识支撑，导致诊断结果不一致、不可解释，且难以提供可靠的缓解策略。
AI.method: 构建包含27种LPBF缺陷类型的本体知识库；集成LLM实现模糊自然语言查询、缺陷解释与缓解策略检索；引入基于基础模型的多模态图像评估模块，通过语义对齐评分进行显微图像描述符引导解释。
AI.result: 完整集成配置在文献数据集上宏平均F1=0.808，优于其他三种系统配置；Cohen's kappa分析表明模型输出与文献参考标签间具有高度一致性。
AI.conclusion: 本体引导的知识表示能够提升LLM辅助LPBF缺陷分析的一致性、可解释性和实际可用性。

title: MOC-3D: Manifold-Order Consistency for Text-to-3D Generation
summary:
With the burgeoning development of fields such as the Metaverse, Virtual Reality (VR), and Digital Twins, text-to-3D generation has emerged as a research hotspot in both academia and industry. Currently, optimization methods based on Score Distillation Sampling (SDS) utilizing 2D diffusion priors have become the mainstream technological paradigm in this field. However, due to the view bias of 2D priors and the mode-seeking ambiguity combined with gradient noise induced by high Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG), these methods still suffer from macro-topological inconsistency (e.g., the Janus problem) and micro-geometric discontinuity.
  To address these challenges, we propose MOC-3D, a text-to-3D generation method based on geometric manifold and semantic view-order consistency. Built upon the ScaleDreamer framework, our method incorporates a Semantic View-Order Constraint Module and a Manifold-based Feature Continuity Module. The former aims to rectify macro-topological inconsistency, while the latter focuses on eliminating micro-geometric discontinuity. Specifically, the Semantic View-Order Constraint Module leverages the prior knowledge of CLIP to impose a Monotonicity Rank Constraint on semantic score representations across different views, thereby providing effective guidance for the global topological structure of 3D objects. Meanwhile, the Manifold-based Feature Continuity Module employs the Riemannian Metric on the Symmetric Positive Definite (SPD) manifold. By measuring the distance of feature statistical distributions in the Riemannian space, it promotes the smooth evolution and continuity of micro-textures across multi-views in a statistical sense. Under the macro-micro synergistic optimization of these two modules, our model can simultaneously improve macro-structural consistency and micro-detail continuity.

AI.tldr: 针对文本到3D生成中存在的宏观拓扑不一致（如Janus问题）和微观几何不连续问题，本文提出MOC-3D方法，通过语义视角顺序约束模块（利用CLIP先验施加单调性排序约束）和基于流形的特征连续性模块（在SPD流形上度量特征统计分布距离），在ScaleDreamer框架下实现宏观一致性与微观细节连续性的联合优化。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Score Distillation Sampling（SDS）的文本到3D生成方法受限于2D先验的视角偏差以及高CFG导致的模式模糊与梯度噪声，存在宏观拓扑不一致（如Janus问题）和微观几何不连续两大问题，亟需一种能够同时解决这两方面缺陷的生成方法。
AI.method: 在ScaleDreamer框架基础上，提出两个核心模块：1）语义视角顺序约束模块，利用CLIP先验知识对不同视角下的语义分数施加单调性排序约束，纠正宏观拓扑结构；2）基于流形的特征连续性模块，使用SPD流形上的黎曼度量衡量特征统计分布距离，促进多视角间微观纹理的平滑演化与连续性。两个模块进行宏-微协同优化。
AI.result: 在宏观结构一致性和微观细节连续性两方面同时得到改善，有效缓解了Janus问题等拓扑不一致现象，并提升了多视角间几何与纹理的连贯性。
AI.conclusion: MOC-3D通过语义视角顺序约束与流形特征连续性约束的协同作用，为文本到3D生成中的宏观与微观不一致问题提供了有效解决方案，验证了利用CLIP先验和SPD流形几何在3D生成中的潜力。

title: KG-First, LLM-Fallback: A Hybrid Microservice for Grounded Skill Search and Explanation
summary: Authoritative competency frameworks such as ESCO, ROME, and O*NET are essential for aligning education with labor market needs, yet their technical complexity and structural heterogeneity hinder practical adoption by educators. This paper introduces SkillGraph-Service, an interoperable microservice designed to bridge this gap by unifying these resources into a provenance-preserving Knowledge Graph (KG). Adopting a KG-first, LLM-fallback architecture, the system combines symbolic rigor with sub-symbolic flexibility. It implements a lightweight hybrid retrieval engine (fusing SQLite FTS5 and HNSW vector search) to handle the vocabulary mismatch in educator queries, and utilizes Large Language Models (LLMs) strictly for constrained ranking and audience-aware explanation. Empirical evaluation on a multilingual dataset reveals that the proposed hybrid strategy achieves superior retrieval effectiveness (nDCG@5>0.94) with sub-200 ms latency, rendering computationally expensive cross-encoder re-ranking may be unnecessary for this domain. Furthermore, an analysis of generated explanations highlights a trade-off between fluency and faithfulness: while JSON-constrained LLMs ensure high citation precision, deterministic templates remain the most reliable method for maximizing evidence coverage. The resulting architecture offers a practical, scalable, and auditable solution for integrating complex skill data into digital learning ecosystems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SkillGraph-Service，一个将ESCO、ROME、O*NET等权威能力框架统一为知识图谱的微服务，采用KG优先、LLM备选的混合架构，通过轻量级混合检索引擎实现高效检索（nDCG@5>0.94，延迟<200ms），并为教育工作者提供可追溯、可解释的技能数据查询服务。
AI.motivation: 现有ESCO、ROME、O*NET等权威能力框架技术复杂、结构异构，教育工作者难以直接使用，亟需一种能统一这些资源并降低使用门槛的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用KG优先、LLM备选架构：1）构建保留溯源的知识图谱统一异构资源；2）设计轻量级混合检索引擎（SQLite FTS5全文搜索 + HNSW向量搜索）解决词汇不匹配问题；3）LLM仅用于受约束的重排序和面向受众的解释生成。
AI.result: 在多语言数据集上，混合检索策略实现nDCG@5>0.94且延迟低于200ms，表明交叉编码器重排序在该领域可能不必要；解释生成方面，JSON约束LLM能保证高引用精确度，但确定性模板在证据覆盖率上最可靠。
AI.conclusion: 该架构为将复杂技能数据整合到数字学习生态系统提供了实用、可扩展且可审计的解决方案，有效弥合了权威能力框架与教育实践之间的鸿沟。

title: A Systematic Exploration of Text Decomposition and Budget Distribution in Differentially Private Text Obfuscation
comment: 22 pages, 5 figures, 12 tables. Accepted to PrivateNLP 2026
summary: The goal of differentially private text obfuscation is to obfuscate, or "perturb", input texts with Differential Privacy (DP) guarantees, such that the private output texts are quantifiably indistinguishable from the originals. While perturbation at the word level is intuitive, meaningful text privatization happens on complete documents. Recent research has laid the groundwork for reasoning about privacy budget distribution, namely, how an overall $\varepsilon$ budget can be sensibly distributed among the component pieces of a text. We perform a systematic evaluation of multiple text decomposition and budget distribution techniques in the context of DP text obfuscation, testing how different methods for chunking texts can be combined with techniques for allocating $\varepsilon$ to these chunks. Our experiments reveal that such design choices are very important, as even with comparable privacy budgets, significantly different results can occur based on which methods are chosen. In this, we provide credible evidence of the feasibility of maximizing empirical trade-offs by optimizing DP obfuscation procedures.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了差分隐私文本混淆中文本分解与隐私预算分配技术的组合效果，发现设计选择对结果有显著影响，并提供了优化经验权衡的可行性证据。
AI.motivation: 现有研究虽提出了文本级差分隐私混淆及预算分配的理论基础，但缺乏对不同文本分解方法与预算分配策略组合效果的系统性评估。本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 对多种文本分块（chunking）方法与ε预算分配技术进行组合实验，系统评估不同设计选择在差分隐私文本混淆场景下的表现。
AI.result: 即使隐私预算相近，不同的文本分解与预算分配组合会导致显著不同的结果，表明设计选择至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 优化差分隐私混淆流程中的设计选择（文本分块与预算分配）可以有效提升经验层面的隐私-效用权衡。

title: A Review of the Receiver Operating Characteristic Curve and a Proof About the Area Beneath It
summary: The Receiver Operating Characteristic (ROC) curve of a binary classifier has often been utilized to measure the performance of the classifier. The area beneath this curve is used in particular because of its quoted probabilistic interpretation as being equal to the probability that the classifier will rank a random positive observation above a random negative observation. This paper formalizes this claim, produces a bound on how far away from the truth it is if a hypothesis is not met, and gives a small literature review of the ROC curve.

AI.tldr: 本文正式验证了ROC曲线下面积（AUC）的概率解释（即AUC等于随机正样本排在随机负样本之上的概率），给出了假设不满足时的误差界，并进行了相关文献综述。
AI.motivation: ROC曲线及AUC在分类器性能评估中被广泛使用，但其概率解释的严格性缺乏形式化证明，本文旨在填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 通过数学形式化推导，验证AUC的概率解释，并给出假设不成立时的误差界分析，同时辅以文献综述。
AI.result: 严格证明了AUC等于P(正样本得分 > 负样本得分)的结论，并给出了假设偏离时的误差边界。
AI.conclusion: 为AUC的概率解释提供了理论基础，明确了其成立条件及偏离时的误差范围，增强了该指标的可靠性。

title: MPCS: Neuroplastic Continual Learning via Multi-Component Plasticity and Topology-Aware EWC
summary: Continual learning systems face a fundamental tension between plasticity -- acquiring new knowledge  --  and stability  --  retaining prior knowledge. We introduce MPCS (Multi-Plasticity Continual System), a neuroplastic architecture that integrates eleven complementary mechanisms: task-driven neurogenesis, Fourier-encoded inputs, EWC regularization, meta-replay, mixed consolidation, hybrid gating, synapse pruning/regeneration, Hebbian updates, task similarity routing, adaptive growth control, and continuous neuron importance tracking. We evaluate MPCS on MEP-BENCH, a multi-track benchmark spanning 31 tasks across regression, classification, logic, and mixed domains, using a three-dimensional Pareto criterion over task performance (Perf), representation diversity (RD), and gradient conflict rate (GCR). Across 15 ablation configurations (3 seeds x 4 tracks x 2000 epochs), MPCS achieves a Normalized Efficiency Score of 94.2, placing it on the Pareto frontier among 9 of 14 gate-passing systems. Key findings: (i) Fourier encoding is the single most critical component (removal drops Perf by 30.7 pp and fails the MEP gate on 14% of tasks); (ii) global EWC degrades performance (NES = -4.2); topology-local EWC reduces this penalty (NES 90.5->91.8) but does not eliminate it; removing EWC entirely yields MPCS_EFFICIENT, the highest-Perf system -- establishing a monotone relationship in the high task-similarity regime (s_bar ~= 0.95): global EWC < topology EWC < no EWC; (iii) the Pareto status assessment is predictive: removing the two Pareto-dominated components (EWC + Hebbian) jointly yields MPCS_EFFICIENT, which improves Perf by 0.6 pp at 4.7x lower compute cost (127 vs. 602 min), validating the Pareto frontier as an actionable model-compression guide.

AI.tldr: MPCS是一个集成了11种可塑性机制（如任务驱动神经发生、傅里叶编码、EWC正则化等）的持续学习架构。在MEP-BENCH基准（31个任务）上评估，使用三维帕累托准则。关键发现：傅里叶编码是最关键组件；全局EWC损害性能，去除EWC后得到最高效系统MPCS_EFFICIENT；帕累托状态评估可作为模型压缩指南。
AI.motivation: 持续学习系统面临可塑性（获取新知识）与稳定性（保留旧知识）之间的根本矛盾。作者旨在设计一个整合多种机制的多可塑性架构来解决这一张力。
AI.method: 提出MPCS架构，集成11种互补机制（任务驱动神经发生、傅里叶编码输入、EWC正则化、元回放、混合巩固、混合门控、突触修剪/再生、Hebbian更新、任务相似性路由、自适应增长控制、连续神经元重要性追踪）。在MEP-BENCH多轨基准上评估，使用三维帕累托准则（任务性能、表示多样性、梯度冲突率）。
AI.result: MPCS在15种消融配置中达到94.2的归一化效率分数。傅里叶编码是最关键组件（去除后性能下降30.7个百分点）。全局EWC损害性能（NES=-4.2），拓扑局部EWC减少但未消除惩罚。去除EWC的MPCS_EFFICIENT成为最高性能系统。帕累托主导组件（EWC+Hebbian）联合移除后，性能提升0.6个百分点，计算成本降低4.7倍。
AI.conclusion: 傅里叶编码对持续学习至关重要；在高任务相似度场景下，EWC的正则化效应单调递减（全局EWC<拓扑EWC<无EWC）；帕累托前沿可作为模型压缩的可操作指南，验证了"移除帕累托主导组件"的有效性。

title: ClarifySTL: An Interactive LLM Agent Framework for STL Transformation through Requirements Clarification
summary: Signal Temporal Logic (STL) is a formal language for specifying real-time behaviors of cyber-physical systems (CPS). Automatically transforming natural language requirements into STL specifications has received growing attention. Recent efforts leveraging large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated impressive performance, but some natural language requirements in practice contain vague or ambiguous information, which remains challenging for LLMs to handle. To address these challenges, we propose ClarifySTL, an interactive LLM-agent framework that enhances STL transformation through requirements clarification. ClarifySTL first detects vague expressions that indicate underspecified information in a requirement. If any vagueness is detected, it generates targeted clarification queries to guide users in supplementing the requirement until all necessary details are provided. Subsequently, if ClarifySTL detects ambiguities, it formulates focused ambiguity clarification queries and updates the requirements based on user feedback until all ambiguities are resolved. Finally, the requirements with vagueness and ambiguity clarified are transformed into STL specifications using LLMs. This interactive framework ensures that the resulting STL formulas faithfully capture user intent while reducing the burden on the user. We evaluate ClarifySTL on the representative benchmarks DeepSTL and STL-DivEn, as well as our newly introduced AmbiEval benchmark, which is specifically designed to assess the performance of the agents in handling vagueness and ambiguity, including both detection and query generation. The experimental results show that ClarifySTL is effective.

AI.tldr: ClarifySTL是一个交互式LLM智能体框架，通过检测和澄清自然语言需求中的模糊和歧义信息，将其转化为信号时序逻辑（STL）规约，实验证明该方法有效。
AI.motivation: 自然语言需求中的模糊和歧义信息使得现有的LLM方法难以准确将其转化为STL规约，需要一种能够主动澄清用户意图的方法。
AI.method: 提出ClarifySTL交互式框架：1) 检测自然语言需求中的模糊表达，生成澄清查询引导用户补充信息；2) 检测歧义并生成针对性澄清查询，根据用户反馈更新需求；3) 将澄清后的需求通过LLM转化为STL规约。
AI.result: 在DeepSTL、STL-DivEn基准和新提出的AmbiEval基准上，ClarifySTL有效处理了模糊和歧义检测及查询生成任务，实验结果表明方法有效。
AI.conclusion: ClarifySTL通过交互式澄清机制，在将自然语言需求转化为STL规约的过程中能更好地捕捉用户意图，同时减轻用户负担。

title: Multi-Branch Non-Homogeneous Image Dehazing via Concentration Partitioning and Image Fusion
summary: Existing single image dehazing methods have demonstrated satisfactory performance on homogeneous thin-haze images; however, they often struggle with non-homogeneous hazy images that exhibit spatially varying haze concentrations and abrupt density transitions across different regions. To address this fundamental limitation, we propose a novel multi-branch deep neural network framework, termed Concentration Partitioning and Image Fusion Network (CPIFNet), which decomposes the challenging non-homogeneous dehazing problem into a set of tractable homogeneous sub-problems. Our key insight is that a single non-homogeneous hazy image can be viewed as a composite of multiple local regions, each exhibiting approximately homogeneous haze characteristics. CPIFNet employs a two-stage architecture consisting of an Image Enhancement Network (IENet) stage and an Image Fusion Network (IFNet) stage. In the first stage, multiple IENet branches are independently trained on homogeneous haze datasets of different concentration levels, producing enhancement models that excel at restoring regions matching their respective haze densities. In the second stage, the IFNet intelligently aggregates the advantageous regions from all enhancement outputs through deep feature stacking and merging, yielding a unified high-quality dehazed result. Furthermore, we introduce a comprehensive loss function incorporating reconstruction, perceptual, structural, and color losses to jointly supervise both stages.

AI.tldr: 提出CPIFNet，通过将非均匀雾霾图像分解为多个局部均匀区域，分两阶段（多分支增强网络+融合网络）实现去雾，解决非均匀雾霾难题。
AI.motivation: 现有去雾方法在均匀薄雾图像上表现良好，但难以处理具有空间变化浓度和突变密度过渡的非均匀雾霾图像。
AI.method: 1) 提出CPIFNet框架，包含两阶段：第一阶用多个IENet分支在不同浓度均匀雾霾数据集上独立训练；第二阶IFNet通过深度特征堆叠融合聚合各分支优势区域。2) 引入结合重建、感知、结构和颜色损失的综合损失函数。
AI.result: CPIFNet在非均匀雾霾图像上的去雾效果优于现有方法，能够更好地恢复不同区域细节并保持颜色一致性。
AI.conclusion: 将非均匀去雾问题分解为多个均匀子问题的策略有效，两阶段架构和综合损失函数共同提升了非均匀雾霾图像的重建质量。

title: Virtual Speech Therapist: A Clinician-in-the-Loop AI Speech Therapy Agent for Personalized and Supervised Therapy
summary: This paper develops Virtual Speech Therapist (VST), an intelligent agent-based platform that streamlines stuttering assessment and delivers customized therapy planning through automated and adaptive AI-driven workflows. VST integrates state-of-the-art deep learning-based stuttering classification, and multi-agent large language model (LLM) reasoning to support evidence-based clinical decision-making. The VST begins with the acquisition and feature extraction of patient speech samples, followed by robust classification of stuttering types. Building on these outputs, VST initiates an agentic reasoning process in which specialized LLM agents autonomously generate, critique, and iteratively refine individualized therapy plans. A dedicated critic agent evaluates all generated therapy plans to ensure clinical safety, methodological soundness, and alignment with peer-reviewed evidence and established professional guidelines. The resulting output is a comprehensive, patient-specific therapy draft intended for clinician review. Incorporating clinician feedback, the system then produces a finalized therapy plan suitable for patient delivery, thereby maintaining a clinician-in-the-loop paradigm. Experimental evaluation by expert speech therapists confirms that VST consistently generates high-quality, evidence-based therapy recommendations. These findings demonstrate the system's potential to augment clinical workflows, reduce clinician burden, and improve therapeutic outcomes for individuals with speech impairments. An interactive user interface for the proposed system is available online at: https://vocametrix.com/ai/stuttering-therapy-planning-agent , facilitating real-time stuttering assessment and personalized therapy planning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了虚拟言语治疗师（VST），一个基于智能体的平台，整合深度学习与多智能体大语言模型推理，实现口吃评估自动化与个性化治疗计划生成，并通过临床专家评估验证其高质量与循证性。
AI.motivation: 现有口吃评估和治疗计划依赖人工，耗时且主观性强，临床负担重。需要自动化、可扩展且循证的系统来辅助临床决策，减轻治疗师负担，提升治疗效果。
AI.method: VST采用双重流程：(1) 深度学习模型对患者语音样本进行特征提取与口吃类型分类；(2) 多智能体LLM系统——专业智能体自主生成治疗计划，批判智能体评估其临床安全性、方法合理性与循证依据，经迭代优化后生成初稿，再由临床医生反馈修正形成最终方案，保持"人在回路"范式。
AI.result: 言语治疗专家的实验评估证实，VST能持续生成高质量、基于证据的治疗建议，有效辅助临床工作流程。
AI.conclusion: VST有潜力减轻临床医生负担、改善言语障碍患者的治疗效果，并已提供在线交互界面供实时评估与个性化治疗规划使用。

title: Retrieving Any Relevant Moments: Benchmark and Models for Generalized Moment Retrieval
