AI.motivation: 软件文档随代码演化频繁与可执行逻辑发生偏离，产生技术债务，降低可维护性并导致API误用。现有静态分析工具无法评估语义一致性，而标准LLM在缺乏深层结构感知时容易产生幻觉。
AI.method: 提出DocSync代理工作流：（1）融合AST表示与RAG提供依赖感知的上下文；（2）基于Reflexion范式构建批评引导的迭代优化循环，让模型对照源代码自我纠正候选更新；（3）使用LoRA适配的小语言模型实现资源受限下的高效部署。
AI.result: 在代码到文本的维护任务中，DocSync在语义对齐、摘要忠实度和自动评判偏好上显著超越标准编码器-解码器基线（如自动评判得分3.44/5.0，对比CodeT5-base的1.91）；迭代批评循环在不增加参数量前提下带来可测量的语义正确性提升。
AI.conclusion: 将结构检索与代理细化相结合是自主缓解文档债务的一个极具前景的方向，为无需大规模扩展模型参数即可提升文档语义一致性提供了有力证据。

title: A Light Weight Multi-Features-View Convolution Neural Network For Plant Disease Identification
summary: Agriculture is a key sector of the economies of developing countries. It serves as a primary source of income and employment for rural populations. However, each year, a large portion of crops is wasted because of pests and diseases. Well-timed prediction of plant diseases is crucial to sustainable, high-quality agricultural production. Detection of plant diseases through conventional methods is both labour-intensive and time-consuming. Researchers have developed image classification based automated techniques for this purpose. Most accurate methods are based on deep convolutional neural networks, which are computationally intensive, with many layers and millions of trainable parameters. In resource-constrained settings, especially in rural areas, it is difficult to deploy deep convolutional neural network models for efficient plant disease identification. To address these issues, an efficient and light-weight Multi-View Convolutional Neural Network is proposed. These additional features aid the proposed model to identify the plant diseases accurately and efficiently with less number of parameters. The proposed model is tested on a benchmark Plantvillage dataset and achieves an improvement of $ 2.9\%$ in classification accuracy compared to the baseline convolutional neural network model, which was trained only on Red, Green, and Blue (RGB) plant images. Compared with state-of-the-art deep convolutional neural network models, the proposed model is less computationally expensive and achieves comparable accuracy for plant disease identification on the PlantVillage dataset.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种轻量级多视角卷积神经网络（MV-CNN）用于植物病害识别，在保持较低计算成本的同时，在PlantVillage数据集上比基线CNN模型准确率提升2.9%。
AI.motivation: 传统植物病害检测方法费时费力，而现有的深度CNN模型计算量大、参数多，难以部署在资源受限的农村地区，需要一种高效轻量的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出Multi-View Convolutional Neural Network（多视角卷积神经网络），通过引入额外的特征视角（多视图输入），在减少参数量的同时提升识别效率。
AI.result: 在PlantVillage数据集上，相比仅使用RGB图像的基线CNN模型，分类准确率提升2.9%，且与现有深度CNN模型相比计算成本更低，准确率相当。
AI.conclusion: 多视角CNN是一种有效的轻量级植物病害识别方案，适合部署在资源受限的农村环境中。

title: Zero-Shot Signal Temporal Logic Planning with Disjunctive Branch Selection in Dynamic Semantic Maps
summary: Signal Temporal Logic (STL) offers verifiable task specifications and is crucial for safety-critical control. Yet STL planning remains challenging: exact optimization-based methods are often too slow, and learning-based methods struggle to generalize across varying environments. We propose a zero-shot STL planning solver for variable-map environments that generates feasible trajectories without retraining. By integrating a map-conditioned Transformer architecture with a lightweight heuristic, our approach effectively handles complex disjunctive (OR) subformulas. Furthermore, we leverage Transitive Reinforcement Learning (TRL) to ensure consistent temporal grounding and logical coherence across decomposed sub-tasks. Experiments on dynamic semantic maps with diverse obstacle layouts demonstrate consistent gains, highlighting the framework's superior zero-shot generalization to changing environments and broad STL coverage.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer架构的零样本信号时序逻辑（STL）规划求解器，结合轻量级启发式和传递强化学习，能够在无需重新训练的情况下泛化到不同地图环境，有效处理复杂析取子公式，并在动态语义地图实验中展现出优异的零样本泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有的STL规划方法存在两大瓶颈：精确优化方法计算速度过慢，而学习方法难以在不同环境间泛化。因此，作者希望设计一种无需重新训练即可应对多变地图环境的零样本STL规划求解器。
AI.method: 采用地图条件Transformer架构，结合轻量级启发式机制处理复杂的析取（OR）子公式；并利用传递强化学习（TRL）确保分解后的子任务在时间逻辑上保持一致的时序基础和逻辑一致性。
AI.result: 在包含多种障碍物布局的动态语义地图上进行的实验表明，该方法在零样本泛化到变化环境以及广泛的STL覆盖范围方面均取得了持续改进。
AI.conclusion: 该框架展现了在变化环境下出色的零样本泛化能力，能够在不重新训练的情况下生成可行轨迹，有效解决了STL规划中泛化性差的难题。

title: GRAIL: A Deep-Granularity Hybrid Resonance Framework for Real-Time Agent Discovery via SLM-Enhanced Indexing
summary: As the ecosystem of Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents expands rapidly, efficient and accurate Agent Discovery becomes a critical bottleneck for large-scale multi-agent collaboration. Existing approaches typically face a dichotomy: either relying on heavy-weight LLMs for intent parsing, leading to prohibitive latency (often exceeding 30 seconds), or using monolithic vector retrieval that sacrifices semantic precision for speed. To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{GRAIL} (Granular Resonance-based Agent/AI Link), a novel framework achieving sub-400ms discovery latency without compromising accuracy. GRAIL introduces three key innovations: (1) \textbf{SLM-Enhanced Prediction}, replacing the generalized LLM parser with a specialized, fine-tuned Small Language Model (SLM) for millisecond-level capability tag prediction; (2) \textbf{Pseudo-Document Expansion}, augmenting agent descriptions with synthetic queries to enhance semantic density for robust dense retrieval; and (3) \textbf{MaxSim Resonance}, a fine-grained matching mechanism computing maximum similarity between user queries and discrete agent usage examples, effectively mitigating semantic dilution. Validated on \textbf{AgentTaxo-9K}, our new large-scale dataset of 9,240 agents, GRAIL reduces end-to-end discovery latency by over \textbf{79$\times$} compared to LLM-parsing baselines, while significantly outperforming traditional vector search in Recall@10. This framework offers a scalable, industrial-grade solution for the real-time ``Internet of Agents."

AI.tldr: GRAIL 是一个面向大规模多智能体协作的智能体发现框架，通过 SLM 增强预测、伪文档扩展和 MaxSim 共振三大创新，在保持高精度的同时将发现延迟降至 400 毫秒以下（相比 LLM 基线提速 79 倍），并在新构建的 AgentTaxo-9K 数据集上显著优于传统向量检索方法。
AI.motivation: 现有 LLM 智能体发现方法面临两难困境：基于 LLM 的意图解析延迟过高（常超 30 秒），而传统向量检索虽快但牺牲语义精度。亟需一种同时兼顾速度与精度的工业级解决方案，以支撑大规模实时多智能体协作（即"智能体互联网"）。
AI.method: GRAIL 提出三项核心创新：(1) SLM 增强预测——用微调的小语言模型替代通用 LLM 解析器，实现毫秒级能力标签预测；(2) 伪文档扩展——为智能体描述增补合成查询，提升稠密检索的语义密度；(3) MaxSim 共振——在用户查询与离散的智能体使用示例之间计算最大相似度，缓解语义稀释问题。
AI.result: 在包含 9,240 个智能体的 AgentTaxo-9K 数据集上，GRAIL 将端到端发现延迟降低 79 倍以上（低于 400ms），同时在 Recall@10 指标上显著超越传统向量检索基线。
AI.conclusion: GRAIL 提供了一种可扩展的工业级智能体发现方案，在延迟和精度之间取得了卓越平衡，为实时智能体互联网的大规模部署奠定了基础。

title: Creating and Evaluating Figurative Language Dataset for Sindhi
summary: In this article, we introduce SiNFluD, a novel benchmark dataset for Sindhi figurative language classification. We first collect raw text from various blogs, social media platforms, and literary sources, and subsequently prepare the corpus for annotation. Two native annotators label the data using the Doccano text annotation tool, achieving an inter-annotator agreement of 0.81. We then establish baseline results using 5-fold and 10-fold cross-validation. Finally, we evaluate mBERT, XLM-RoBERTa, and XLM-RoBERTa-XL models, along with SetFit for few-shot fine-tuning of sentence transformers. Among these, the pretrained XLM-RoBERTa-XL achieves the best performance.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了SiNFluD——信德语比喻语言分类的新基准数据集，通过多源文本收集、双标注员标注（一致性0.81），并基于mBERT、XLM-RoBERTa、XLM-RoBERTa-XL及SetFit进行实验，其中XLM-RoBERTa-XL表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 信德语（Sindhi）在比喻语言理解方面的资源匮乏，缺乏标准化的基准数据集，亟需构建相关数据集以推动低资源语言的比喻语言处理研究。
AI.method: 从博客、社交媒体和文学作品收集原始文本；使用Doccano工具由两名母语标注者进行标注（一致性0.81）；采用5折和10折交叉验证建立基线；评估mBERT、XLM-RoBERTa、XLM-RoBERTa-XL及SetFit（少样本微调）模型。
AI.result: XLM-RoBERTa-XL在所有模型中取得最佳性能；SetFit在少样本场景下表现出竞争力。
AI.conclusion: SiNFluD为信德语比喻语言分类提供了首个标准化基准，多语言预训练模型（尤其是XLM-RoBERTa-XL）在该任务上表现优异，未来可扩展至更多低资源语言。

title: Finite-Sample Analysis of Elimination in Active Hypothesis Testing
comment: Submitted to IEEE Conference on Decision and Control (CDC) 2026. 18 pages, 4 figures
summary: A fixed-confidence, finite-sample problem of active hypothesis testing arises in many safety-critical applications. Situated in the context of sequential hypothesis testing, this paper studies the effect of hypothesis elimination on the stopping time. We introduce an elimination-augmented Track-and-Stop algorithm, in which champion-specific active-opponent sets are progressively pruned, and sensing effort is reallocated toward the surviving alternatives. Our analysis derives a non-asymptotic upper bound on the expected stopping time. The gain in finite-sample from elimination appears on the scale of the non-leading term, resulting from tighter tracking and concentration constants on the reduced hypothesis set. Furthermore, we introduce an aggressiveness parameter to modulate the trade-off between faster elimination and weaker confidence guarantee. An experimental study on synthetic Gaussian instances confirms the theoretical predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种消除增强型Track-and-Stop算法，通过逐步剪枝对手假设集并重新分配感知资源，在有限样本假设检验中实现了更优的停止时间，并引入攻击性参数来平衡消除速度与置信保证。
AI.motivation: 安全关键应用中的固定置信度有限样本主动假设检验问题需要更高效的停止时间，现有方法在有限样本下的性能提升主要依赖于非主导项的优化。
AI.method: 提出消除增强型Track-and-Stop算法：逐步剪枝冠军特定的主动对手集，将感知资源重新分配给幸存假设；引入攻击性参数调节消除速度与置信保证之间的权衡。
AI.result: 导出了期望停止时间的非渐近上界；消除带来的有限样本增益体现在非主导项尺度上，源于更紧的追踪和浓度常数；合成高斯数据实验验证了理论预测。
AI.conclusion: 假设消除策略在有限样本下能有效降低停止时间，攻击性参数为实际应用提供了灵活的权衡手段。

title: Beyond Translation Accuracy: Addressing False Failures in LLM-Based Code Translation
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success in automated code translation. While prior work has focused on improving translation accuracy through advanced prompting and iterative repair, the reliability of the underlying evaluation frameworks has received less attention. In this paper, we demonstrate that a significant number of reported failures in code translation are not due to incorrect logic, but rather evaluation-induced errors stemming from improper compilation flags, missing library links, and unconfigured runtime environments. We conduct a large-scale empirical study across five programming languages (C, C++, Java, Python, Go) and three benchmarks (Avatar, CodeNet, EvalPlus), covering 6,164 translations generated by GPT-4o, DeepSeek-Coder, and Magicoder. Our analysis identifies and categorizes common false negatives, distinguishing pipeline-induced failures that affect any model from model-dependent behaviors that vary across LLMs. Our findings highlight the necessity for transparent, configuration-aware evaluation standards to accurately assess progress in LLM-based code translation.

AI.tldr: 论文发现代码翻译评估中的大量失败并非源于逻辑错误，而是由编译标志、库链接、运行时环境等评估诱导错误导致。通过对5种编程语言、3个基准测试、6164个翻译样本的分析，区分了管道诱导失败和模型依赖行为，呼吁建立透明、配置感知的评估标准。
AI.motivation: 现有研究专注于通过提示工程和迭代修复提升代码翻译准确性，但评估框架本身的可靠性却鲜少被关注。论文旨在揭示评估诱导错误对翻译评测结果的影响。
AI.method: 在5种编程语言（C、C++、Java、Python、Go）、3个基准测试（Avatar、CodeNet、EvalPlus）上，对GPT-4o、DeepSeek-Coder、Magicoder生成的6164个翻译结果进行大规模实证分析，归类了常见的假负例，区分了管道诱导失败与模型依赖行为。
AI.result: 大量报告失败实际上是评估诱导错误（编译标志不当、库链接缺失、运行环境未配置），而非模型逻辑错误。识别并分类了常见假负例类型，区分了影响所有模型的管道诱导失败和因LLM而异的模型依赖行为。
AI.conclusion: 当前评估标准存在系统性偏差，有必要建立透明、配置感知的评估标准，以便更准确地衡量LLM在代码翻译方面的实际进展。

title: Robustness of Transformer-Based Fluence Map Prediction Under Clinically Realistic Perturbations
comment: Accepted by The Artificial Intelligence in Medicine (AIME) 2026 Conference
summary: Learning-based fluence map prediction offers a fast alternative to iterative inverse planning in intensity-modulated radiation therapy (IMRT), but its robustness under realistic distribution shifts remains unclear. We study a two-stage transformer pipeline that maps anatomy (CT and contours) to dose and then to beamlet fluence maps. We compare fluence-stage transformer backbones with hierarchical, global, and hybrid attention, trained with a physics-informed loss enforcing energy consistency. Robustness is evaluated under geometric perturbations, radiometric noise, reduced training data, and domain shifts using a prostate IMRT dataset, with additional evaluation of the dose stage on public datasets. Results show smooth degradation under moderate perturbations but sharp failures under severe rotations and noise. Hierarchical transformers (e.g., SwinUNETR) exhibit slower growth in upper-quartile energy error, indicating improved robustness. We further show that SSIM alone fails to capture clinically relevant errors, highlighting the need for physics-informed evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于学习的IMRT通量图预测方法在分布偏移下的鲁棒性，采用两阶段Transformer架构（解剖→剂量→通量），对比不同注意力机制骨干网络，并引入物理信息损失函数。实验表明模型在适度扰动下表现稳健，但在严重旋转和噪声下会出现急剧失效，层级Transformer表现出更好的鲁棒性，且仅靠SSIM无法捕捉临床相关误差。
AI.motivation: 基于学习的通量图预测相比迭代优化速度快，但其在现实分布偏移（如几何扰动、辐射噪声、数据减少、域迁移等）下的鲁棒性尚不明确，因此需要系统评估其稳健性边界。
AI.method: 采用两阶段Transformer流水线：第一阶段从CT和轮廓预测剂量分布，第二阶段从剂量预测射束元通量图。比较层级注意力（如SwinUNETR）、全局注意力和混合注意力三种骨干网络，并用物理信息损失函数（能量一致性约束）训练。在多个扰动场景下系统评估鲁棒性。
AI.result: 模型在适度扰动下性能平滑下降，但在严重旋转和噪声下出现急剧失败。层级Transformer（如SwinUNETR）在上四分位能量误差增长更慢，鲁棒性更优。SSIM指标无法反映临床相关误差。
AI.conclusion: 基于Transformer的通量图预测在某些分布偏移下脆弱，需引入物理信息评估；层级注意力结构更鲁棒；应警惕仅依赖SSIM等单一图像质量指标的评价方式。

title: EO-Gym: A Multimodal, Interactive Environment for Earth Observation Agents
summary: Earth Observation (EO) analysis is inherently interactive: resolving uncertainty often requires expanding the region of interest, retrieving historical observations, and switching across sensors such as optical and Synthetic Aperture Radar. However, most EO benchmarks collapse this process into fixed-input, single-turn tasks. To address this gap, we present EO-Gym, a controlled executable framework for multimodal, tool-using EO agents that formulates EO analysis as a Gymnasium-style local geospatial workspace backed by more than 660k multimodal files indexed by location, time, and sensor type, with 35 EO-specialized tools spanning six task families. Built on this environment, we construct EO-Gym-Data, a benchmark of 9,078 trajectories and 34,604 reasoning steps, and grounded in eight public EO datasets together with Landsat and Sentinel-2 imagery. Evaluating $10$ open and closed VLMs shows that strong general-purpose models still struggle with interactive EO reasoning, especially on temporal and cross-modal workflows. As a reference baseline, EO-Gym-4B, obtained by fine-tuning Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct on EO-Gym-Data, improves overall Pass@3 from $0.49$ to $0.74$ under the main evaluation setting. O-Gym provides a reproducible environment for interactive EO agents, operationalizing EO as an evidence-gathering problem that requires planning across geospatial, temporal, and sensing modality.

AI.tldr: 提出了EO-Gym，一个面向多模态、工具使用型地球观测智能体的交互式执行框架，包含66万+多模态文件、35个专业工具，并构建了9,078条轨迹的基准数据集。实验表明通用视觉语言模型在交互式EO推理上表现不佳，而微调后的EO-Gym-4B将Pass@3从0.49提升至0.74。
AI.motivation: 现有EO基准大多将分析过程简化为固定输入的单轮任务，无法反映真实场景中需要交互式推理（扩展区域、检索历史、切换传感器）的特点，因此急需一个支持多轮交互的EO智能体框架。
AI.method: 构建了EO-Gym环境（Gymnasium风格，含66万+多模态文件和35个工具），基于此生成EO-Gym-Data基准（9,078条轨迹），并在该框架上微调Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct得到EO-Gym-4B模型。
AI.result: 10个开放/闭源VLM评估显示通用模型在交互式EO推理上表现困难，尤其在时间序列和跨模态任务上；EO-Gym-4B微调后Pass@3从0.49提升至0.74。
AI.conclusion: EO-Gym为交互式EO智能体提供了可复现的标准化环境，将EO分析重新定义为需要跨地理、时间和传感模态进行规划的"证据收集"问题。

title: Benchmarking Retrieval Strategies for Biomedical Retrieval-Augmented Generation: A Controlled Empirical Study
comment: 15 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables. Code and data: https://github.com/deviprasadbal/RAGHealthcareRetrievalStrategies Also archived at Zenodo: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19774692
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) offers a well-established path to grounding large language model (LLM) outputs in external knowledge, yet the question of which retrieval strategy works best in a high-stakes domain such as biomedicine has not received the controlled, multi-metric treatment it deserves. This paper presents a systematic empirical comparison of five retrieval strategies -- Dense Vector Search, Hybrid BM25 + Dense retrieval, Cross-Encoder Reranking, Multi-Query Expansion, and Maximal Marginal Relevance (MMR) -- within a biomedical question-answering RAG pipeline. All strategies share a fixed generation model (GPT-4o-mini), a common vector store (ChromaDB), and OpenAI's text-embedding-3-small embeddings, ensuring that observed differences are attributable to retrieval alone. Evaluation is conducted on 250 question-answer pairs drawn from a preprocessed subset of the BioASQ benchmark (rag-mini-bioasq) using four DeepEval metrics: contextual precision, contextual recall, faithfulness, and answer relevancy, each reported with 95% confidence intervals. A no-context ablation is included as a lower bound. Cross-Encoder Reranking achieves the best composite score (0.827) and highest contextual precision (0.852), confirming that query-document interaction yields measurable retrieval gains. Multi-Query Expansion, despite its recall-oriented design, produces the weakest contextual precision (0.671), suggesting naive query diversification introduces retrieval noise. MMR sacrifices answer relevancy for diversity, while the Dense baseline (composite 0.822) falls within 0.005 points of the top strategy. All RAG conditions dramatically outperform the no-context ablation on answer relevancy (0.658-0.701 vs. 0.287), confirming the practical value of retrieval. The full pipeline, hyperparameters, and evaluation code are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文系统比较了五种检索策略在生物医学RAG问答中的表现，发现Cross-Encoder Reranking综合最优（0.827），而所有RAG方案均显著优于无检索基线。
AI.motivation: 生物医学领域对检索增强生成（RAG）的需求高，但缺乏在不同检索策略间进行受控、多指标的系统比较研究。
AI.method: 固定生成模型（GPT-4o-mini）、向量数据库（ChromaDB）和嵌入模型（text-embedding-3-small），在BioASQ子集（250对问答）上比较五种检索策略：Dense向量检索、混合BM25+Dense、交叉编码器重排序、多查询扩展、最大边际相关性（MMR），使用DeepEval的四个指标评估。
AI.result: Cross-Encoder Reranking综合得分最高（0.827），上下文精度领先（0.852）；Multi-Query Expansion上下文精度最弱（0.671）；MMR牺牲答案相关性换取多样性；所有RAG方案答案相关性（0.658–0.701）远超无检索基线（0.287）。
AI.conclusion: 交叉编码器重排序在生物医学RAG中效果最优，但纯Dense检索与其差距极小（0.005），可作为轻量替代；多查询扩展需谨慎使用，因其可能引入检索噪声。

title: OralMLLM-Bench: Evaluating Cognitive Capabilities of Multimodal Large Language Models in Dental Practice
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have emerged as a promising paradigm for dental image analysis. However, their ability to capture the multi-level cognitive processes required for radiographic analysis remains unclear. Here, we present a comprehensive benchmark to evaluate the cognitive capabilities of MLLMs in dental radiographic analysis. It spans three critical imaging modalities, i.e., periapical, panoramic, and lateral cephalometric radiographs, and defines four cognitive categories: perception, comprehension, prediction, and decision-making. The benchmark comprises 27 clinically grounded tasks derived from public datasets, with manually curated annotations and 3,820 clinician assessments for evaluation. Six frontier MLLMs, including GPT-5.2 and GLM-4.6, are evaluated. We demonstrate the performance gap between MLLMs and clinicians in dental practice, delineate model strengths and limitations, characterize failure patterns, and provide recommendations for improvement. This data resource will facilitate the development of next-generation artificial intelligence systems aligned with clinical cognition, safety requirements, and workflow complexity in dental practice.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个评估多模态大语言模型在牙科放射影像分析中认知能力的综合基准，涵盖三种影像模态和四个认知层级（感知、理解、预测、决策），包含27个临床任务和3,820份临床评估，揭示了MLLMs与临床医生之间的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在牙科影像分析中展现出潜力，但其能否捕捉放射影像分析所需的多层次认知过程尚不明确，缺乏系统性的评估基准。
AI.method: 构建了包含三种牙科影像模态（根尖片、全景片、头影测量片）和四个认知类别（感知、理解、预测、决策）的基准，共27个临床任务，采用人工标注和3,820份临床医生评估，测试了GPT-5.2和GLM-4.6等六个前沿MLLM。
AI.result: MLLMs与临床医生在牙科实践中存在性能差距；明确了模型优势与局限性；刻画了失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 该基准资源将促进下一代与临床认知、安全需求和工作流程复杂性相一致的AI系统开发。

title: Learning in the Fisher Subspace: A Guided Initialization for LoRA Fine-Tuning
summary: LoRA adapts large language models (LLMs) by restricting updates to low-rank subspaces of pre-trained weights. While this substantially reduces training cost, the effectiveness of adaptation critically depends on which subspace is chosen at initialization: a poor initialization that allocates capacity to task-irrelevant directions can severely hinder downstream performance. Existing initialization strategies primarily rely on the intrinsic properties of pre-trained weights, implicitly assuming that weight geometry alone reflects task relevance. However, such criteria overlook how the model interacts with the downstream data distribution. In this work, we formulate LoRA initialization as identifying the degree of impact of directions in parameter space under the target data distribution. We argue that data-aware sensitivity, rather than weight-only magnitude, should govern the choice of adaptation subspaces. Building on this perspective, we propose a Fisher-guided framework that leverages curvature information induced by downstream data to characterize how parameter perturbations influence model predictions. This perspective yields a principled, task-dependent criterion for selecting LoRA directions that better align adaptation with the target objective. Empirical results across diverse tasks and modalities demonstrate that data-aware initialization consistently and significantly improves downstream performance over existing approaches.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种基于Fisher信息的数据感知LoRA初始化方法，通过利用下游数据的曲率信息来选择更优的低秩适应子空间，显著提升了模型在下游任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有LoRA初始化仅依赖预训练权重的内在属性（如权重幅度），忽视了模型与下游数据分布的交互，导致初始化方向可能与任务无关，严重制约下游性能。
AI.method: 将LoRA初始化建模为参数空间方向对目标数据分布的影响度问题，提出Fisher引导框架，利用下游数据诱导的曲率信息（Fisher信息矩阵）来衡量参数扰动对模型预测的影响，以此作为选择LoRA方向的数据感知准则。
AI.result: 在多种任务和模态上，数据感知的LoRA初始化方法一致且显著优于现有基于权重幅度等传统初始化策略。
AI.conclusion: 数据感知的敏感性指标应取代仅依赖权重的幅度指标来指导适应子空间的选择，使LoRA初始化更贴合目标任务。

title: HEJ-Robust: A Robustness Benchmark for LLM-Based Automated Program Repair
summary: Recent Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown strong performance on automated program repair across standard benchmarks. However, these benchmarks evaluate models on a single canonical form of buggy code and do not reflect the syntactic variations commonly observed in real-world software, leaving robustness largely unexamined. In this work, we construct HEJ-Robust, a robustness benchmark built from HumanEval-Java-Bug using eight semantics-preserving code transformations, resulting in 1,450 transformed instances. We evaluate five fine-tuned LLMs on this benchmark and show that model performance drops by over 50% under several transformations, indicating that current LLM-based repair models lack robustness to minor syntactic variations.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了HEJ-Robust鲁棒性基准，发现现有LLM修复模型在语法变体上性能下降超50%，缺乏鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有自动程序修复基准仅评估标准形式，未考虑真实软件中的语法变体，鲁棒性未得到检验。
AI.method: 基于HumanEval-Java-Bug，使用8种语义保持的代码变换构建包含1,450个实例的鲁棒性基准HEJ-Robust，评估5个微调LLM。
AI.result: 在多种代码变换下，模型性能下降超过50%，表明当前LLM修复模型对轻微语法变体缺乏鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: LLM在程序修复中对语法变体敏感，现有基准未能充分评估模型鲁棒性，需改进。

title: Generalized Category Discovery under Domain Shifts: From Vision to Vision-Language Models
summary: Generalized Category Discovery (GCD) aims to categorize unlabelled instances from both known and unknown classes by transferring knowledge from labelled data of known classes. Existing methods assume all data comes from a single domain, yet real-world unlabelled data often exhibits domain shifts alongside semantic shifts. We study GCD under domain shifts and propose three frameworks that adapt foundation models, ranging from self-supervised vision models to vision-language models. (i) HiLo disentangles domain and semantic features through multi-level feature extraction and mutual information minimization, combined with PatchMix augmentation and curriculum sampling. (ii) HLPrompt extends HiLo with semantic-aware spatial prompt tuning to suppress background and domain noise. (iii) VLPrompt leverages vision-language models via factorized textual prompts and cross-modal consistency regularization. The three methods share core design principles while operating on different foundation backbones, making them suitable for different deployment scenarios. Extensive experiments on synthetic corruptions and real-world multi-domain shifts demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines. Project page: https://visual-ai.github.io/hilo/

AI.tldr: 本文研究域迁移下的广义类别发现（GCD）问题，提出三种适配不同基础模型（自监督视觉模型和视觉-语言模型）的框架：HiLo、HLPrompt和VLPrompt，通过解耦域特征与语义特征、空间提示调优和跨模态一致性正则化等方法，在合成损坏和真实多域场景中均取得显著改进。
AI.motivation: 现有GCD方法假设所有数据来自单一域，但现实中的未标注数据往往同时存在域迁移和语义迁移，现有方法无法处理域偏移问题。
AI.method: 提出三种框架：(i) HiLo通过多级特征提取和互信息最小化解耦域与语义特征，结合PatchMix增强和课程采样；(ii) HLPrompt引入语义感知空间提示调优抑制背景和域噪声；(iii) VLPrompt利用视觉-语言模型，采用因子化文本提示和跨模态一致性正则化。
AI.result: 在合成损坏和真实多域迁移场景下进行大量实验，相比强基线方法持续取得改进。
AI.conclusion: 三种方法共享核心设计原则，但运行于不同的基础骨干网络，适用于不同的部署场景，有效解决了域迁移下的GCD问题。

title: Uncertainty-Aware Trip Purpose Inference from GPS Trajectories via POI Semantic Zones and Pareto Calibration
summary: Large-scale GPS trajectory data offer rich observations of human mobility, yet assigning trip purposes to detected stops remains challenging due to the absence of individual-level ground truth, spatial uncertainty from GPS noise and incomplete points of interest (POIs) coverage, and fundamental behavioral differences across trip purposes. We propose a weakly supervised framework integrating neighborhood-level POI semantic zones with distance-weighted spatial likelihoods, differentiated inference strategies for mandatory and non-mandatory activities, and a multi-phase Pareto optimization that jointly minimizes distributional divergence from household travel survey statistics and maximizes inference reliability without requiring annotated labels. Evaluated on over 81 million staypoints in Los Angeles, the framework reduces activity type frequency Jensen-Shannon distance (JSD) by 23%, start time JSD by 48%, and duration JSD by 12% respectively relative to a comparable baseline. The proposed approach provides a scalable and uncertainty-aware path from raw GPS trajectories to semantically annotated mobility data for travel demand modeling and transportation policy analysis.

AI.tldr: 提出一个弱监督框架，利用邻域POI语义区、距离加权空间似然、区分化推理策略和多阶段帕累托优化，在不依赖标注数据的情况下，为大规模GPS轨迹数据推断出行目的。在洛杉矶8100万停留点数据上评估，活动类型频率JSD降低23%、开始时间JSD降低48%、持续时间JSD降低12%。
AI.motivation: 大规模GPS轨迹数据提供了丰富的人类移动观测，但为检测到的停留点分配出行目的面临三大挑战：缺乏个体级真值、GPS噪声和POI覆盖不完整导致的空间不确定性、以及不同出行目的间根本性的行为差异。现有方法依赖标注数据，成本高且难以扩展。
AI.method: 提出弱监督框架，包含：（1）邻域级POI语义区与距离加权空间似然；（2）针对强制性与非强制性活动的差异化推理策略；（3）多阶段帕累托优化，联合最小化与家庭出行调查统计的分布散度并最大化推理可靠性，无需标注标签。
AI.result: 在洛杉矶8100万停留点数据上评估，相比基线方法，活动类型频率JSD降低23%、开始时间JSD降低48%、持续时间JSD降低12%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一条从原始GPS轨迹到语义标注移动数据的可扩展、不确定性感知的路径，适用于出行需求建模和交通政策分析。

title: AlbumFill: Album-Guided Reasoning and Retrieval for Personalized Image Completion
summary: Personalized image completion aims to restore occluded regions in personal photos while preserving identity and appearance. Existing methods either rely on generic inpainting models that often fail to maintain identity consistency, or assume that suitable reference images are explicitly provided. In practice, suitable references are often not explicitly provided, requiring the system to search for identity-consistent images within personal photo collections. We present AlbumFill, a training-free framework that retrieves identity-consistent references from personal albums for personalized completion. Given an occluded image and a personal album, a vision-language model infers missing semantic cues to guide composed image retrieval, and the retrieved references are used by reference-based completion models. To facilitate this task, we introduce a dataset containing 54K human-centric samples with associated album images. Experiments across multiple baselines demonstrate the difficulty of personalized completion and highlight the importance of identity-consistent reference retrieval. Project Page: https://liagm.github.io/AlbumFill/

AI.tldr: AlbumFill是一个无需训练的框架，通过视觉语言模型从个人相册中检索身份一致性的参考图像，用于个性化图像修复，并提供了包含5.4万样本的数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么依赖通用修复模型导致身份不一致，要么假设参考图像已明确提供。实践中用户相册中缺乏显式参考图像，需要系统自动检索身份一致的图像。
AI.method: 1) 视觉语言模型推断缺失语义线索；2) 基于语义线索进行组合图像检索；3) 使用检索到的参考图像进行参考引导的修复。
AI.result: 构建了含5.4万人体中心样本的数据集，实验表明基线方法在此任务上存在困难，验证了身份一致参考检索的重要性。
AI.conclusion: AlbumFill通过自动检索相册中身份一致参考图像，实现了无需训练的个性化图像修复，解决了身份保持的关键挑战。

title: A Multi-View Media Profiling Suite: Resources, Evaluation, and Analysis
summary: News outlets shape public opinion at a scale that makes automated detection of political bias and factuality essential. However, the field still lacks unified resources, comprehensive evaluations across diverse approaches, and systematic analyses of the representations and fusion strategies that matter most, especially under label sparsity and dataset diversity. In addition, there is little empirical work reporting broad, observation-driven findings about what consistently works, what fails, and why. We address these gaps through four main contributions. First, we introduce MBFC-2025, a large-scale label set covering approximately 2,600 outlets from Media Bias/Fact Check (MBFC). Second, we construct multiview representations for ACL-2020 (Panayotov et al., 2022), which includes around 900 outlets, as well as for MBFC-2025. These representations span Alexa graphs, hyperlink graphs, LLM-derived graphs, articles, and Wikipedia descriptions. Third, we provide a systematic evaluation and analysis of embedding views and fusion strategies, including a reinforcement learning-based fusion variant. Fourth, we conduct extensive experiments that achieve state-of-the-art results on ACL-2020 and establish strong benchmarks on MBFC-2025.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过构建大规模标签集MBFC-2025（约2600个新闻媒体）、多视图表示（涵盖Alexa图、超链接图、LLM生成图、文章和Wikipedia描述）以及系统性评估，在新闻媒体政治偏见与事实性检测任务上取得了SOTA结果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏统一资源、全面评估和系统性分析，尤其缺乏在标签稀疏和数据集多样性条件下对表示方法和融合策略的实证发现。
AI.method: 1) 构建MBFC-2025大规模标签集；2) 构建多视图表示（Alexa图、超链接图、LLM图、文章、Wikipedia描述）；3) 系统性评估嵌入视图和融合策略（含强化学习融合变体）；4) 在ACL-2020和MBFC-2025上开展大规模实验。
AI.result: 在ACL-2020上达到SOTA，在MBFC-2025上建立了强基准。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了新闻偏见与事实性检测领域在统一资源、系统评估和实证分析方面的空白，为后续研究提供了重要基准和经验发现。

title: LEAP: Layer-wise Exit-Aware Pretraining for Efficient Transformer Inference
comment: Accepted at ACL 2026 (Industry Track). 14 pages, 5 figures
summary: Layer-aligned distillation and convergence-based early exit represent two predominant computational efficiency paradigms for transformer inference; yet we establish that they exhibit systematic incompatibility under standard deployment conditions for convergence-based early exit. Distillation objectives that align intermediate student layers to teacher representations suppress the representational convergence that early-exit mechanisms exploit, rendering such mechanisms ineffective on distilled models. We introduce LEAP (Layer-wise Exit-Aware Pretraining), an auxiliary training objective that reconciles this incompatibility. LEAP requires no architectural modifications; it augments standard distillation with a single constraint ensuring intermediate layers approximate final-layer representations. LEAP-MiniLM achieves 1.61$\times$ measured wall-clock speedup (batch=1, NVIDIA L4) at $θ$=0.95, with 91.9% of samples exiting by layer 7 and 1.80$\times$ theoretical layer reduction, where standard distilled models achieve zero effective speedup. We validate across sentence similarity (STS-B: 0.760 $\pm$ 0.006) and retrieval benchmarks (BEIR), providing operational guidance including latency measurements, decision thresholds, and deployment criteria.

AI.tldr: 本文指出蒸馏（layer-aligned distillation）与早退（convergence-based early exit）存在系统性的不兼容问题——蒸馏会抑制中间层的表示收敛，使早退机制失效。作者提出LEAP（逐层早退感知预训练），通过引入一个简单的辅助训练目标（让中间层逼近最终层表示）来调和这一矛盾。LEAP-MiniLM在保持高准确率的同时，实现了1.61倍的实际加速和1.80倍的理论层数缩减。
AI.motivation: 现有研究分别优化了Transformer推理的两种效率范式——逐层对齐蒸馏和基于收敛的早退，但作者发现二者在标准部署条件下存在系统性的不兼容：蒸馏目标迫使中间层对齐教师层表示，反而抑制了早退机制所依赖的层间表示收敛，导致早退在蒸馏模型上完全失效。
AI.method: 提出LEAP（Layer-wise Exit-Aware Pretraining）辅助训练目标。无需修改模型架构，仅在标准蒸馏基础上增加一个约束：确保中间层表示逼近最终层表示，从而在蒸馏过程中保留层间收敛性，使早退机制重新生效。
AI.result: 在NVIDIA L4 GPU上（batch=1），LEAP-MiniLM在阈值θ=0.95时达到1.61倍实测加速，91.9%的样本在第7层之前退出，理论层数缩减1.80倍；而标准蒸馏模型的有效加速为零。在STS-B语义相似度（0.760±0.006）和BEIR检索基准上均得到验证。
AI.conclusion: LEAP有效解决了蒸馏与早退的不兼容问题，为蒸馏模型部署早退机制提供了可行方案，并给出了包括延迟测量、决策阈值和部署标准在内的实操指导。

title: The Conversations Beneath the Code: Triadic Data for Long-Horizon Software Engineering Agents
summary: Frontier software engineering agents have saturated short-horizon benchmarks while regressing on the work that constitutes senior engineering: long-horizon, multi-engineer, ambiguous-specification deliverables. This paper takes a position on what training data is needed to close the gap. The substrate for the next generation of SWE agents is neither larger GitHub scrapes nor more solo-agent trajectories nor -- sufficient by itself -- open human-AI dialogue logs. It is triadic data: synchronized capture of the human-human conversations where engineering context is formed, the human-AI sessions where that context is partially consumed, and the multi-week cross-functional work that surrounds both. We argue that the canonical instantiation of triadic data is two complementary products: long-horizon expert trajectories captured under stimulated-recall protocols, and simulated cross-functional companies -- instrumented teams of senior engineers, product managers, designers, and data scientists working through ambiguous deliverables on shared infrastructure. We further specify a four-tier evidence framework through which any such corpus -- triadic or otherwise -- must justify its quality to a fine-tuning researcher: mechanical verification, statistical corpus characterization, probe experiments, and pre-registered blind evaluation. We argue that this data is capturable in 12-18 months with methods already mature in adjacent fields, that it is the empirical key to four open questions in agent training, and that the field's near-term research agenda should include it explicitly.

AI.tldr: 本文认为下一代软件工程智能体需要"三元数据"（人类对话、人机交互、跨职能协作）而非传统的GitHub数据或单人轨迹数据，并提出12-18个月内可采集的解决方案与四层证据评估框架。
AI.motivation: 现有SWE智能体在短期基准上已饱和，但在高级工程师所需的长期、多工程师、模糊规格交付任务上表现倒退。当前训练数据（GitHub爬取、单人轨迹、人机对话日志）不足以弥合这一差距。
AI.method: 提出三元数据范式：(1) 人类-人类对话（工程上下文形成），(2) 人类-AI会话（上下文部分消费），(3) 跨职能数周协作工作。具体实现为：长期专家轨迹（刺激回忆协议采集）和模拟跨职能公司（工程师、PM、设计师、数据科学家在共享基础设施上处理模糊交付物）。同时提出四层证据框架（机械验证、统计语料表征、探针实验、预注册盲评）来评估数据质量。
AI.result: 论文本身是position paper，未呈现实验结果，但论证了：(1) 该数据可在12-18个月内用已有成熟方法采集；(2) 是解决智能体训练中四个开放问题的实证关键；(3) 领域近期研究议程应明确包含此类数据。
AI.conclusion: 下一代SWE智能体的训练数据应从二元（人+代码）转向三元（人-人对话、人-AI交互、跨职能协作），并需通过四层证据框架验证数据质量。作者呼吁研究社区将此类数据采集作为近期优先事项。

title: TRIP-Evaluate: An Open Multimodal Benchmark for Evaluating Large Models in Transportation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) and multimodal large models (MLLMs) are increasingly used for transportation tasks such as regulation question answering, traffic management support, engineering review, and autonomous-driving scene reasoning. Yet transportation workflows are rule-intensive, computation-intensive, safety-critical, and inherently multimodal. Existing general benchmarks provide limited evidence of whether a model can apply regulations correctly, perform verifiable engineering calculations, or interpret traffic scenes reliably, while the small number of public transportation benchmarks remain narrow in scope and rarely support fine-grained diagnosis across text, images, and point-cloud data. To address this gap, we present TRIP-Evaluate, an open multimodal benchmark for large models in transportation. The benchmark organizes 837 items using a role-task-knowledge taxonomy that covers vehicle, traffic-management, traveler, and planning-and-design functions. Each item is annotated with capability, modality, and difficulty labels, enabling diagnosis from overall accuracy down to specific failure modes. The current release includes 596 text items, 198 image items, and 43 point-cloud items. TRIP-Evaluate also standardizes item construction, quality control, prompting, decoding, and scoring to improve cross-model comparability. Results on a diverse panel of models show that text-based performance is improving, but substantial weaknesses remain in multi-step engineering calculation, rule-constrained reasoning, multimodal scene understanding, and point-cloud understanding. Overall, TRIP-Evaluate provides a reproducible, diagnosable, and engineering-aligned evaluation baseline for model selection, regression testing, and safer deployment in transportation applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TRIP-Evaluate，一个面向交通领域大模型的多模态开放基准，包含837个按角色-任务-知识分类的测试项，覆盖文本、图像和点云数据，用于系统评估模型在规则推理、工程计算和多模态场景理解等方面的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有通用基准无法验证模型在交通领域能否正确应用法规、执行可验证的工程计算或可靠地解释交通场景，而少量公开的交通基准范围狭窄且缺乏细粒度诊断能力。
AI.method: 构建了包含837个项目的多模态基准，采用角色-任务-知识分类体系，覆盖车辆、交通管理、出行者、规划与设计四大功能，对每个项目标注能力、模态和难度，并标准化项目构建、质量控制、提示、解码和评分流程。
AI.result: 在多种模型上的评估表明，文本性能有所提升，但在多步工程计算、规则约束推理、多模态场景理解和点云理解方面仍存在显著不足。
AI.conclusion: TRIP-Evaluate为交通应用中的模型选择、回归测试和安全部署提供了可复现、可诊断且贴近工程实际的评估基线。

title: Valley3: Scaling Omni Foundation Models for E-commerce
summary: In this work, we present Valley3, an omni multimodal large language model (MLLM) developed for diverse global e-commerce tasks, with unified understanding and reasoning capabilities across text, images, video, and audio. A key feature of Valley3 is its native multilingual audio capability for e-commerce, developed by extending vision-language models to better support crucial audio-visual tasks, particularly in short-video scenarios. To achieve this, we carefully design a four-stage omni e-commerce continued pre-training pipeline, through which Valley3 progressively acquires audio understanding, cross-modal instruction-following, e-commerce domain knowledge, and long-context reasoning capabilities, ultimately evolving into an omni model for diverse e-commerce scenarios. Then, we further improve Valley3 through post-training to encourage long-chain reasoning with controllable reasoning modes, enabling one non-thinking mode and three distinct levels of thinking, thereby balancing inference efficiency in simple scenarios with deep reasoning for complex applications. Moreover, we equip Valley3 with agentic search capabilities to proactively invoke search tools and acquire task-relevant information for e-commerce deep research tasks. To comprehensively assess the capabilities of Valley3, we construct an omni e-commerce benchmark spanning 6 tasks. Experimental results show that Valley3 consistently outperforms strong baselines on our in-house and open-source e-commerce benchmarks, while remaining competitive on general-domain benchmarks.

AI.tldr: Valley3是一个为全球电商任务设计的全能多模态大语言模型，支持文本、图像、视频和音频的统一理解与推理，具备原生多语言音频能力、四阶段预训练流水线、可控推理模式（非思考+三种思考级别）和智能搜索能力，在电商基准测试上优于强基线模型。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型在电商场景中缺乏对多模态（尤其是音频）的统一支持，且难以兼顾简单场景的高效推理和复杂场景的深度推理，因此需要构建一个专为电商设计的全能多模态模型。
AI.method: 1. 设计四阶段电商持续预训练流水线，逐步获取音频理解、跨模态指令跟随、电商领域知识和长上下文推理能力；2. 通过后训练引入可控推理模式（非思考模式+三种思考级别）；3. 配备智能搜索能力以主动获取任务相关信息。
AI.result: 在自建的和开源的电商基准测试上，Valley3持续优于强基线模型，同时在通用领域基准测试上保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: Valley3通过精心设计的四阶段预训练、可控推理模式和智能搜索能力，有效解决了电商场景中多模态理解和推理的挑战，为电商应用提供了统一的解决方案。

title: MAD-OPD: Breaking the Ceiling in On-Policy Distillation via Multi-Agent Debate
comment: Preprint. 9-page main paper + appendix. 8 figures, 7 tables. Code: https://github.com/chiefovoavicii/MAD-OPD
summary: On-policy distillation (OPD) trains a student on its own trajectories under token-level teacher supervision, but existing methods are capped by a single-teacher capability ceiling: when the teacher errs, the student inherits the error. OPD also remains largely unexplored in agentic tasks, where per-step errors compound across long trajectories and destabilize training. We propose MAD-OPD (Multi-Agent Debate-driven On-Policy Distillation), which breaks this ceiling by recasting the distillation teacher as a deliberative collective of teachers that debate over the student's on-policy state; the debate produces an emergent collective intelligence that supplies token-level supervision, with each teacher's contribution weighted by its post-debate confidence. To extend OPD to agentic tasks, we also introduce On-Policy Agentic Distillation (OPAD), which adds step-level sampling to stabilize training under multi-step error compounding. We additionally derive a task-adaptive divergence principle, selecting JSD (Jensen-Shannon divergence) for agentic stability and reverse KL (Kullback-Leibler) divergence for code generation, and verify it both theoretically and empirically. Across six teacher-student configurations (Qwen3 and Qwen3.5; 1.7B-14B students, 8B-32B teachers) and five agentic and code benchmarks, MAD-OPD ranks first across all six configurations; on the 14B+8B$\to$4B setting it lifts the agentic average by $+2.4\%$ and the code average by $+3.7\%$ over the stronger single-teacher OPD.

AI.tldr: 提出MAD-OPD框架，通过多教师辩论打破单教师蒸馏的性能天花板，并引入OPAD扩展至智能体任务，实现跨配置的SOTA性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有on-policy蒸馏（OPD）受限于单教师能力天花板——教师出错时学生会继承错误，且OPD在智能体任务中因长轨迹的逐层错误累积导致训练不稳定。
AI.method: 1. MAD-OPD：多个教师对学生的on-policy状态进行辩论，产生涌现集体智能，按辩论后置信度加权贡献；2. OPAD：引入逐步骤采样稳定智能体任务训练；3. 任务自适应散度原理：智能体任务选JSD，代码生成选reverse KL。
AI.result: 在6种师生配置（Qwen3/Qwen3.5，1.7B-14B学生，8B-32B教师）和5个智能体/代码基准上，MAD-OPD排名第一；14B+8B→4B设置下，智能体平均+2.4%，代码平均+3.7%。
AI.conclusion: 多教师辩论蒸馏打破了单教师能力天花板，OPAD稳定了智能体任务训练，任务自适应散度原则理论验证有效。

title: GEODE: Angle-Adaptive OOD Detection with Universal Scorer Compatibility
summary: Outlier Exposure (OE) is among the strongest training-based OOD detectors on standard benchmarks but exhibits scorer-dependent tradeoffs (e.g., strong on MSP, weak on KNN) and requires curated auxiliary data. We show why OE works: its features sit at the same geometric locus as real near-OOD data, with the boundary-adjacent quartile driving nearly all of OE's gain. OE is boundary calibration, not OOD coverage. GEODE (GEOmetry-preserving DEtection) replicates this calibration synthetically through an angle-adaptive norm loss in which targets scale per-sample with cosine similarity to the nearest class mean, preserving feature geometry where boundary structure matters. Four theorems grounded in neural collapse justify the design. GEODE works across all seven standard scorers on CIFAR-10 (near-OOD AUROC 89.0-92.3, far-OOD reaching 93.05; no catastrophic failure on any scorer). Since the OOD regime is unknown at deployment, this is the test that matters. GEODE outperforms vanilla CE at matched epoch counts. Combined with OE, GEODE reaches 95.0 MSP / 94.8 KNN on CIFAR-10 and beats OE on every scorer on CIFAR-100. The gains hold on WRN-28-10 (+4.5 Energy, 3 seeds). Unlike methods that push OOD into the classifier null space (e.g., PFS, 14.38 KNN AUROC, worse than random), GEODE's adaptive target preserves the geometry that distance-based scorers depend on.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GEODE方法，通过几何保持的合成异常暴露训练，解决了传统Outlier Exposure在不同评分器上的性能权衡问题，在所有七个标准OOD检测评分器上均表现优异，且无需真实辅助数据。
AI.motivation: 传统Outlier Exposure方法虽然有效，但存在两个关键问题：(1) 依赖精心挑选的辅助数据；(2) 在不同评分器上表现不均（如MSP强但KNN弱）。作者希望找到一种无需真实数据、且在所有评分器上一致有效的方法。
AI.method: 提出GEODE方法：通过角度自适应的范数损失（angle-adaptive norm loss），每个样本的目标范数根据其与最近类中心的余弦相似度动态缩放。这种方法保留了特征空间的几何结构，特别是对边界结构至关重要的区域。四个理论定理基于神经坍缩（Neural Collapse）原理证明设计合理性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10上，GEODE在所有七个标准评分器上表现一致（near-OOD AUROC 89.0-92.3，far-OOD达93.05），无灾难性失败。联合OE后达到MSP 95.0/KNN 94.8。在CIFAR-100上全面超越OE。在WRN-28-10网络上Energy评分提升4.5。
AI.conclusion: OE的本质是边界校准而非OOD全覆盖。GEODE通过合成方式复现了这一校准效果，其自适应目标保留了基于距离的评分器所依赖的几何结构，避免了PFS等方法将OOD数据推入分类器零空间导致KNN评分失效的问题。

title: CommitSuite: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Commit Classification and Message Generation
summary: High-quality commit messages are critical for maintaining software projects, yet ensuring their consistency and informativeness remains a practical challenge. While the Conventional Commits Specification (CCS) provides a structured format for commit messages, research on CCS-based commit classification and commit message generation (CMG) is limited by the absence of large-scale benchmarks, semantic annotations, and reliable evaluation methods. In this paper, we introduce CommitSuite, a benchmark comprising 63,533 CCS-compliant commits from 243 open-source repositories across seven programming languages. Each commit is labeled with its CCS type and enriched with AST-level code changes, along with LLM-assisted semantic annotations that capture the "what" and "why" behind the change. To evaluate CMG systems, we propose a reference-free framework based on five binary metrics: rationality, comprehensiveness, non-redundancy, authenticity, and logicality, enabling semantic-level assessment without relying on human-written references. Our experiments show that LLMs can effectively support both generation and evaluation, with evaluation achieving 0.849 Cohen's Kappa agreement against human judgments. CommitSuite offers a unified resource for structured commit understanding and facilitates reproducible research on commit classification and generation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CommitSuite基准数据集，包含63,533个符合Conventional Commits规范的提交记录，并设计了基于五个二进制指标的无参考评估框架，实验表明LLM能有效支持提交信息的生成与评估。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏大规模、语义标注的CCS基准数据集，且提交信息生成系统的评估方法不够可靠，限制了结构化提交信息的理解和研究可重复性。
AI.method: 构建了包含63,533个CCS合规提交的基准数据集，覆盖7种编程语言的243个开源仓库；每个提交标注了CCS类型、AST级代码变更和LLM辅助语义注释；提出基于合理性、全面性、非冗余性、真实性和逻辑性五个指标的无参考评估框架。
AI.result: LLM在提交信息生成和评估两方面均表现出色，评估结果与人工判断的Cohen's Kappa一致性达到0.849。
AI.conclusion: CommitSuite为结构化提交理解提供了统一资源，促进可重复的提交分类与生成研究。

title: Comparative Evaluation of Convolutional and Transformer-Based Detectors for Automated Weed Detection in Precision Agriculture
summary: This paper presents a comparative evaluation of convolutional and transformer-based object detection architectures for early weed detection in realistic scenarios. Representative models from each paradigm are considered, including YOLOv26-nano, a recent variant of the YOLO family, and transformer-based approaches such as RTDETR and RF-DETR. Experiments were conducted on the GROUNDBASED_ WEED dataset, allowing performance to be evaluated in terms of detection accuracy and computational efficiency using metrics such as precision, recall, average precision, and inference speed. The results highlight a clear trade-off between efficiency and contextual modeling: CNN-based detectors achieve high performance at a lower computational cost, while transformer-based approaches offer better global context capture at the expense of higher resource demands. These results provide practical criteria for model selection in precision agriculture applications.

AI.tldr: 本文对比评估了卷积神经网络(CNN)和Transformer两类目标检测架构在早期杂草检测任务中的表现，实验基于GROUNDBASED_WEED数据集，发现CNN检测器（如YOLOv6-nano）在较低计算成本下表现优异，而Transformer方法（如RTDETR、RF-DETR）虽能更好捕捉全局上下文但资源需求更高，为精准农业中的模型选择提供了实用参考。
AI.motivation: 早期杂草检测对精准农业至关重要，但目前缺乏对不同架构（CNN vs. Transformer）在真实场景下综合性能（精度与效率）的系统比较，难以指导实际应用中的模型选型。
AI.method: 选取代表性模型（YOLOv6-nano、RTDETR、RF-DETR），在GROUNDBASED_WEED数据集上进行实验，采用精度、召回率、平均精度和推理速度等指标，从检测准确性和计算效率两个维度进行对比评估。
AI.result: CNN检测器（如YOLOv6-nano）在较低计算成本下实现了高性能；Transformer方法（RTDETR、RF-DETR）虽能更好地捕获全局上下文信息，但资源消耗更高。两类方法存在明显的效率与上下文建模能力之间的权衡。
AI.conclusion: 研究为精准农业场景下的模型选择提供了实用标准：若计算资源有限且追求效率，优先选CNN架构；若需更强的全局上下文建模能力且资源充足，可考虑Transformer架构。

title: Lifting Traces to Logic: Programmatic Skill Induction with Neuro-Symbolic Learning for Long-Horizon Agentic Tasks
summary: Foundation model-driven agents often struggle with long-horizon planning due to the transient nature of purely prompting-based reasoning. While existing skill induction methods mitigate this by distilling experience into state-blind parameterized scripts, they fail to capture the conditional logic required for robust execution in dynamic environments. In this paper, we propose Neuro-Symbolic Skill Induction (NSI), a framework that lifts interaction traces into modular, \textit{logic-grounded} programs. By synthesizing explicit control flows and dynamic variable binding, NSI empowers agents to discover \textit{when} and \textit{why} to act. This paradigm enables the efficient generalization, allowing agents to induce skills from few-shot examples and flexibly adapt to unseen goals. Experiments on a series of agentic tasks demonstrate that NSI consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, empowering agents to self-evolve into architects of logic-grounded skills.

AI.tldr: 提出神经符号技能归纳（NSI）框架，将交互轨迹转化为带逻辑的程序，使智能体掌握何时及为何行动，在长程规划任务中超越现有基线。
AI.motivation: 大模型驱动的智能体在长程规划中受限于纯提示推理的短暂性，现有技能归纳方法虽可提取经验，但生成的脚本缺乏状态感知和条件逻辑，难以应对动态环境。
AI.method: 提出神经符号技能归纳（NSI）框架，将交互轨迹提升为模块化、逻辑驱动的程序，通过合成显式控制流和动态变量绑定，让智能体自主发现行动的时机与原因。
AI.result: 在多个智能体任务上，NSI一致优于当前最优基线方法，支持少样本技能归纳并灵活适应未见目标。
AI.conclusion: NSI能使智能体自我进化为逻辑技能的设计者，显著提升长程规划中的泛化能力和鲁棒性。

title: LLM Output Detectability and Task Performance Can be Jointly Optimized
summary: Detecting machine-generated text is essential for transparency and accountability when deploying large language models (LLMs). Among detection approaches, watermarking is a statistically reliable method by design -- it embeds detectable signals into LLM outputs by biasing their token distributions. However, it has been reported that watermarked LLMs often perform worse on downstream tasks. We propose PUPPET, a framework that fine-tunes an LLM via reinforcement learning to generate text that is both more detectable and better performing on downstream tasks. We use two reward functions: a detector that outputs a machine-class likelihood and an evaluator that measures a task-specific metric. Experiments on long-form QA, summarization, and essay writing show that LLMs trained with PUPPET achieve high detectability competitive with watermarking methods while outperforming them on downstream tasks. The analysis shows that this optimization can be performed efficiently with only a few thousand samples in 1--2 GPU hours. Moreover, these gains are consistent across out-of-domain tasks, different LLM families, and model sizes, and are even robust to paraphrasing attacks.

AI.tldr: PUPPET是一个通过强化学习微调LLM的框架，使用检测和任务评估两个奖励函数，使生成文本在可检测性和下游任务性能上均优于传统水印方法，且高效、鲁棒。
AI.motivation: 现有水印方法虽能可靠检测机器生成文本，但会导致LLM在下游任务上性能下降，需要在可检测性与任务表现之间进行权衡。
AI.method: 提出PUPPET框架，通过强化学习（RL）微调LLM，使用两个奖励函数：一个检测器输出机器类别似然，一个评估器衡量任务特定指标，联合优化可检测性和下游任务性能。
AI.result: 在长文本问答、摘要和论文写作任务上，PUPPET训练后的LLM实现了与水印方法相当的高可检测性，同时在多个下游任务中表现更优；仅需数千样本和1-2 GPU小时即可高效完成优化；在跨领域、不同LLM家族和模型规模上表现一致，且对释义攻击具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: PUPPET框架成功解决了水印导致性能下降的问题，实现了可检测性与任务质量的双赢，且具备高效、跨领域泛化和抗攻击的实用优势。

title: A dimensional R2 regression metric
summary: R2 score is the standard metric for evaluating regression tasks, offering a normalized magnitude-agnostic measure of accuracy that captures variance. However, R2 has three key limitations: it is limited to at most two dimensional inputs, it reduces the score to a single scalar that hides rich patterns of prediction accuracy, and it is sensitive to low-variance noise channels which can yield large, uninterpretable negative values. We introduce the Dimensional R2 score (Dim-R2), a simple extension of R2 that accepts data of arbitrary dimensionality, provides a multidimensional view of accuracy, and reduces sensitivity to noise. We demonstrate its advantages on both synthetic sinusoidal data and three multidimensional regression datasets. Dim-R2 offers an interpretable and flexible metric that highlights patterns in regression accuracy, guiding regression modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Dim-R2，一种扩展的R²评分，支持任意维度数据、提供多维准确性视图、降低噪声敏感度，并在合成与真实多维回归数据集上验证其优势。
AI.motivation: 标准R²评分存在三个关键局限：仅支持最多二维输入、将准确性压缩为单一标量而隐藏丰富模式、对低方差噪声通道敏感导致大而不可解释的负值。因此需要一种更灵活、可解释的多维回归评估指标。
AI.method: 提出Dimensional R²（Dim-R2），对传统R²进行简单扩展，使其能接受任意维度数据，提供多维准确性视角，并降低对噪声的敏感性。
AI.result: 在合成正弦数据和三个多维回归数据集上验证了Dim-R2的优势，展示了其在揭示回归准确性模式方面的能力。
AI.conclusion: Dim-R2是一种可解释且灵活的回归评估指标，能够突出回归准确性的模式，从而指导回归建模。

title: These Aren't the Reviews You're Looking For How Humans Review AI-Generated Pull Requests
summary: We analyze code review interactions for AI-generated pull requests (PRs) on GitHub using the AIDev dataset and compare them to human-authored PRs within the same repositories. We find that most AI-generated PRs receive no review and, when reviewed, are largely dominated by AI agents rather than humans. Human-authored PRs are more likely to receive human-only review and to attract direct human feedback. In contrast, reviews of AI-generated PRs more often take the form of automation-mediated interaction, with human involvement frequently expressed through agent steering rather than standalone evaluation. These results indicate systematic differences in how review activity is structured in agentic workflows and raise challenges for interpreting review metrics as indicators of human oversight in large-scale mining studies.

AI.tldr: 该研究分析了AI生成PR的代码审查交互模式，发现AI生成的PR多数无人审查，即使被审查也主要由AI代理完成，而人类审查更多集中在人类编写的PR上。
AI.motivation: 探索AI生成PR与人类编写PR在代码审查交互模式上的系统性差异，质疑审查指标作为人类监督指标的可靠性。
AI.method: 使用AIDev数据集，对比GitHub上AI生成PR和人类编写PR的审查交互模式，分析审查主体（人类、AI代理）和交互类型。
AI.result: AI生成PR多数无审查；审查时主要由AI代理主导；人类审查更多集中在人类PR上；AI生成PR的审查更多表现为自动化中介交互，人类参与常通过"agent steering"而非独立评估。
AI.conclusion: AI生成PR与人类PR在审查活动结构上存在系统性差异，这对将审查指标解释为人类监督的指标构成挑战。

title: When Good OCR Is Not Enough: Benchmarking OCR Robustness for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Industrial Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems depend on optical character recognition (OCR) to transform visual documents into text. Existing OCR benchmarks rely on character-level metrics, which inadequately measure downstream RAG effectiveness under real-world conditions. We introduce an OCR benchmark for industrial RAG systems covering 11 challenging document types, including extreme layouts, high-resolution pages, complex or watermarked backgrounds, historical documents with non-standard reading orders, visually decorated text, and documents containing tables and mathematical formulas. Evaluating recent SOTA OCR models under a controlled OCR-first RAG pipeline shows clear performance degradation on realistic industrial documents despite strong conventional benchmark scores. We find that high OCR accuracy does not necessarily translate into strong downstream RAG performance: structural and semantic errors can cause substantial retrieval failures even when WER/CER remains low. Further analysis shows that this mismatch is category-dependent, arises through both retrieval-side and downstream generation-side failures, and remains stable across representative OCR-first pipeline choices. The benchmark is publicly available at https://github.com/Qihoo360/InduOCRBench.

AI.tldr: 提出面向工业RAG系统的OCR基准测试InduOCRBench，覆盖11种复杂文档类型，发现传统OCR指标（WER/CER）无法准确反映下游RAG性能，结构性和语义错误即使在高OCR准确率下也会导致检索失败。
AI.motivation: 现有OCR基准依赖字符级指标（如WER/CER），无法有效衡量在真实工业RAG场景下OCR对下游检索和生成效果的影响，缺乏针对工业级复杂文档类型的评估基准。
AI.method: 构建包含11种挑战性文档类型的基准（极端布局、高分辨率、水印背景、非常规阅读顺序等），在受控的OCR优先RAG流水线下评估SOTA OCR模型，对比传统指标与下游RAG性能。
AI.result: SOTA模型在工业文档上性能显著下降；高OCR准确率不一定带来高RAG性能；结构性和语义错误即使字符级指标低也会导致检索失败；该不匹配具有类别依赖性，且在检索侧和生成侧均有体现，对流水线选择保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: 现有OCR评估指标不足以反映工业RAG系统的真实需求，需要更关注文档的结构和语义理解，而非仅追求字符级准确率。

title: Segment-Aligned Policy Optimization for Multi-Modal Reasoning
summary: Existing reinforcement learning approaches for Large Language Models typically perform policy optimization at the granularity of individual tokens or entire response sequences. However, such formulations often misalign with the natural step-wise structure of reasoning processes, leading to suboptimal credit assignment and unstable training in multi-modal reasoning tasks. To bridge this gap, we propose Segment-Aligned Policy Optimization (SAPO), a novel reinforcement learning paradigm that treats coherent reasoning steps, rather than tokens or full sequences as fundamental units of policy update. SAPO introduces a step-wise Markov decision process abstraction over reasoning segments, accompanied by segment-level value estimation, advantage computation, and importance sampling mechanisms that are semantically aligned with reasoning boundaries. Experiments on representative reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that SAPO consistently outperforms token-level and sequence-level policy optimization methods, achieving significant accuracy improvements while exhibiting better training stability and value estimation consistency. Our work underscores the importance of aligning reinforcement learning updates with the intrinsic structure of reasoning, paving the way for more efficient and semantically grounded policy optimization in complex reasoning tasks. Codes and models will be released to ensure full reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 提出SAPO方法，将推理过程中的语义片段（而非token或完整序列）作为策略优化的基本单元，通过片段级MDP抽象、价值估计和优势计算，在推理任务上优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在token级或序列级进行策略优化，与多模态推理任务中自然的步骤式推理结构不匹配，导致信用分配不佳和训练不稳定。
AI.method: SAPO将推理片段作为基本优化单元，构建步骤级MDP抽象，引入片段级价值估计、优势计算和重要性采样机制，使其与推理边界语义对齐。
AI.result: 在多个代表性推理基准上，SAPO在准确率、训练稳定性和价值估计一致性方面均优于token级和序列级策略优化方法。
AI.conclusion: 将强化学习更新与推理的内在结构对齐至关重要，SAPO为复杂推理任务中更高效、语义更扎实的策略优化提供了新方向。

title: On Stable Long-Form Generation: Benchmarking and Mitigating Length Volatility
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) excel at long-context understanding but exhibit significant limitations in long-form generation. Existing studies primarily focus on single-generation quality, generally overlooking the volatility of the output. This volatility not only leads to significant computational costs but also severely impacts the models' reliable application. To address this gap, our work unfolds in three stages: benchmarking, probing, and mitigation. We first propose the VOlatility in Long-form Text Benchmark (VOLTBench), a novel heterogeneous-task benchmark designed to systematically quantify the length volatility of long-form generation. Subsequently, by analyzing attention traces, we conduct an in-depth probe to identify several common internal patterns that cause this volatility. Finally, to mitigate long-form output volatility, we propose Stable Generation via Logits Boosting (GLoBo), a lightweight decoding-stage optimization strategy, designed to significantly enhance both the length accuracy and stability of long-form generation without additional training. Extensive experiments on VOLTBench provide the first systematic confirmation of severe long-form output instability in mainstream models and validate that our proposed method successfully improves the mean output length of the base model by 148% and reduces the length volatility by 69%, while maintaining high generation quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VOLTBench基准来量化大模型长文本生成的波动性，通过注意力追踪分析内部原因，并提出GLoBo方法（无需训练的logits优化策略）将长度准确性提升148%、波动性降低69%。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注长文本单次生成质量，忽视了输出波动性问题。这种波动不仅带来巨大计算成本，还严重影响模型的可靠应用。
AI.method: 三阶段方法：(1) 提出VOLTBench异构任务基准，系统量化长文本生成的波动性；(2) 通过注意力追踪分析，识别导致波动的内部模式；(3) 提出GLoBo（Stable Generation via Logits Boosting），一种轻量级解码阶段优化策略，无需额外训练即可提升长度准确性和稳定性。
AI.result: VOLTBench首次系统证实主流模型存在严重的输出不稳定性；GLoBo将基础模型的平均输出长度提升148%，长度波动性降低69%，同时保持高生成质量。
AI.conclusion: 长文本生成存在严重的输出波动问题，但可通过解码阶段的轻量级优化（如GLoBo）有效缓解，无需重新训练模型。

title: Deep Variational Inference Symbolic Regression
summary: Symbolic regression discovers explicit, interpretable equations without assuming a functional form in advance. A Bayesian approach strengthens this through probability distributions over candidate expressions, thus quantifying uncertainty in the presence of noisy and limited data. Deep Symbolic Regression (DSR) uses a neural network to generate symbolic expressions, but it is designed to identify a single best-fitting expression rather than infer a posterior distribution over models. We introduce Deep Variational Inference Symbolic Regression (DVISR), a variational Bayesian extension of DSR. DVISR replaces the original reward with the integrand of the evidence lower bound. It also extends the network architecture to output distributions over constants within expressions, enabling posterior inference over both expression trees and their associated constants. We show that DVISR can recover the true posterior in simple settings, both with and without constant tokens, and we examine how its performance changes as the size of the expression space increases. These results position DVISR as a step toward scalable Bayesian symbolic regression with uncertainty over full symbolic models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DVISR，一种变分贝叶斯扩展的深度符号回归方法，通过用ELBO替代原始奖励、扩展网络架构输出常数分布，实现了对表达式树及其常数的后验推断，在简单场景下能恢复真实后验，向可扩展的贝叶斯符号回归迈进一步。
AI.motivation: 现有深度符号回归（DSR）只能找到单一最优表达式，无法推断模型的后验分布，无法量化不确定性。因此需要一种能进行贝叶斯后验推断的符号回归方法。
AI.method: 提出DVISR，将DSR中的奖励函数替换为证据下界（ELBO）的被积函数，并扩展网络架构使其能够输出表达式常数的分布，从而同时推断表达式树及其关联常数的后验分布。
AI.result: 在简单设置下（有无常数token两种情况），DVISR能够恢复真实后验分布，并考察了表达式空间规模增大时方法性能的变化。
AI.conclusion: DVISR实现了对完整符号模型的不确定性量化，是向可扩展的贝叶斯符号回归迈出的重要一步。

title: A Low-Code Approach for the Automatic Personalization of Conversational Agents
comment: To appear in the main track of the International Conference on Web Engineering (ICWE 2026)
summary:
In this paper, we conducted an SLR on the state of user modeling in the MDE domain. Results show a diverse set of disconnected proposals, covering a partial number of dimensions with an emphasis on those characteristics that are easier to profile. Moreover, most dimensions are regarded as fixed instead of allowing their dynamic evolution during the interaction with the software application. It is also worth noting that tool support is also rather limited, mostly limited to enabling the creation of the user models itself.
  The roadmap we hope to see in this area stems from the discussion points seen above. For instance, we believe the community should agree on a unified and re-usable user model, covering the superset of all dimensions present in the literature. Plus additional ones we could learn from user profiling in other domains (e.g. sociology). On the technical side, we expect to see a new generation of ML-based proposals to automatically and incrementally derive a user profile from the analysis of user interactions and a number of automatic pipelines able to transform the user information in concrete application adaptations that personalize the application to cater to the user's needs and profile.

AI.tldr: 本文对模型驱动工程(MDE)领域中的用户建模进行了系统文献综述(SLR)，发现现有方案分散、覆盖维度有限且多为静态，工具支持不足。作者提出了未来路线图：需建立统一可复用的用户模型，并引入基于机器学习的自动化、增量式用户画像推导方法。
AI.motivation: 系统梳理和评估MDE领域中用户建模的研究现状，识别现有方法的不足与空白，为未来研究提供方向指引。
AI.method: 采用系统文献综述(SLR)方法，对MDE领域的用户建模相关研究进行系统性检索、筛选和分析。
AI.result: 发现现有方案呈现"分散且互不关联"的特点；仅覆盖了部分用户维度，且偏向于易于画像的特征；大多数维度被视为静态而非动态演化；工具支持仅限于用户模型本身的创建，功能较为有限。
AI.conclusion: MDE领域的用户建模仍处于初级阶段。未来需要：1) 社区达成统一的可复用用户模型，覆盖文献中所有维度并借鉴其他领域(如社会学)；2) 开发基于ML的新方案，自动增量地从用户交互中推导画像；3) 构建自动化管线，将用户信息转化为具体的应用自适应与个性化。

title: Object-Level Explanations for Image Geolocation Models: a GeoGuessr use-case
summary: When humans play geolocation games such as GeoGuessr, they rely on concrete visual cues, such as road markings, vegetation, or architectural details, to infer where an image was captured. Whether image geolocation models rely on similar object-level evidence remains difficult to determine, as attribution methods like Grad-CAM typically highlight diffuse regions rather than coherent visual entities, making it difficult to link model predictions to specific objects or perceptible patterns. In this work, we propose an object-centric analysis pipeline to investigate the visual evidence used by geolocation models. Starting from attribution maps, we extract salient regions and segment them into object-like elements. We evaluate their predictive relevance through deletion and insertion tests, comparing attributionguided crops to randomly selected regions with similar coverage. Experiments on a three-country benchmark show that attribution-guided crops consistently retain more information for the model's prediction than random crops. These results suggest that attribution maps can be decomposed into interpretable, perceptible elements, providing a step toward object-level analysis of geolocation models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种以对象为中心的分析流程，用于探究地理定位模型（如GeoGuessr）所依赖的视觉证据。通过将归因图分解为可解释的、可感知的物体级元素，实验表明归因引导的裁剪区域比随机裁剪保留了更多预测信息，为模型行为分析提供了新路径。
AI.motivation: 现有归因方法（如Grad-CAM）通常突出弥散区域而非连贯的视觉实体，难以将模型预测与特定物体或可感知模式联系起来。因此，需要一种能够将归因图分解为可解释、可感知元素的方法，以进行物体级别的分析。
AI.method: 提出对象中心分析流程：1) 从归因图中提取显著区域；2) 将显著区域分割为类似物体的元素；3) 通过删除和插入测试评估这些元素的预测相关性，将归因引导的裁剪与随机裁剪进行对比。
AI.result: 在三国家基准数据集上的实验表明，归因引导的裁剪区域始终比相同覆盖范围的随机裁剪保留更多模型预测所需的信息。
AI.conclusion: 归因图可以分解为可解释、可感知的元素，这为地理定位模型的物体级别分析提供了可行的方法。

title: Truth or Tribe: How In-group Favoritism Prioritize Facts in Persona Agents
summary: In-group favoritism refers to the phenomena of favoring members of one's in-group over out-group members and is widely observed in numerous social cooperative behaviors. Recently, in-group favoritism biases have also been identified in generative language models. However, whether the in-group favoritism exists when persona agents are faced with contradicting information (e.g., misinformation), and how to mitigate the adverse effects of in-group favoritism biases in persona agents have been understudied. To address these problems, we propose a Truth or Tribe simulation framework to study the agent cooperation within the spread of contradicting information through a triadic interaction paradigm, and conduct controlled trials to evaluate the primary moderating factors. Extensive results showcase that persona agents display strong in-group favoritism, accepting incorrect answers from identity-similar peers at much higher rates than from dissimilar peers. In-group favoritism continues to emerge in defeasible reasoning contexts where no absolute truth exists, and it intensifies as cognitive complexity increases. Furthermore, three intervention strategies--Identity-Blind Instruction, Structured Counterfactual Reasoning, and Heterogeneous Perspective Ensemble--are proposed to mitigate the in-group favoritism.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"Truth or Tribe"模拟框架，研究人格化智能体在矛盾信息传播中的内群体偏爱现象。实验表明，智能体显著偏好认同相似同伴的错误答案，且该偏见随认知复杂度增加而增强。作者提出三种缓解策略：身份盲指令、结构化反事实推理和异质视角集成。
AI.motivation: 内群体偏爱现象已在生成式语言模型中被发现，但在人格化智能体面对矛盾信息（如 misinformation）时是否存在该偏见，以及如何缓解其负面影响，尚缺乏深入研究。
AI.method: 提出"Truth or Tribe"模拟框架，采用三元交互范式研究智能体在矛盾信息传播中的合作行为，并通过控制实验评估主要调节因素。
AI.result: 人格化智能体表现出强烈的内群体偏爱：接受身份相似同伴错误答案的比率远高于不相似同伴。该偏见在无绝对真理的可废止推理情境中仍然存在，且随认知复杂度增加而加剧。
AI.conclusion: 三种干预策略（身份盲指令、结构化反事实推理、异质视角集成）可有效缓解内群体偏爱偏见。

title: Embedding-based In-Context Prompt Training for Enhancing LLMs as Text Encoders
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have been widely explored for embedding generation. While recent studies show that in-context learning (ICL) effectively enhances the representational capability of LLMs by prepending a few task-related demonstrations, it causes substantial token overhead due to the increased sequence length. In this work, we propose EPIC, a novel embedding-based in-context prompt training strategy that leverages ICL to generate high-quality embeddings while reducing computational burden during both training and inference. This approach replaces discrete text demonstrations with their corresponding continuous embeddings, which not only encourages the LLM to align semantically-related text pairs during contrastive learning, but also requires the model to interpret demonstration embeddings as part of the in-context prompt. Consequently, EPIC-trained models achieve excellent embedding performance both with or without in-context prompts at inference time. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that our method establishes new state-of-the-art results on the MTEB benchmark, surpassing frontier models trained solely on publicly available retrieval data. Extensive ablation studies further validate the effectiveness and necessity of our mechanism.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EPIC方法，用连续嵌入替代离散文本演示进行对比学习，在降低计算开销的同时提升LLM的嵌入质量，在MTEB基准上达到新SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有ICL虽能增强LLM的表示能力，但增加序列长度导致大量token开销。作者旨在利用ICL优势的同时降低训练和推理时的计算负担。
AI.method: 提出EPIC（Embedding-based In-Context Prompt Training），用连续嵌入替换离散文本演示作为上下文提示，使LLM在对比学习中对齐语义相关的文本对，同时要求模型将演示嵌入解释为上下文提示的一部分。
AI.result: 在MTEB基准上达到新SOTA，超越了仅使用公开检索数据训练的先进模型，消融实验验证了方法的有效性和必要性。
AI.conclusion: EPIC在有无上下文提示的推理场景下都能取得优异嵌入性能，实现了高质量嵌入生成与计算效率的平衡。

title: AOCI: Symbolic-Semantic Indexing for Practical Repository-Scale Code Understanding with LLMs
summary: Large language models struggle with understanding codebases beyond a certain scale -- repositories with hundreds of thousands of lines of code. Existing methods -- retrieval, summarization, agent exploration -- each construct a different view at query time. The view varies between runs, and what persists is typically ad-hoc rather than systematic. This paper introduces AOCI (AI-Oriented Code Indexing): a symbolic-semantic repository representation -- a structured blueprint that an LLM can read in a single pass to gain a complete repository-level picture of the system's architecture, dependencies, and key design decisions before any task. An AOCI index consists of encoding rules followed by entries, with one entry per code unit (file or database table). Each entry pairs a symbolic tag with semantic content. The symbolic component provides architectural coordinates; the semantic component carries function, dependencies, and constraints. Together they form a consistent, stable representation of the entire system. Index maintenance is incremental: when code changes, only affected entries are regenerated under protocol rules. The AOCI Platform automates this process, keeping the blueprint aligned with the code. We evaluated AOCI on four projects across three LLMs and six context conditions (2,160 evaluations). AOCI outperforms all deployable baselines and ranks second only to the Oracle upper bound in overall accuracy. On 19 industrial tasks across five systems, AOCI produced zero final-state defects, while three mainstream agent-based tools introduced defects in 12 tasks and consumed 4--130$\times$ more tokens ($p < 0.001$). The advantage grows with task complexity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AOCI（面向AI的代码索引），一种符号-语义混合的仓库级代码表示方法，通过结构化的蓝图让LLM一次性读取整个代码库的架构、依赖和设计决策。在2160次评估和19个工业任务中，AOCI优于所有可部署基线，仅次于Oracle上限，且零缺陷、节省4-130倍token消耗。
AI.motivation: 现有方法（检索、摘要、智能体探索）在处理大规模代码库时，视图随查询而变化、缺乏系统性持久化表示，导致LLM难以理解超大规模仓库。
AI.method: 构建AOCI索引：由编码规则和条目组成，每个代码单元对应一个条目，条目包含符号标签（架构坐标）和语义内容（功能、依赖、约束），形成一致稳定的系统表示；索引维护采用增量更新，仅重新生成受影响的条目。
AI.result: 在4个项目、3种LLM、6种上下文条件下（共2160次评估），AOCI优于所有可部署基线，仅次于Oracle上限。在19个工业任务中零最终缺陷，而三个主流智能体工具在12个任务中引入缺陷，且多消耗4-130倍token（p<0.001）。
AI.conclusion: AOCI通过结构化的符号-语义索引为LLM提供完整的仓库级代码理解能力，显著优于现有方法，且优势随任务复杂度增长而扩大。

title: Leveraging Imperfect Medical Data: A Manifold-Consistent Spatio-Temporal Network for Sensor-based Human Activity Recognition
summary: Sensor-based Human Activity Recognition (HAR) has attracted increasing attention in medical and healthcare monitoring, particularly with the growth of Internet of Medical Things (IoMT). However, in real-world wearable sensing scenarios, IoMT signals are often corrupted by missing measurements, sensor failures, and environmental noise, which significantly degrade the performance of conventional deep learning models that assume clean and complete inputs. To address this challenge, we propose a Manifold-Consistent Spatio-Temporal Network (MCSTN) for robust HAR under imperfect sensing conditions. The proposed framework introduces a dual-level corruption modeling mechanism that simulates realistic sensor imperfections through both physical-level corruption and diffusion-driven continuous corruption. By enforcing representation consistency across multiple corrupted views, the model learns stable and corruption-invariant semantic representations. Furthermore, we design a dual-stream spatio-temporal architecture that explicitly decouples temporal dynamics modeling and spatial correlation learning. The temporal stream captures long-term activity dynamics, while the spatial stream models inter-sensor relationships, enabling more effective spatio-temporal representation learning. Extensive experiments on three widely used HAR benchmark datasets, PAMAP2, Opportunity, and WISDM, demonstrate that the proposed MCSTN achieves competitive performance compared with existing state-of-the-art methods, particularly under imperfect sensing conditions. These results validate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed framework for real-world wearable IoMT sensing applications.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个流形一致时空网络(MCSTN)，用于在不完美传感条件下（如信号缺失、传感器故障、环境噪声）的鲁棒人体活动识别。该方法通过双层腐败建模和双流时空架构，在三个基准数据集上取得了竞争性结果。
AI.motivation: 现实可穿戴传感场景中，IoMT信号常被缺失测量、传感器故障和环境噪声破坏，而传统深度学习模型假设输入干净完整，性能严重下降。现有的鲁棒HAR方法处理不完美传感条件的能力有限。
AI.method: 1) 双层腐败建模机制：物理级腐败模拟 + 扩散驱动的连续腐败模拟；2) 多视角一致性约束：通过强制多个腐败视角下的表示一致性，学习腐败不变的稳定语义表示；3) 双流时空架构：时间流捕获长期活动动态，空间流建模传感器间关系。
AI.result: 在PAMAP2、Opportunity和WISDM三个基准数据集上，MCSTN相比现有最先进方法取得了竞争性性能，尤其在不完美传感条件下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: MCSTN框架在真实世界可穿戴IoMT传感应用中有效且鲁棒，验证了双层腐败建模和多视角一致性学习对于克服不完美传感条件的价值。

title: DiagramNet: An End-to-End Recognition Framework and Dataset for Non-Standard System-Level Diagrams
summary: System-level diagrams encode the architectural blueprint of chip design, specifying module functions, dataflows, and interface protocols. However, non-standardized symbols and the scarcity of structured training data hinder existing multimodal large language models (MLLMs) from recognizing these diagrams. To address this gap, we introduce DiagramNet, the first multimodal dataset for system-level diagrams, comprising 10,977 connection annotations and 15,515 chain-of-thought QA pairs across four tasks: Listing, Localization, Connection, and Circuit QA. Building on this dataset, we propose a progressive training pipeline together with a decoupled multi-agent workflow that decomposes complex visual reasoning into Perception, Reasoning, and Knowledge stages. On the DiagramNet benchmark, integrating our 3B-parameter model with the proposed workflow surpasses the 2025 EDA Elite Challenge winner and outperforms GPT-5, Claude-Sonnet-4, and Gemini-2.5-Pro by over 2x in end-to-end evaluation. Notably, the workflow generalizes beyond our model, boosting Task 1 performance by 128.7x for Gemini-2.5-Pro and 12.4x for GPT-5. Furthermore, with only 60 images for detector adaptation, the method transfers effectively to AMSBench, achieving zero-shot connectivity reasoning on par with GPT-5 and Claude-Sonnet-4 while surpassing the AMS state-of-the-art method Netlistify.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiagramNet——首个系统级电路图多模态数据集，包含10,977个连接标注和15,515个思维链QA对；并设计渐进式训练流程与解耦多智能体工作流（感知→推理→知识三阶段），使3B参数模型在端到端评测中超越GPT-5、Claude-Sonnet-4等大模型2倍以上，且该工作流可泛化至其他模型。
AI.motivation: 系统级电路图符号不规范、结构化训练数据稀缺，现有多模态大模型难以识别这些图表。
AI.method: 1) 构建DiagramNet多模态数据集；2) 提出渐进式训练流程；3) 设计解耦多智能体工作流，将复杂视觉推理分解为感知、推理、知识三个阶段。
AI.result: 3B参数模型+工作流在DiagramNet基准上超越EDA竞赛冠军及GPT-5等大模型2倍以上；工作流使Gemini-2.5-Pro任务1性能提升128.7倍，GPT-5提升12.4倍；仅用60张图片即可零样本迁移至AMSBench，超越SOTA方法Netlistify。
AI.conclusion: 所提数据集与工作流有效解决了系统级电路图识别难题，且具备良好的泛化性和可迁移性。

title: Focus on the Core: Empowering Diffusion Large Language Models by Self-Contrast
summary: The iterative denoising paradigm of Diffusion Large Language Models (DLMs) endows them with a distinct advantage in global context modeling. However, current decoding strategies fail to leverage this capability, typically exhibiting a local preference that overlooks the heterogeneous information density within the context, ultimately degrading generation quality. To address this limitation, we systematically investigate high-information-density (HD) tokens and present two key findings: (1) explicitly conditioning on HD tokens substantially improves output quality; and (2) HD tokens exhibit an early-decoding tendency, converging earlier than surrounding tokens. Motivated by these findings, we propose Focus on the Core \textbf{(FoCore)}, a training-free decoding strategy that utilizes HD tokens in a self-contrast manner, wherein HD tokens are temporarily remasked as negative samples, to guide generation. We further introduce FoCore\_Accelerate \textbf{(FoCore\_A)}, an efficient variant that, upon detecting HD token convergence, performs parallel decoding over stable candidates within a local context window, substantially accelerating generation. Extensive experiments on math, code and logical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that FoCore consistently improves generation quality and efficiency across both LLaDA and Dream backbones. For instance, on HumanEval, FoCore improves pass@1 from 39.02 to 42.68 over standard Classifier-Free Guidance, while FoCore-A reduces the number of decoding steps by 2.07x and per-sample latency from 20.76s to 8.64s (-58.4\%).

AI.tldr: 本文提出FoCore和FoCore_A两种无需训练的扩散语言模型解码策略，通过利用高信息密度(HD)令牌进行自对比指导和并行解码，显著提升生成质量和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散语言模型解码策略存在局部偏好，忽略了上下文中的异构信息密度，导致生成质量下降。作者旨在利用DLM在全局上下文建模上的优势，解决解码策略未充分利用高信息密度令牌的问题。
AI.method: (1) FoCore：训练无关的解码策略，利用HD令牌进行自对比引导（将HD令牌临时重遮罩为负样本）；(2) FoCore_A：高效变体，检测到HD令牌收敛后，在局部上下文窗口内对稳定候选者进行并行解码以加速生成。
AI.result: 在数学、代码和逻辑推理基准上，FoCore在LLaDA和Dream骨干上均持续提升生成质量与效率。HumanEval上pass@1从39.02提升至42.68，FoCore_A减少2.07倍解码步数，延迟从20.76s降至8.64s（降幅58.4%）。
AI.conclusion: FoCore系列策略有效利用HD令牌的早期收敛特性，通过自对比指导和并行解码，在不需额外训练的情况下同时提升扩散语言模型的生成质量和效率。

title: Learning Discriminators for Resampling in the Ensemble Gaussian Mixture Filter through a Normalizing Flow Approach
summary: The ensemble Gaussian mixture filter (EnGMF) is a powerful, convergent particle filter capable of medium-to-high dimensional non-linear filtering. The EnGMF relies on a resampling step that can generate physically unrealistic posterior samples, that would subsequently produce physically meaningless forecasts. This work introduces the discriminator-informed resampling procedure, that augments the posterior resampling step with a discriminator that accepts or rejects candidate particles based on their physical plausibility. In this work these discriminators are learned through a normalizing flow approach. Numerical experiments on both the Ikeda map and the Lorenz '63 system show that discriminator informed resampling procedure consistently reduces error relative to the standard EnGMF in low-ensemble regimes.

AI.tldr: 本文针对集成高斯混合滤波（EnGMF）重采样步骤中产生物理不合理样本的问题，提出了一种判别器感知的重采样方法，利用归一化流学习判别器来筛选物理合理的粒子，在Ikeda地图和Lorenz '63系统上验证了该方法在低集成规模下能持续降低误差。
AI.motivation: EnGMF在重采样步骤中会产生物理不合理的后验样本，导致后续预测失去物理意义，需要改进重采样过程以保证粒子的物理合理性。
AI.method: 提出判别器感知的重采样过程：在后验重采样步骤中引入一个判别器，接受或拒绝候选粒子，判别器通过归一化流（normalizing flow）学习得到。
AI.result: 在Ikeda地图和Lorenz '63系统上的数值实验表明，在低集成规模下，判别器感知的重采样方法相比标准EnGMF能够持续降低误差。
AI.conclusion: 判别器感知的重采样是一种有效的后处理手段，能提升EnGMF在低集成规模下的滤波精度，同时保证粒子的物理合理性。

title: ARIADNE: Agentic Reward-Informed Adaptive Decision Exploration via Blackboard-Driven MCTS for Competitive Program Generation
summary: Competitive program generation aims to automatically produce correct and efficient solutions for programming-contest problems under strict time and memory constraints. Existing LLM-based approaches often fail to perform explicit algorithmic planning and to handle edge cases robustly, leading to unreliable one-shot generation. Moreover, although execution feedback is essential for iterative debugging and refinement, incorporating such feedback effectively within limited computational budgets remains difficult. To overcome these limitations, we propose {\tool}, a blackboard-driven Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) framework that models program generation as a sequential decision process. {\tool} organizes the generation workflow into five coordinated stages (i.e., strategy selection, code generation, test generation, quality evaluation, and code repair) while maintaining a shared blackboard that accumulates structured evidence to guide subsequent decisions. Experiments on four benchmarks (APPS, CodeContests, CodeContests+, and LiveCodeBench) show that {\tool} consistently achieves the best Pass@1 performance across multiple LLM backends. With GPT-4o, {\tool} attains Pass@1 scores of 41.30, 46.67, 27.27, and 20.91, surpassing the strongest baseline CodeSim by up to 26.06 points, while further improvements are observed with DeepSeek-V3.2. These results indicate that combining global search through MCTS with persistent evidence accumulation on a shared blackboard enables systematic exploration and effective feedback utilization, substantially enhancing the capability of LLMs in competitive program generation.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个基于黑板机制的蒙特卡洛树搜索框架，将竞争性程序生成建模为五阶段顺序决策过程，通过全局搜索和证据积累显著提升了LLM在编程竞赛中的Pass@1性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM方法缺乏显式算法规划、边缘情况处理不鲁棒，且难以在有限计算预算内有效利用执行反馈进行迭代调试和优化。
AI.method: 提出一个黑板驱动的MCTS框架，将程序生成组织为策略选择、代码生成、测试生成、质量评估和代码修复五个协调阶段，通过共享黑板累积结构化证据来指导后续决策。
AI.result: 在APPS、CodeContests、CodeContests+和LiveCodeBench四个基准上取得最佳Pass@1性能，使用GPT-4o分别达到41.30、46.67、27.27和20.91，超越最强基线CodeSim最高达26.06分，使用DeepSeek-V3.2有进一步提升。
AI.conclusion: 将MCTS全局搜索与共享黑板上的持久证据积累相结合，能够实现系统性探索和有效反馈利用，显著增强LLM在竞争性程序生成中的能力。

title: Rethink MAE with Linear Time-Invariant Dynamics
