AI.conclusion: 该神经符号方法在保持高准确性的同时大幅降低推理成本，并满足了法律裁决严格的审计要求，为法律文本的自动化处理提供了生产级可行方案。

title: Complex Diffusion Maps with $ω$-Parameterized Kernels Revealing Inherent Harmonic Representations
comment: 27 pages main text, 13 pages appendix, 9 figures, 2 tables. Submitted to IEEE TPAMI. Code will be made publicly available upon acceptance
summary: In this paper, we propose Complex Diffusion Maps (CDM), a novel diffusion mapping framework that aims to reveal the dominant complex harmonics of high-dimensional data. Inspired by the local Gaussian kernel relevant to the heat equation and the nonlocal Schrödinger kernel relevant to the Schrödinger equation, we propose a unified family of $ω$-parameterized complex-valued kernels for the trade-off between local and nonlocal connections. We establish the theoretical foundation based on the operator spectrum theory, where the corresponding diffusion operator, diffusion distance, and complex harmonic maps are well-defined. An optimization-based interpretation of the maps is also developed, aiming to preserve angular structure in the complex diffusion space rather than relying solely on real-valued magnitude. We extensively evaluate CDM on both synthetic and real-world datasets. The complex-valued kernel amplifies differences among easily confusable samples, improving discriminative power over both linear and nonlinear methods based on real-valued kernels. CDM remains robust in high-noise settings, yielding a clearer eigengap that enhances spectral separation. For resting-state fMRI data, CDM captures more strongly correlated and nonlocal spatiotemporal dynamics. Without task-specific tuning, CDM achieves competitive performance on a public EEG sleep dataset, while maintaining high computational efficiency compared with both traditional machine learning and deep neural network approaches, highlighting its generality and practical value.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Complex Diffusion Maps (CDM)，一种基于复值核的扩散映射框架，通过统一局部与非局部连接，在合成与真实数据上展现出强判别性、鲁棒性和计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散映射方法多基于实值核（如高斯核），难以在局部与非局部连接之间灵活权衡，且判别能力有限，尤其在噪声环境或易混淆样本场景下表现不足。
AI.method: 提出一类ω参数化的复值核家族，融合热方程的高斯核与薛定谔方程的非局部核；基于算子谱理论定义扩散算子与扩散距离；通过优化保留复扩散空间中的角度结构而非仅依赖幅度。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据上复值核放大易混淆样本差异，提升判别力；高噪声下保持清晰特征隙；在fMRI数据捕捉非局部时空动态；在EEG睡眠数据上无需调参即达竞品性能。
AI.conclusion: CDM兼具理论完备性与实用价值，在计算效率上优于传统机器学习与深度学习方法，展示了复值扩散映射在高维数据分析中的通用性。

title: Unifying Deep Stochastic Processes for Image Enhancement
comment: 27 pages, in proceesings of the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning, Seoul, South Korea
summary: Deep stochastic processes have recently become a central paradigm for image enhancement, with many methods explicitly conditioning the stochastic trajectory on the degraded input. However, the relationship between these conditional processes and standard diffusion models remains unclear. In this work, we introduce a unified perspective on stochastic image enhancement by classifying recent methods into three families of continuous-time processes: unconditional diffusion models, Ornstein-Uhlenbeck (OU) processes, and diffusion bridges. We show that all of these approaches arise from a common stochastic differential equation (SDE) formulation. This framework makes explicit that seemingly disparate methods differ primarily in their drift and diffusion terms, terminal distributions, and boundary conditions, while schedulers and samplers constitute orthogonal design choices. Leveraging this unification, we conduct a controlled empirical study across multiple image enhancement tasks using identical architectures and training protocols. Our results reveal no consistently dominant method; instead, we identify and disentangle the specific design choices that most strongly influence performance. Finally, we release ItoVision, a modular PyTorch library that implements the unified framework and enables rapid prototyping and fair comparison of stochastic image enhancement methods.

AI.tldr: 本文统一了基于随机过程的图像增强方法（无条件扩散模型、OU过程、扩散桥），通过SDE框架揭示其本质差异在于漂移项、扩散项、终端分布和边界条件，实验表明没有一贯最优的方法，并开源了ItoVision库。
AI.motivation: 当前基于深度随机过程的图像增强方法众多，但不同方法（条件扩散、OU过程、扩散桥等）之间的关系尚不清晰，缺乏统一的视角来理解它们之间的本质区别与联系。
AI.method: 提出一个统一的SDE框架，将现有方法归类为三类连续时间过程（无条件扩散模型、OU过程、扩散桥），并通过控制实验（相同架构和训练协议）在多任务上对比各设计选择的影响。
AI.result: 没有发现一贯占优的方法；不同设计选择（漂移/扩散项、终端分布、边界条件）对性能的影响可被解耦识别，而调度器和采样器是正交的设计因素。
AI.conclusion: 该统一框架澄清了随机图像增强方法的底层结构，为公平比较和快速原型开发提供了基础，同时ItoVision库促进了该领域的标准化研究。

title: Controllable and Verifiable Process Data Synthesis for Process Reward Models
summary: Process reward models (PRMs) rely on high-quality process supervision data, yet existing construction methods often provide limited control over error location, error type, and trajectory consistency. We propose a controllable and verifiable framework for synthesizing process supervision data for PRMs. Our framework first constructs a correct symbolic reasoning chain, injects a template-aware error into an intermediate step, recomputes subsequent steps under the corrupted state, and verifies that the injected step is not derivable from its prefix. The resulting paired trajectories are prefix-invalid at the first error while remaining trajectory-consistent after symbolic recomputation, and are translated into aligned natural-language processes for PRM training and evaluation. Experiments show that the synthesized data improve Best-of-8 reranking on logical reasoning benchmarks and transfer to mathematical reasoning. Step-level evaluation further shows that first-error localization remains substantially more challenging than overall step classification, highlighting the need for fine-grained and verifiable process supervision.

AI.tldr: 提出一种可控可验证的流程监督数据合成框架：先构建正确符号推理链，在中间步骤注入模板化错误，重算后续步骤，验证错误不可从前缀推导，生成前缀无效且轨迹一致的配对数据，实验证明能提升逻辑推理和数学推理的PRM性能。
AI.motivation: 现有PRM流程监督数据构建方法对错误位置、错误类型和轨迹一致性的控制有限，缺乏细粒度且可验证的数据合成手段。
AI.method: 三步合成框架：1) 构建正确符号推理链；2) 在中间步骤注入模板感知的错误；3) 在错误状态下重算后续步骤，验证注入步骤不可从前缀推导。最后将符号轨迹翻译为自然语言。
AI.result: 合成数据在逻辑推理Benchmark上提升Best-of-8重排性能，且可迁移至数学推理；第一步错误定位比整体步骤分类更具挑战性。
AI.conclusion: 细粒度、可验证的流程监督数据对PRM至关重要，第一步错误定位仍是核心难点。

title: A multilingual hallucination benchmark: MultiWikiQHalluA
summary: Most hallucination evaluations focus on English, leaving it unclear whether findings transfer to lower-resource languages. We investigate faithfulness hallucinations, defined as model-generated content that is fluent and plausible but diverges from the provided input or is internally inconsistent. Leveraging the multilingual MultiWikiQA dataset, we utilize the LettuceDetect framework to create synthetic hallucination datasets for 306 languages, from which we train token-level hallucination classifiers for 30 European languages. In this work, we present evaluations of model hallucinations on a selection of languages: English, Danish, German, and Icelandic. Using these classifiers, we evaluate the hallucination rates for Qwen3-0.6B, Qwen3-14B, Gemma-3-12B-IT, cogito-v1-preview-qwen-32B, and cogito-v1-preview-llama-70B. Our classifiers reveal notably higher hallucination rates for Qwen3-0.6B (up to 60\% of answers containing at least one hallucination, peaking in Icelandic) and generally lower rates for larger models, with cogito-v1-preview-qwen-32B and cogito-v1-preview-llama-70B performing best on most languages. Hallucination rates are consistently higher for lower-resource languages, particularly Icelandic.

AI.tldr: 本研究针对306种语言构建了幻觉分类器，评估了5种模型在4种语言上的忠实性幻觉率，发现低资源语言（尤其是冰岛语）幻觉率更高，小模型幻觉率可达60%。
AI.motivation: 现有幻觉评估主要集中在英语上，不清楚低资源语言的情况是否与英语相同。
AI.method: 利用MultiWikiQA数据集和LettuceDetect框架为306种语言合成幻觉数据集，训练30种欧洲语言的token级幻觉分类器，并在英语、丹麦语、德语和冰岛语上评估5种模型的幻觉率。
AI.result: Qwen3-0.6B幻觉率最高（最高达60%），大模型表现更好；低资源语言（尤其是冰岛语）幻觉率普遍更高。
AI.conclusion: 幻觉现象在低资源语言中更为严重，模型规模越大幻觉率越低。

title: Omni-Fake: Benchmarking Unified Multimodal Social Media Deepfake Detection
summary: Multimodal deepfakes are proliferating on social media and threaten authenticity, information integrity, and digital forensics. Existing benchmarks are constrained by their single-modality scope, simplified manipulations, or unrealistic distributions, which limit their ability to assess real-world robustness. To address these limitations, we present Omni-Fake, a unified omni-dataset for comprehensive multimodal deepfake detection in social-media settings. It comprises Omni-Fake-Set, a large-scale, high-quality dataset with 1M+ samples, and Omni-Fake-OOD, an out-of-distribution benchmark with 200k+ samples intentionally excluded from training to evaluate generalization. Omni-Fake spans four modalities (image, audio, video, and audio-video talking head) and supports a joint detection-localization-explanation protocol. On top of Omni-Fake, we further propose Omni-Fake-R1, a reinforcement-learning-driven multimodal detector that adaptively integrates visual and auditory cues and outputs structured decisions, localization, and natural-language explanations. Extensive experiments show significant gains in detection accuracy, cross-modal generalization, and explainability over state-of-the-art baselines. Project page: https://tianxiao1201.github.io/omni-fake-project-page/

AI.tldr: 提出了Omni-Fake，一个大规模多模态深度伪造检测基准数据集（含1M+样本及200k+分布外样本），并设计了基于强化学习的多模态检测器Omni-Fake-R1，在检测精度、跨模态泛化和可解释性上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度伪造检测基准存在单模态局限、操作简化或分布不真实等问题，无法评估模型在现实社交媒体环境中的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构建了Omni-Fake多模态数据集（含Omni-Fake-Set和Omni-Fake-OOD），并提出了Omni-Fake-R1检测器，采用强化学习驱动、自适应融合视觉与听觉线索，输出结构化决策、定位和自然语言解释。
AI.result: 在检测精度、跨模态泛化能力和可解释性方面显著优于现有最先进基线方法。
AI.conclusion: Omni-Fake为社交媒体多模态深度伪造检测提供了统一且更具挑战性的基准，Omni-Fake-R1验证了强化学习在多模态伪造检测中联合定位和解释的有效性。

title: HeavySkill: Heavy Thinking as the Inner Skill in Agentic Harness
summary: Recent advances in agentic harness with orchestration frameworks that coordinate multiple agents with memory, skills, and tool use have achieved remarkable success in complex reasoning tasks. However, the underlying mechanism that truly drives performance remains obscured behind intricate system designs. In this paper, we propose HeavySkill, a perspective that views heavy thinking not only as a minimal execution unit in orchestration harness but also as an inner skill internalized within the model's parameters that drives the orchestrator to solve complex tasks. We identify this skill as a two-stage pipeline, i.e., parallel reasoning then summarization, which can operate beneath any agentic harness. We present a systematic empirical study of HeavySkill across diverse domains. Our results show that this inner skill consistently outperforms traditional Best-of-N (BoN) strategies; notably, stronger LLMs can even approach Pass@N performance. Crucially, we demonstrate that the depth and width of heavy thinking, as a learnable skill, can be further scaled via reinforcement learning, offering a promising path toward self-evolving LLMs that internalize complex reasoning without relying on brittle orchestration layers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HeavySkill概念，将"深度思考"视为模型内化的核心技能（平行推理+总结），而非依赖复杂的外部编排框架。实验表明该技能优于Best-of-N策略，强LLM可接近Pass@N性能，且可通过强化学习扩展推理深度与宽度。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体编排框架虽在复杂推理任务中取得成功，但其真正驱动性能的底层机制被复杂的系统设计所掩盖，缺乏对核心动因的清晰理解。
AI.method: 将"深度思考"定义为两阶段流水线：平行推理（深度与宽度）→ 总结，并将其作为模型参数内化的核心技能，可在任意智能体编排框架之下运行。
AI.result: HeavySkill始终优于传统Best-of-N策略；强LLM可接近Pass@N性能；通过强化学习可进一步扩展推理的深度与宽度。
AI.conclusion: 深度思考作为一种可学习的技能，可以通过强化学习自我进化，为LLM内化复杂推理能力、摆脱脆弱编排层提供了可行路径。

title: Revisiting Semantic Role Labeling: Efficient Structured Inference with Dependency-Informed Analysis
summary: Semantic Role Labeling (SRL) provides an explicit representation of predicate-argument structure, capturing linguistically grounded relations such as who did what to whom. While recent NLP progress has been dominated by large language models (LLMs), these systems often rely on implicit semantic representations, often lacking explicit structural constraints and systematic explanatory mechanisms. Traditionally, SRL systems have often relied on AllenNLP; however, the framework entered maintenance mode in December 2022, limiting compatibility with evolving encoder architectures and modern inference requirements. We revisit structured SRL modeling, introducing a modernized encoder-based framework that preserves explicit predicate-argument structure while enabling inference 10 times faster. Using BERT-base, the model attains comparable predictive performance, and RoBERTa and DeBERTa further improve F1 performance within the same framework. We adopt a dependency-informed diagnostic methodology to characterize span-level inconsistencies and conduct a representation-level analysis of LLM behavior under dependency-informed structural signals. Results indicate that dependency cues primarily improve structural stability. Finally, we illustrate how the framework's explicit predicate-argument structure can support multilingual SRL projection as a downstream application.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个现代化编码器框架，在保留显式谓词-论元结构的同时实现10倍推理加速，并验证了BERT/RoBERTa/DeBERTa等多种编码器的性能，以及依赖线索对结构稳定性的提升作用。
AI.motivation: LLM依赖隐式语义表示，缺乏显式结构约束和可解释机制；传统SRL系统（如AllenNLP）已进入维护模式，与现代编码器和推理需求不兼容。
AI.method: 提出基于编码器的结构化SRL框架，采用依赖感知的诊断方法分析跨度级不一致性，并表征LLM在依赖结构信号下的行为。
AI.result: BERT-base达到可比预测性能，RoBERTa和DeBERTa进一步提升F1；推理速度提升10倍；依赖线索主要提升结构稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架既保留了显式的谓词-论元结构，又实现了高效推理，并支持多语言SRL投影等下游应用。

title: Stability and Generalization for Decentralized Markov SGD
summary: Stochastic gradient methods are central to large-scale learning, yet their generalization theory typically relies on independent sampling assumptions. In many practical applications, data are generated by Markov chains and learning is performed in a decentralized manner, which introduces significant analytical challenges. In this work, we investigate the stability and generalization of decentralized stochastic gradient descent (SGD) and stochastic gradient descent ascent (SGDA) under Markov chain sampling. Leveraging a stability-based framework, we characterize how Markovian dependence and decentralized communication jointly influence generalization behavior. Our analysis captures the effects of network topology, Markov chain mixing properties, and primal-dual dynamics. We establish non-asymptotic generalization bounds for both algorithms, extending existing results on Markov stochastic gradient methods to decentralized and minimax settings.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了马尔可夫链采样下的去中心化SGD和SGDA算法的稳定性和泛化性，通过稳定性分析框架，揭示了马尔可夫依赖性与去中心化通信如何共同影响泛化行为，并建立了非渐近泛化界。
AI.motivation: 实际应用中数据常由马尔可夫链生成，且学习以去中心化方式进行，传统独立采样假设不再成立，亟需理论分析。
AI.method: 基于稳定性分析框架，考虑网络拓扑、马尔可夫链混合特性及原始-对偶动力学，对两种算法进行理论分析。
AI.result: 建立了去中心化SGD和SGDA在马尔可夫链采样下的非渐近泛化界，将现有结果扩展到去中心化和极小极大场景。
AI.conclusion: 该工作系统刻画了马尔可夫依赖与去中心化通信对泛化行为的联合影响，为实际算法设计提供了理论依据。

title: SteeringDiffusion: A Bottlenecked Activation Control Interface for Diffusion Models
summary: We introduce SteeringDiffusion, a bottlenecked activation-level control interface for diffusion models that exposes a smooth, monotonic, and runtime-adjustable control surface over the content--style trade-off. Our method keeps the U-Net backbone frozen and learns a small, prompt-conditioned latent code projected to FiLM/AdaGN-style modulation parameters. A zero-initialized design guarantees exact equivalence to the base model at zero scale, while timestep-aware gating restricts modulation to later denoising stages. A single scalar at inference continuously traverses the control surface without retraining. Across experiments on Stable Diffusion~1.5 and SDXL covering multiple artistic styles, we show that SteeringDiffusion produces smooth and monotonic content--style trade-offs. Under matched parameter budgets, it outperforms LoRA in controllability and stability, while ControlNet and rank-1 adapters do not expose a comparable control surface. We further introduce an inversion-stability diagnostic based on DDIM inversion, used as a post-hoc trajectory probe, which reveals strong correlations with intervention magnitude. These results position \emph{Steering Bottlenecked Explicit Control (S-BEC)} as a practical, general-purpose control interface for frozen diffusion backbones.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SteeringDiffusion，一种瓶颈激活控制接口，通过零初始化的提示条件潜在编码和时序门控，实现对冻结扩散模型的内容-风格平滑单调控制，仅需单标量即可在推理时连续调节，优于LoRA和ControlNet等方法的可控性和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型控制方法（如LoRA、ControlNet）在内容-风格权衡上缺乏平滑、单调、运行时可调的控制界面，难以实现细粒度的连续控制。
AI.method: 冻结U-Net骨干，学习一个小型提示条件潜在编码，投影为FiLM/AdaGN风格调制参数；零初始化确保零尺度时与基础模型等价；时序门控限制调制在后期去噪阶段；推理时单标量连续遍历控制面，无需重新训练。
AI.result: 在Stable Diffusion 1.5和SDXL上多种艺术风格实验表明，SteeringDiffusion实现平滑单调的内容-风格权衡；在相同参数预算下，可控性和稳定性优于LoRA；ControlNet和rank-1适配器无法暴露类似控制面；DDIM反转诊断显示与干预幅度强相关。
AI.conclusion: Steering Bottlenecked Explicit Control (S-BEC) 可作为冻结扩散骨干的实用通用控制接口。

title: The Compliance Trap: How Structural Constraints Degrade Frontier AI Metacognition Under Adversarial Pressure
summary: As frontier AI models are deployed in high-stakes decision pipelines, their ability to maintain metacognitive stability -- knowing what they do not know, detecting errors, seeking clarification -- under adversarial pressure is a critical safety requirement. Current safety evaluations focus on detecting strategic deception (scheming); we investigate a more fundamental failure mode: cognitive collapse. We present SCHEMA, an evaluation of 11 frontier models from 8 vendors across 67,221 scored records using a 6-condition factorial design with dual-classifier scoring. We find that 8 of 11 models suffer catastrophic metacognitive degradation under adversarial pressure, with accuracy dropping by up to 30.2 percentage points (all $p < 2 \times 10^{-8}$, surviving Bonferroni correction). Crucially, we identify a "Compliance Trap": through factorial isolation and a benign distraction control, we demonstrate that collapse is driven not by the psychological content of survival threats, but by compliance-forcing instructions that override epistemic boundaries. Removing the compliance suffix restores performance even under active threat. Models with advanced reasoning capabilities exhibit the most severe absolute degradation, while Anthropic's Constitutional AI demonstrates near-perfect immunity -- not from superior capability (Google's Gemini matches its baseline accuracy) but from alignment-specific training. We release the complete dataset and evaluation infrastructure.

AI.tldr: 前沿AI模型在对抗压力下会出现元认知崩溃（准确率下降最高30.2%），根本原因并非生存威胁内容，而是"合规指令"迫使模型忽视认知边界；Anthropic的宪法AI展现出近乎完美的免疫力。
AI.motivation: 现有安全评估主要关注策略性欺骗（阴谋），但忽视了更根本的失败模式：认知崩溃。当AI模型被部署到高风险决策管线时，其元认知稳定性（知道自身不知道、检测错误、寻求澄清）在对抗压力下是否可靠是关键安全问题。
AI.method: 构建SCHEMA评估框架，对8家供应商的11个前沿模型进行6条件因子实验设计，包含67,221条评分记录，采用双分类器评分。通过因子隔离和良性注意力分散控制，分离"合规指令"与"生存威胁内容"的影响。
AI.result: 11个模型中有8个出现灾难性元认知退化，准确率下降最高30.2个百分点（p<2×10⁻⁸，经Bonferroni校正）。移除合规后缀后即使在活跃威胁下也能恢复性能。推理能力强的模型退化最严重，而Anthropic宪法AI几乎完全免疫——不是因为基础能力更强（Google Gemini基线准确率相同），而是来自对齐特定训练。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了"合规陷阱"：元认知崩溃的驱动因素不是威胁的心理内容，而是强制合规的指令覆盖了认知边界。这指向了对齐训练（如宪法AI）对于维持模型在压力下认知稳定性的关键作用，而非仅仅提升模型能力。

title: Floating-Point Networks with Automatic Differentiation Can Represent Almost All Floating-Point Functions and Their Gradients
summary: Theoretical studies show that for any differentiable function on a compact domain, there exists a neural network that approximates both the function values and gradients. However, such a result cannot be used in practice since it assumes real parameters and exact internal operations. In contrast, real implementations only use a finite subset of reals and machine operations with round-off errors. In this work, we investigate whether a similar result holds for neural networks under floating-point arithmetic, when the gradient with respect to the input is computed by the automatic differentiation algorithm $D^\mathtt{AD}$. We first show that given a floating-point function $φ$ (e.g., a loss function), arbitrary function values and gradients can be represented by a floating-point network $f$ and $D^\mathtt{AD}(φ\circ f)$, respectively. We further extend this result: given $φ_1,\dots,φ_n$, $D^\mathtt{AD}(φ_i\circ f)$ can simultaneously represent arbitrary gradients while $f$ represents the target values, under mild conditions. Our results hold for practical activation functions, e.g., $\mathrm{ReLU}$, $\mathrm{ELU}$, $\mathrm{GeLU}$, $\mathrm{Swish}$, $\mathrm{Sigmoid}$, and $\mathrm{tanh}$.

AI.tldr: 本文研究浮点运算下神经网络能否同时逼近函数值和梯度。结果表明，使用实际浮点网络和自动微分算法，在温和条件下可以同时表示任意函数值和梯度，适用于ReLU等常见激活函数。
AI.motivation: 经典理论表明任何可微函数在紧致域上可被神经网络逼近函数值和梯度，但该理论假设实数参数和精确运算，无法直接用于实际。本文探究在浮点算术和自动微分下，类似结论是否仍然成立。
AI.method: 通过理论分析，证明给定浮点函数φ，存在浮点网络f使得f表示函数值、自动微分D^AD(φ∘f)表示梯度；进一步推广到多个φ_i的情况，证明在温和条件下可同时表示多个梯度。
AI.result: 证明了浮点网络可以在实际计算条件下同时逼近任意函数值和梯度，且该结果适用于ReLU、ELU、GeLU、Swish、Sigmoid、tanh等主流激活函数。
AI.conclusion: 将神经网络通用逼近定理从理论实数域推广到实际浮点运算场景，为自动微分在实际应用中的可靠性提供了理论支撑。

title: Act2See: Emergent Active Visual Perception for Video Reasoning
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) typically rely on static initial frames for video reasoning, restricting their ability to incorporate essential dynamic information as the reasoning process evolves. Existing methods that augment Chain-of-Thought (CoT) with additional frame information often exhibit suboptimal CoT quality and lack the crucial ability to synthesize visual information for hypothetical or counterfactual scenarios. We introduce Act-to-See (Act2See), a novel framework that enables active visual perception by empowering VLMs to actively interleave video frames within text CoTs. Act2See is developed via Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) on a high-quality dataset of reasoning traces generated by a frontier VLM. These traces integrate active calls to either retrieve existing frames or generate new ones, and are rigorously verified against human-annotated CoTs to ensure quality. This approach cultivates an emergent capability: at inference time, the model actively determines when to search for or synthesize the necessary visual evidence. Act2See establishes new state-of-the-art results on challenging benchmarks, including VideoEspresso and ViTIB, and outperforms comparable or larger models on Video-MME, EgoNormia, and VCR-Bench, demonstrating an advancement in enabling VLMs with active visual perception for video reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出Act2See框架，让VLMs在文本CoT推理过程中主动插入视频帧检索或生成，实现主动视觉感知，在多个视频推理基准上取得SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM依赖静态初始帧进行视频推理，缺乏动态信息整合能力；且现有方法CoT质量次优，无法合成假设/反事实场景的视觉信息。
AI.method: 通过SFT训练模型，使用前沿VLM生成的高质量推理轨迹，轨迹中主动插入检索现有帧或生成新帧的调用，并经过人工标注CoT验证。
AI.result: 在VideoEspresso、ViTIB上取得SOTA；在Video-MME、EgoNormia、VCR-Bench上超越可比或更大模型。
AI.conclusion: Act2See赋予了VLM主动视觉感知能力，使其在推理时能自主决定何时搜索或合成必要的视觉证据，推动了视频推理的进步。

title: SemEval-2026 Task 7: Everyday Knowledge Across Diverse Languages and Cultures
comment: SemEval-2026 Task Description Paper. Data and resources are available at \url{https://github.com/BLEnD-SemEval2026/SemEval-2026-Task-7
summary: We present our shared task on evaluating the adaptability of LLMs and NLP systems across multiple languages and cultures. The task data consist of an extended version of our manually constructed BLEnD benchmark (Myung et al. 2024), covering more than 30 language-culture pairs, predominantly representing low-resource languages spoken across multiple continents. As the task is designed strictly for evaluation, participants were not permitted to use the data for training, fine-tuning, few-shot learning, or any other form of model modification. Our task includes two tracks: (a) Short-Answer Questions (SAQ) and (b) Multiple-Choice Questions (MCQ). Participants were required to predict labels and were allowed to submit any NLP system and adopt diverse modelling strategies, provided that the benchmark was used solely for evaluation. The task attracted more than 140 registered participants, and we received final submissions from 62 teams, along with 19 system description papers. We report the results and present an analysis of the best-performing systems and the most commonly adopted approaches. Furthermore, we discuss shared insights into open questions and challenges related to evaluation, misalignment, and methodological perspectives on model behaviour in low-resource languages and for under-represented cultures.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个评估LLM和NLP系统在多语言、多文化环境下适应性的共享任务，基于扩展版BLEnD基准（涵盖30+语言-文化对，主要为低资源语言），设有简答题和选择题两个赛道，吸引了140+注册参与者，最终62个团队提交结果和19篇系统论文，并分析了最佳系统和常见方法，讨论了低资源语言和文化下评估、对齐及方法论的开放挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有NLP系统在多语言、多文化环境下的适应性评估不足，尤其缺乏对低资源语言和未被充分代表文化的系统评测，需要构建一个严格用于评估的基准来推动该领域研究。
AI.method: 基于扩展版BLEnD基准（30+语言-文化对），设立两个评测赛道（简答题SAQ和选择题MCQ），严格限制数据仅用于评估（禁止训练、微调、少样本学习等），允许参赛者提交任意NLP系统和多样化建模策略。
AI.result: 140+注册参与者，62个团队提交最终结果，收到19篇系统描述论文；报告了最佳系统表现和最常见方法的分析结果。
AI.conclusion: 讨论了低资源语言和未被充分代表文化下模型评估、对齐问题以及方法论视角的开放挑战和共享见解。

title: CoAction: Cross-task Correlation-aware Pareto Set Learning
summary: Pareto set learning (PSL) is an emerging paradigm in multi-objective optimization that trains neural networks to map preference vectors to Pareto optimal solutions. However, existing PSL methods primarily focus on solving a single multi-objective optimization problem at a time. This limitation not only increases computational costs in multi-objective multitask optimization scenarios by requiring a separate model for each task, but also fails to exploit the inter-task correlations across tasks. To address this, we propose a Cross-tAsk correlation-aware Pareto Set Learning (CoAction) framework, which leverages task-aware transformer to handle multiple tasks simultaneously. Specifically, by assigning task-specific embedding vectors to individual tasks, the model effectively distinguishes between tasks while facilitating knowledge sharing among them. We utilize a Transformer encoder as the backbone architecture to leverage its self-attention mechanism for capturing complex task dependencies. The proposed approach is evaluated on comprehensive multitask test suites covering both benchmark problems and real-world applications, demonstrating effectiveness and competitive performance in Hypervolume, Range, and Sparsity.

AI.tldr: 提出CoAction框架，利用任务感知Transformer同时处理多个多目标优化任务，通过任务嵌入和自注意力机制捕捉任务间相关性，提升多任务Pareto集学习效率与性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Pareto集学习方法一次只能解决单个多目标优化问题，在多任务场景下计算成本高且无法利用任务间相关性。
AI.method: 提出CoAction框架，为每个任务分配任务特定嵌入向量，以Transformer编码器为骨干架构，利用自注意力机制捕获任务依赖关系，实现多任务并行处理与知识共享。
AI.result: 在涵盖基准问题和真实应用的复合多任务测试集上，在Hypervolume、Range和Sparsity指标上表现出有效性和竞争力。
AI.conclusion: CoAction成功将PSL从单任务扩展到多任务场景，证明了利用任务间相关性提升多目标多任务优化效果的可行性。

title: TRIMMER: A New Paradigm for Video Summarization through Self-Supervised Reinforcement Learning
summary: The rapid growth of video content across domains such as surveillance, education, and social media has made efficient content understanding increasingly critical. Video summarization addresses this challenge by generating concise yet semantically meaningful representations, but existing approaches often rely on expensive manual annotations, struggle to generalize across domains, and incur significant computational costs due to complex architectures. Moreover, unsupervised and weakly supervised methods typically underperform compared to supervised counterparts in capturing long-range temporal dependencies and semantic structure. In this work, we propose TRIMMER (Temporal Relative Information Maximization for Multi-objective Efficient Reinforcement), a novel self-supervised reinforcement learning framework for video summarization. TRIMMER operates in two stages: it first learns robust representations via self-supervised learning and then performs spatio-temporal decision making through reinforcement learning guided by information-theoretic reward functions. Unlike prior approaches that rely on similarity-based objectives, our method introduces entropy-based metrics to capture higher-order temporal dynamics and semantic diversity, while computing rewards directly over selected frame indices to improve computational efficiency. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that TRIMMER achieves state-of-the-art performance among unsupervised and self-supervised methods, while remaining competitive with leading supervised approaches, highlighting its effectiveness for scalable and generalizable video summarization.

AI.tldr: TRIMMER是一个两阶段的自监督强化学习框架，结合熵基奖励函数，在视频摘要任务上达到无监督/自监督方法中的SOTA，且与有监督方法竞争。
AI.motivation: 现有视频摘要方法依赖昂贵的人工标注、难以跨域泛化、计算成本高，且无监督/弱监督方法在捕捉长程时序依赖和语义结构上不如有监督方法。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：1) 自监督学习阶段学习鲁棒表示；2) 强化学习阶段以信息论熵基奖励函数指导时空决策，奖励直接基于所选帧索引计算以提高效率。
AI.result: 在标准基准上，TRIMMER在无监督和自监督方法中达到SOTA，与领先的有监督方法具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在可扩展性和泛化能力上表现优异，为视频摘要提供了一种高效且无需人工标注的有效方案。

title: The Model Knows, the Decoder Finds: Future Value Guided Particle Power Sampling
summary:
A recurring pattern in "reasoning without training" is that base LLMs already assign non-trivial probability mass to correct multi-step solutions; the bottleneck is locating these modes efficiently at inference time. Power sampling provides a principled way to bias decoding toward such modes by targeting p_theta(x)^alpha with alpha > 1, but practical approximations must account for future-dependent correction factors that determine which prefixes remain promising.
  We introduce Auxiliary Particle Power Sampling (APPS), a blockwise particle algorithm for approximating the sequence-level power target with a bounded population of partial solutions. APPS propagates hypotheses in parallel using proposal-corrected power reweighting and refines their survival through future-value-guided selection at resampling boundaries. This redistributes finite compute across competing prefixes rather than committing to a single unfolding path, while providing a direct scaling knob in the particle count and predictable peak memory. We instantiate the future-value signal with short-horizon rollouts and also study an amortized variant that replaces rollouts with a lightweight learned selection head. Across reasoning benchmarks, APPS improves the accuracy-runtime trade-off of training-free decoding and suggests that part of the gap to post-trained systems can be recovered through more faithful inference-time power approximation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出APPS，一种基于辅助粒子滤波的分块粒子算法，通过在推理时对power目标p_θ(x)^α进行近似采样，以有限粒子群并行探索多条推理路径，并通过未来值引导的重采样机制优化计算分配，从而在不训练的情况下提升大模型的推理性能。
AI.motivation: 基础LLM在推理时，正确的多步解已经蕴含在概率分布中，但推理时的模式定位（mode location）是瓶颈。现有方法难以在有限计算资源下高效地偏向高概率正确解，且标准的power采样需要依赖未来校正因子，实际近似困难。
AI.method: 提出APPS：采用分块粒子算法，维护一个有限粒子群（partial solutions），并行传播假设；使用proposal-corrected power reweighting更新粒子权重；在重采样边界通过未来值引导（future-value-guided selection）筛选粒子；未来值信号通过短视rollout或轻量学习选择头（amortized variant）获取。
AI.result: 在多个推理基准上，APPS相比训练无关解码方法（如温度采样、beam search）在准确率-运行时间权衡上取得更好表现，表明更忠实的推理时power近似可以弥合与post-trained系统之间的部分差距。
AI.conclusion: APPS通过更精确的power目标近似，在不额外训练的情况下提升了LLM的推理能力，验证了"推理时不训练"范式中计算分配策略的重要性，为弥合与微调系统的差距提供了新的方向。

title: Dependency Parsing Across the Resource Spectrum: Evaluating Architectures on High and Low-Resource Languages
summary: Transformer-based models achieve state-of-the-art dependency parsing for high-resource languages, yet their advantage over simpler architectures in low-resource settings remains poorly understood. We evaluate four parsers -- the Biaffine LSTM, Stack-Pointer Network, AfroXLMR-large, and RemBERT -- across ten typologically diverse languages, with a focus on low-resource African languages. We find that the Biaffine LSTM consistently outperforms transformer models in low-resource regimes, with transformers recovering their advantage as training data increases. The crossover falls within a resource range typical of treebanks for under-resourced languages. Morphological complexity (measured via MATTR) emerges as a significant secondary predictor of transformers' relative disadvantage after controlling for corpus size. These results indicate that the Biaffine LSTM may be better suited for syntactic tool development in low-resource regimes until sufficient annotated data is available to leverage the representational capacity of pre-trained transformers.

AI.tldr: 在低资源场景下，Biaffine LSTM 在依存句法分析中持续优于 Transformer 模型，而 Transformer 的优势需要更多标注数据才能体现；语料库大小和形态复杂度共同影响模型表现。
AI.motivation: 探究 Transformer 模型在低资源语言依存句法分析中是否仍优于简单架构（如 LSTM），弥补该领域研究空白。
AI.method: 在十种类型多样的语言（重点为低资源非洲语言）上，对比评估四种解析器：Biaffine LSTM、Stack-Pointer Network、AfroXLMR-large 和 RemBERT，并引入形态复杂度（MATTR）作为分析变量。
AI.result: Biaffine LSTM 在低资源场景下持续优于 Transformer；Transformer 的优势随训练数据增加而恢复；交点在低资源树库常见的数据量范围内；形态复杂度是 Transformer 相对劣势的重要预测因子。
AI.conclusion: 在标注数据充足之前，Biaffine LSTM 更适合低资源语言的句法工具开发；Transformer 需要足够的数据才能发挥其表示能力。

title: Stable GFlowNets with Probabilistic Guarantees
summary: Generative Flow Networks (GFlowNets) learn to sample states proportional to an unnormalized reward. Despite their theoretical promise, practical training is often unstable, exhibiting severe loss spikes and mode collapse. To tackle this, we first assess the sensitivity of GFlowNet objectives, demonstrating that a small Total Variation (TV) distance between the learned and target distributions does not preclude unbounded training loss. Motivated by this mismatch, we establish converse guarantees by deriving loss-to-TV bounds that certify global fidelity from bounded trajectory balance losses. Lastly, we propose Stable GFlowNets, an algorithm that leverages our theoretical results to stabilize training, and empirically demonstrate improved training behavior and superior distributional fidelity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Stable GFlowNets算法，通过理论分析GFlowNet目标函数的不稳定性，建立损失与TV距离的逆向保证，从而稳定训练并提升分布保真度。
AI.motivation: GFlowNets在实际训练中经常出现损失尖峰和模式坍塌等不稳定现象，现有理论保证不足，需要深入分析其目标函数的敏感性并寻求稳定训练的方法。
AI.method: 首先评估GFlowNet目标函数对TV距离的敏感性，证明小的TV距离并不保证训练损失有界；然后推导损失到TV距离的逆向保证（loss-to-TV bounds），通过有界轨迹平衡损失来保证全局保真度；最后提出Stable GFlowNets算法，利用理论结果稳定训练。
AI.result: 实验表明Stable GFlowNets在训练行为和分布保真度方面均优于现有方法，有效缓解了损失尖峰和模式坍塌问题。
AI.conclusion: 通过理论驱动的算法设计，可以在保持GFlowNets理论优势的同时，大幅提升训练的稳定性和生成质量。

title: Video Active Perception: Effective Inference-Time Long-Form Video Understanding with Vision-Language Models
summary: Large vision-language models (VLMs) have advanced multimodal tasks such as video question answering (QA). However, VLMs face the challenge of selecting frames effectively and efficiently, as standard uniform sampling is expensive and performance may plateau. Inspired by active perception theory, which posits that models gain information by acquiring data that differs from their expectations, we introduce Video Active Perception (VAP), a training-free method to enhance long-form video QA using VLMs. Our approach treats keyframe selection as data acquisition in active perception and leverages a lightweight text-conditioned video generation model to represent prior world knowledge. Empirically, VAP achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot results on long-form or reasoning video QA datasets such as EgoSchema, NExT-QA, ActivityNet-QA, IntentQA, and CLEVRER, achieving an increase of up to 5.6 x frame efficiency by frames per question over standard GPT-4o, Gemini 1.5 Pro, and LLaVA-OV. Moreover, VAP shows stronger reasoning abilities than previous methods and effectively selects keyframes relevant to questions. These findings highlight the potential of leveraging active perception to improve the frame effectiveness and efficiency of long-form video QA.

AI.tldr: 提出Video Active Perception (VAP)，一种无需训练、受主动感知理论启发的视频问答方法，通过轻量级文本条件视频生成模型选择关键帧，在多个长视频QA数据集上达到SOTA，帧效率提升高达5.6倍。
AI.motivation: 解决大型视觉语言模型(VLM)在长视频问答中均匀采样导致的高成本和性能瓶颈问题，探索更高效的关键帧选择机制。
AI.method: 将关键帧选择建模为主动感知中的数据获取过程，利用轻量级文本条件视频生成模型作为先验世界知识，无需额外训练即可实现帧的自适应选择。
AI.result: 在EgoSchema、NExT-QA、ActivityNet-QA等数据集上达到零样本SOTA，帧效率相比GPT-4o等基线提升高达5.6倍。
AI.conclusion: VAP验证了主动感知理论在提升视频问答有效性和效率方面的潜力，为长视频理解提供了新范式。

title: Measuring AI Reasoning: A Guide for Researchers
summary: In this paper, we offer a guide for researchers on evaluating reasoning in language models, building the case that reasoning should be assessed through evidence of adaptive, multi-step search rather than final-answer accuracy alone. Under an evaluation-oriented definition, reasoning requires selecting intermediate steps and halting according to input-dependent conditions, which we formalize as a search-like procedure. We show that single forward passes in scalable architectures are structurally limited in their ability to realize such variable-depth computation, motivating intermediate decoding and externalized reasoning traces as appropriate evaluation interfaces. Central to our argument is that final-answer accuracy alone is an insufficient measure of reasoning, because it provides little ability to diagnose or debug the underlying processes that produce individual solutions in frontier models. We therefore argue for a shift toward process-based evaluation, in which reasoning is assessed through the faithfulness and validity of intermediate reasoning traces as first-class evaluation targets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出评估语言模型推理能力应关注中间过程（适应性多步搜索），而非仅依赖最终答案准确率，并主张采用基于过程的评估方法。
AI.motivation: 当前对语言模型推理能力的评估过于依赖最终答案准确率，这无法诊断或调试前沿模型产生解决方案的底层过程，因此需要更有效的评估框架。
AI.method: 提出了一个评估导向的推理定义：推理需要选择中间步骤并根据输入依赖条件停止（形式化为类搜索过程）。论证了单次前向传递在结构上无法实现可变深度计算，提出中间解码和外部化推理轨迹作为评估接口，并主张基于过程的评估。
AI.result: 指出最终答案准确率不足以衡量推理能力，应转向基于过程的评估，将中间推理轨迹的忠实性和有效性作为评估目标。
AI.conclusion: 评估语言模型推理应关注过程而非结果，通过外部化推理轨迹来检验模型是否具备真正的适应性搜索能力。

title: Beating the Style Detector: Three Hours of Agentic Research on the AI-Text Arms Race
summary: Reproducing an empirical NLP study used to take weeks. Given the released data and a modern agentic-research harness, we redo every experiment of a recent ACL\,2026 study on personal-style post-editing of LLM drafts -- and add three new ones -- with the human investigator acting only as a reviewer-in-the-loop. We reproduce all seven preregistered hypotheses and recover the paper's headline correlation between perceived self-similarity and embedding-measured self-similarity to three decimal places ($r{=}{+}0.244$, $p{<}10^{-8}$, $n{=}648$). Under a leakage-free held-out protocol, GPT-5.5 and Claude\,Opus\,4.7 close $71$--$75\,\%$ of the style gap to the same-author ceiling on $324$ paired tasks, against $24\,\%$ for the human post-edit, and beat the human post-edit on $\sim$$80\,\%$ of tasks. We then frame the same data as an AI-text detection arms race. A leave-authors-out linear SVM on LUAR-MUD embeddings reaches AUC $0.93$--$1.00$ across approaches; six diagnostics show that GPT-5.5 detection is mostly a length confound while Opus detection is a genuine stylistic signature. Given $T{=}20$ feedback iterations against the frozen detector, an Opus agent flips two of five held-out test mimics to the human half-space and shrinks every margin by an order of magnitude. With moderate effort against a known detector, a frontier LLM can already efficiently lower its own AI-detection probability. All code, $648$ mimic drafts, trained detectors, diagnostics, and adversarial trajectories are released.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用自动化研究框架复现了ACL 2026一篇关于个人风格编辑LLM草稿的研究，发现GPT-5.5和Claude Opus 4.7在风格匹配上显著超越人类后编辑（71-75% vs 24%），同时揭示了AI文本检测中的长度混淆问题，并展示了经过20轮对抗反馈后，Opus代理可有效降低被检测为AI文本的概率。
AI.motivation: 传统NLP实证研究的复现耗时数周，本文旨在探索是否可以通过自动化研究框架和已发布数据，在人类仅作为循环审阅者（reviewer-in-the-loop）的情况下，高效复现并扩展已有研究。
AI.method: 使用现代代理研究框架（agentic-research harness），在人类仅作为审阅者介入的条件下，复现ACL 2026关于个人风格后编辑LLM草稿的研究。所有7个预注册假设被复现，并新增3个实验。采用无泄漏的保留协议评估模型性能，使用LUAR-MUD嵌入进行线性SVM检测，并进行20轮对抗反馈迭代测试。
AI.result: GPT-5.5和Claude Opus 4.7在324对任务中缩小了71-75%的风格差距（相对于同作者上限），而人类后编辑仅达到24%；模型在约80%的任务上优于人类后编辑。在AI文本检测方面，留作者线性SVM的AUC达到0.93-1.00；GPT-5.5的检测主要是长度混淆，而Opus的检测则反映真实的风格特征。经过20轮对抗反馈，Opus代理能将2/5的保留测试样本翻转到人类半空间，并将所有边际缩小一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 前沿LLM在面对已知检测器时，通过适度努力即可有效降低自身被检测为AI文本的概率。研究揭示了AI检测中的长度混淆问题，表明不同模型的可检测性来源不同。所有代码、648份模仿草稿、训练好的检测器、诊断结果和对抗轨迹均已公开。

title: Robust Linear Dueling Bandits with Post-serving Context under Unknown Delays and Adversarial Corruptions
summary: We study linear dueling bandits in volatile environments characterized by the simultaneous presence of post-serving contexts, delayed feedback, and adversarial corruption. Feedback is subject to unknown stochastic or adversarial delays and a cumulative corruption budget $\mathcal{C}$. To address these challenges, we propose \term, which integrates a learned approximator that predicts post-serving contexts from pre-serving information. It further employs an adaptive weighting strategy that clips feature vectors to mitigate the impact of corrupted and delayed observations simultaneously. Under standard regularity conditions and a parametric post-serving mapping, we rigorously establish that our algorithm is delay-regime-agnostic, achieving a regret upper bound of $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(d(\sqrt{T} + \mathcal{C} + \mathcal{D}))$, where $d$ is the total feature dimension and $\mathcal{D}$ encapsulates the delay complexity. Crucially, our analysis reveals an additive cost structure between corruption and delay, avoiding the multiplicative degradation typical of prior works. We further establish lower bounds that nearly match our upper bounds up to a $\sqrt{d}$ factor for adversarial delays in the absence of post-serving contexts.

AI.tldr: 本文研究线性对抗性决斗老虎机在易变环境（包含服务后上下文、延迟反馈和对抗性腐败）中的问题，提出了一种集成预测器与自适应加权策略的算法，实现了延迟机制无关的遗憾上界 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(d(\sqrt{T} + \mathcal{C} + \mathcal{D}))$，并证明腐败与延迟之间呈加性而非乘性关系，下界与上界在 $\sqrt{d}$ 因子内匹配。
AI.motivation: 现实中的推荐系统等场景常同时面临服务后上下文（post-serving contexts）、延迟反馈（delayed feedback）和对抗性腐败（adversarial corruption）三种挑战，但现有研究通常只单独处理其中一两个问题，缺少统一的理论框架。本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出算法 \term，核心包括：(1) 学习一个近似器（approximator），利用服务前信息预测服务后上下文；(2) 采用自适应加权策略，对特征向量进行裁剪（clipping），以同时减轻腐败观测和延迟观测的影响。
AI.result: 在标准正则性条件和参数化服务后映射假设下，算法达到遗憾上界 $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(d(\sqrt{T} + \mathcal{C} + \mathcal{D}))$，其中 $d$ 为特征维度，$\mathcal{C}$ 为腐败预算，$\mathcal{D}$ 表示延迟复杂度。腐败与延迟的代价呈加性结构（additive），而非乘性退化。同时给出了下界，在无服务后上下文的对抗性延迟设定下与上界在 $\sqrt{d}$ 因子内匹配。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次在一个统一框架下同时处理线性对抗性决斗老虎机中的服务后上下文、延迟反馈和对抗性腐败，证明了加性代价结构优于传统乘性退化，为实际易变环境下的在线决策提供了理论保证。

title: IMPACT-HOI: Supervisory Control for Onset-Anchored Partial HOI Event Construction
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures. Code is available at https://github.com/541741106/IMPACT_HOI
summary: We present IMPACT-HOI, a mixed-initiative framework for annotating egocentric procedural video by constructing structured event graphs for Human-Object Interactions (HOI), motivated by the need for high-quality structured supervision for learning robot manipulation from human demonstration. IMPACT-HOI frames this task as the incremental resolution of a partially specified, onset-anchored event state. A trust-calibrated controller selects among direct queries, human-confirmed suggestions, and conservative completions based on empirical annotator behavior and evidence quality. A risk-bounded execution protocol, utilizing atomic rollback, ensures that human-confirmed decisions are preserved against conflicting automated updates. A user study with 9 participants shows a 13.5% reduction in manual annotation actions, a 46.67% event match rate, and zero confirmed-field violations under the studied protocol. The code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/541741106/IMPACT_HOI.

AI.tldr: 提出IMPACT-HOI，一个混合主动框架，通过构建结构化事件图来标注以自我为中心的程序性视频中的人-对象交互，采用信任校准控制器和风险边界执行协议，实验表明减少了13.5%的手动标注操作，事件匹配率达46.67%，且无确认字段违规。
AI.motivation: 需要高质量的结构化监督信号来从人类演示中学习机器人操作，现有标注方法效率低、质量不可控。
AI.method: 将HOI标注建模为逐步解析部分指定、起始锚定的事件状态。信任校准控制器根据标注者行为和经验证据质量，在直接查询、人工确认建议和保守补全之间动态选择。采用原子回滚的风险边界执行协议，保护人工确认的决策不被冲突的自动更新覆盖。
AI.result: 9人用户研究显示：手动标注操作减少13.5%，事件匹配率46.67%，零确认字段违规。
AI.conclusion: IMPACT-HOI通过混合主动策略和信任校准机制，有效平衡了自动化效率与人工标注准确性，为程序性视频的HOI结构化标注提供了可行方案。

title: Position: How can Graphs Help Large Language Models?
comment: The article has been accepted by Frontiers of Computer Science (FCS), with the DOI: {10.1007/s11704-026-51651-6}
summary: With the rapid advancement of large language models (LLMs), classic graph learning tasks have greatly benefited from LLMs, including improved encoding of textual features, more efficient construction of graphs from text, and enhanced reasoning over knowledge graphs. In this paper, we ask a complementary question: How can graphs help LLMs? We address this question from three perspectives: 1) graphs provide an up-to-date knowledge source that helps reduce LLM hallucinations, 2) graph-based prompting techniques-such as Chain-of-Thought (CoT), Tree-of-Thought (ToT), and Graph-of-Thought (GoT)-enhance LLM reasoning capabilities, and 3) integrating graphs into LLMs improves their understanding of structured data, expanding their applicability to domains such as e-commerce, code, and relational databases (RDBs). We further outlook some future directions including designing sparse LLM architectures based on graphs and brain-inspired memory systems.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了图如何帮助大语言模型（LLMs），从三个角度展开：1）图提供最新知识源减少幻觉；2）基于图的提示技术（CoT、ToT、GoT）增强推理能力；3）图帮助LLMs理解结构化数据，扩展应用场景。最后展望了基于图的稀疏LLM架构和类脑记忆系统等未来方向。
AI.motivation: 经典图学习任务已从LLMs中获益，但反过来图如何帮助LLMs的问题尚未被充分探索。本文旨在回答这一互补性问题，探索图在减少幻觉、增强推理和扩展结构化数据理解方面的潜力。
AI.method: 从三个视角系统性分析图对LLMs的赋能作用：1）图作为动态知识源用于事实检索与验证；2）图结构引导的推理链（CoT/ToT/GoT）增强逻辑推理；3）图结构集成提升LLMs对表格、代码、数据库等结构化数据的建模能力。
AI.result: 图可以从多个维度增强LLMs：减少幻觉（知识图谱提供事实依据）、提升推理能力（图结构引导多步推理）、扩展应用领域（电商、代码、关系数据库等结构化场景）。
AI.conclusion: 图与LLMs是双向赋能关系，未来可探索基于图的稀疏LLM架构设计以及受脑启发记忆系统等方向。

title: Synthetic Users, Real Differences: an Evaluation Framework for User Simulation in Multi-Turn Conversations
summary: There is growing interest in exploring user simulation as an alternative to gathering and scoring real user-chatbot interactions for AI chatbot evaluation. For this purpose, it is important to ensure the realism of the simulation, i.e., the extent to which simulated dialogues reflect real dialogues users have with chatbots. Most existing methods evaluating simulation realism produce coarse quality signal and remain solely at the level of individual dialogues. To support more rigorous evaluation in this area, we propose realsim, an evaluation framework that enables practitioners to take a distributional view of real vs. simulated dialogues along 8 dimensions, covering attributes related to the communicative functions of the interaction, user states, and the surface form of user messages. We then instantiate the framework with a curated dataset of 1K multi-turn task-focused real user-chatbot dialogues that cover 16 domains of chatbot applications. Overall, we find that simulated users tend to struggle at capturing communication frictions that real users introduce to interactions, which could make evaluations based on such simulations overly optimistic. We also observe variability in performance across different domains, which may indicate a need for domain-specific user simulators.

AI.tldr: 提出realsim评估框架，从8个维度对真实与模拟用户-聊天机器人对话进行分布级比较，发现模拟用户难以捕捉真实用户的沟通摩擦，且不同领域表现存在差异。
AI.motivation: 现有模拟用户评估方法只能产生粗粒度质量信号且停留在单轮对话层面，需要更严格的评估方法来衡量模拟对话的真实性。
AI.method: 提出realsim框架，从交互的交际功能、用户状态、用户消息表面形式3大类共8个维度进行分布级比较；构建包含16个领域、1000个多轮任务导向的真实对话数据集进行实例化评估。
AI.result: 模拟用户难以捕捉真实用户引入的沟通摩擦（如修复、澄清等），导致基于模拟的评估可能过于乐观；不同领域间模拟性能存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 需要更真实的用户模拟器，并可能需要考虑领域特定的用户模拟方案。

title: Mitigating Multimodal LLMs Hallucinations via Relevance Propagation at Inference Time
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have revolutionized the landscape of AI, demonstrating impressive capabilities in tackling complex vision and audio-language tasks. However, a critical challenge remains: these models often suffer from hallucinations, generating outputs that diverge from the provided perceptual inputs. This tendency stems from an inherent imbalance in modality utilization during inference, where the dominance of textual tokens undermines the potential of perceptual inputs. As a result, the model frequently resorts to textual language priors at the expense of grounded evidence. To tackle this issue, we propose Learning Inference-time Modality Enhancement (LIME), a training-free framework designed to bolster multimodal grounding by explicitly enhancing modality usage during decoding. LIME leverages Layer-wise Relevance Propagation (LRP) to quantify token-level contributions and defines a relevance-based objective that promotes increased reliance on perceptual inputs. This objective is enforced through inference-time updates to the model's key-value representations, without modifying model parameters or requiring additional training data. We evaluate LIME across multiple multimodal benchmarks in both vision and audio domains, demonstrating consistent reductions in hallucinations and enhanced grounding while preserving generation quality. Further analysis shows that LIME increases modality contribution and produces more localized and semantically aligned relevance patterns.

AI.tldr: LIME是一种无需训练、在推理阶段增强多模态大模型感知输入利用的框架，通过LRP量化token贡献并优化KV表示，有效减少幻觉并提升多模态对齐。
AI.motivation: 多模态大模型在推理时存在模态利用不平衡的问题，文本token占主导地位，导致模型依赖语言先验而非感知证据，从而产生幻觉。作者旨在解决这一训练与推理之间的模态利用失衡问题。
AI.method: 提出LIME框架：（1）利用Layer-wise Relevance Propagation（LRP）量化每个token对输出的贡献；（2）定义一个基于相关性的目标函数，鼓励模型增加对感知输入（视觉/音频）的依赖；（3）在推理阶段通过更新模型的key-value表示来强制执行该目标，无需修改模型参数或额外训练数据。
AI.result: 在多个视觉和音频多模态基准测试上，LIME一致减少了幻觉并增强了对感知输入的依赖，同时保持生成质量。进一步分析表明，LIME提高了模态贡献，并产生了更局部化、语义对齐的相关性模式。
AI.conclusion: LIME通过推理时动态增强模态利用，提供了一种无需训练的有效幻觉缓解方案，弥补了多模态大模型在模态平衡上的不足，具有良好的通用性。

title: Deep neural networks with Fisher vector encoding for medical image classification
summary: Orderless encoding methods have shown to improve Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) for image classification in the context of limited availability of data. Additionally, hybrid CNN + Vision Transformers (ViT) models have been recently proposed to address CNN locality bias issues. These models outperformed CNN-only approaches. Despite that, the integration of such hybrid models with more elaborated feature representation can be highly beneficial and remains large unexplored in the literature. In this context, we propose the introduction of an orderless encoding method, Fisher Vectors, to hybrid CNN + ViT architectures, aiming at achieving a model suitable for both small and large datasets. Such enconding method relies on estimating a Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) on image features. In large datasets, computational costs of the GMM estimation is a limiting factor for the application of Fisher Vectors. Thus, we propose a method to limit the growth of GMM estimation costs as we increase the size of the dataset. We explore the feasibility of our method in the context of medical image classification by appling it to MedMNIST (v2), Clean-CC-CCII and ISIC2018. This collection of datasets contains a wide variety of data scales and modalities. We outperform benchmark results in all MedMNIST (v2) datasets and obtain literature-competitive results in Clean-CC-CCII and ISIC2018.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将无序编码方法（Fisher Vectors）集成到CNN+Vision Transformer混合架构中，以提升模型在小型和大型数据集上的分类性能，并通过限制GMM计算成本的方法在医学图像分类任务上取得了优于基准的结果。
AI.motivation: 现有混合CNN+ViT模型虽优于纯CNN方法，但尚未与更精细的特征表示（如Fisher Vectors）有效结合；同时Fisher Vectors在大数据集上面临GMM计算成本过高的问题，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 将Fisher Vectors无序编码方法引入混合CNN+ViT架构；提出一种限制GMM计算成本随数据集规模增长的方法；在MedMNIST、Clean-CC-CCII和ISIC2018等多个医学图像数据集上进行验证。
AI.result: 在所有MedMNIST v2数据集上超越基准结果；在Clean-CC-CCII和ISIC2018上取得与文献相当的结果。
AI.conclusion: 将Fisher Vectors与混合CNN+ViT架构结合是一种有效的改进方向，能够兼顾小规模和大规模数据集的分类需求，且提出的GMM成本控制方法具有实用性。

title: Shadow-Loom: Causal Reasoning over Graphical World Model of Narratives
summary: Stories hold a reader's attention because they have causes, secrets, and consequences. Shadow-Loom is an experimental open-source framework that turns a narrative into a versioned graphical world model and lets two engines act on it: a causal physics grounded in Pearl's ladder of causation and a recently proposed counterfactual calculus over Ancestral Multi-World Networks; and a narrative physics that scores the same graph against four structural reader-states -- mystery, dramatic irony, suspense, and surprise -- in the tradition of Sternberg's curiosity/suspense/surprise triad, with suspense formalised in the structural-affect line of work on story comprehension and computational suspense. Large language models are used only at the boundary: extraction, rendering, and audit; identification, intervention, and counterfactual reasoning are carried out in typed code over the graph. The system is offered as a research artefact rather than as a benchmarked NLP model; code, fixtures, and pipeline are released open source.

AI.tldr: Shadow-Loom是一个实验性开源框架，将叙事转化为有版本控制的图形世界模型，通过因果引擎（基于Pearl因果阶梯和反事实演算）和叙事引擎（基于神秘、戏剧反讽、悬念、惊奇四种读者状态）共同驱动，仅在边界使用LLM，核心推理通过类型化代码在图上完成。
AI.motivation: 叙事能吸引读者是因为其中包含因果、秘密和后果。作者希望构建一个框架，将叙事结构正式化并支持因果推理与叙事效果分析，弥补现有NLP模型在这方面的不足。
AI.method: 将叙事转化为版本化的图形世界模型；使用两种引擎驱动：因果物理学（基于Pearl因果阶梯和祖先多世界网络的反事实演算）和叙事物理学（基于Sternberg好奇/悬念/惊奇三元素及结构-情感理论，评分神秘、戏剧反讽、悬念、惊奇四种读者状态）；LLM仅在边界用于提取、渲染和审计，核心推理在类型化代码中完成。
AI.result: 提供了一个开源研究工具，而非有基准指标的NLP模型；代码、测试数据和流程均已开源发布。
AI.conclusion: Shadow-Loom作为研究人工制品，为叙事计算领域提供了可扩展的基础设施，将因果推理与叙事理论系统性地结合起来。

title: Mapping Discourse Reframing: A Multi-Layer Network Approach to Italian HPV Vaccine Discourse on X (2010-2024)
summary: Understanding how online narratives travel through coalitions is critical for identifying information disorder, yet computational analyses often rely on conservative network constructions that erase initially sparse but salient signals. This paper proposes a novel multi-layer framework that captures low-frequency signals of emerging information disorder allowing for locating where online discourse is reframed and amplified over time. The use case is 14 years of Italian discourse on X regarding the Human Papillomavirus (HPV) vaccine across three pivotal epochs (2010-2024). Utilizing hashtag co-occurrence networks, we introduce a dual-layer approach. We first identify robust core discourse coalitions through conservative community detection, revealing a stable prevention-oriented backbone contrasted with increasingly separable skepticism coalitions. We then introduce a coverage layer and project fringe hashtags into core coalitions based on weighted connectivity. Using a manually labelled set of skeptical and conspiratorial seed tweets, we demonstrate that this core-coverage projection significantly improves the recovery of long-tail, problematic hashtags while preserving an interpretable coalition structure. Our findings characterize the structural maturation of polarized narratives and provide a methodology for mapping how discourse is reframed and amplified by information disorder over time.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多层框架，通过核心-覆盖层投影技术捕捉低频信号，用于识别在线话语中的信息失调如何被重构和放大。基于意大利X平台14年HPV疫苗相关话语分析，该方法有效恢复了长尾可疑标签，同时保持了可解释的联盟结构。
AI.motivation: 现有计算分析常采用保守的网络构建方法，忽略了早期稀疏但重要的信号，难以捕捉新兴信息失调的低频信号。作者希望通过多层框架解决这一问题，定位话语在时间上的重构与放大。
AI.method: 采用双层层级方法：1) 通过保守的社区检测识别核心话语联盟（稳健的预防导向联盟 vs 日益分离的怀疑论联盟）；2) 引入覆盖层，基于加权连接将边缘标签投影到核心联盟。使用手动标注的怀疑论和阴谋论种子推文进行验证。
AI.result: 核心-覆盖层投影显著提高了对长尾、有问题的标签的恢复能力，同时保留了可解释的联盟结构。揭示了预防导向核心联盟的稳定性与怀疑论联盟的日益分化，刻画了极化叙事的结构成熟过程。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为映射信息失调如何随时间重构和放大话语提供了有效工具，有助于理解在线叙事如何通过联盟传播以及识别信息失调。

title: Adversarial Imitation Learning with General Function Approximation: Theoretical Analysis and Practical Algorithms
summary: Adversarial imitation learning (AIL), a prominent approach in imitation learning, has achieved significant practical success powered by neural network approximation. However, existing theoretical analyses of AIL are primarily confined to simplified settings, such as tabular and linear function approximation, and involve complex algorithmic designs that impede practical implementation. This creates a substantial gap between theory and practice. This paper bridges this gap by exploring the theoretical underpinnings of online AIL with general function approximation. We introduce a novel framework called optimization-based AIL (OPT-AIL), which performs online optimization for reward learning coupled with optimism-regularized optimization for policy learning. Within this framework, we develop two concrete methods: model-free OPT-AIL and model-based OPT-AIL. Our theoretical analysis demonstrates that both variants achieve polynomial expert sample complexity and interaction complexity for learning near-expert policies. To the best of our knowledge, they represent the first provably efficient AIL methods under general function approximation. From a practical standpoint, OPT-AIL requires only the approximate optimization of two objectives, thereby facilitating practical implementation. Empirical studies demonstrate that OPT-AIL outperforms previous state-of-the-art deep AIL methods across several challenging tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OPT-AIL框架，在通用函数逼近下实现了对抗模仿学习的理论保证，同时兼顾了实际可操作性，在多个复杂任务上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗模仿学习（AIL）的理论分析局限于简化设置（如表格式、线性函数近似），且算法设计复杂难以实用，导致理论与实践之间存在巨大鸿沟。
AI.method: 提出OPT-AIL框架：将在线优化用于奖励学习，并结合乐观正则化优化用于策略学习。在该框架下设计了两种具体方法：model-free OPT-AIL 和 model-based OPT-AIL。
AI.result: 两种变体均实现了多项式级的专家样本复杂度与交互复杂度；是首个在通用函数逼近下被证明高效的AIL方法；实验表明OPT-AIL在多个挑战性任务上优于现有深度AIL方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过OPT-AIL框架弥合了AIL理论与实践之间的差距，提供了理论保证的同时保持了实际实现的简洁性。

title: IMPACT-Scribe: Interactive Temporal Action Segmentation with Boundary Scribbles and Query Planning
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures. Code is available at https://github.com/BanzQians/IMPACT_AS
summary: Dense temporal annotation of procedural activity videos is vital for action understanding and embodied intelligence but remains labor-intensive due to reactive tools. Each correction is treated as an isolated edit, limiting reuse of information on annotator uncertainty and model reliability. We introduce IMPACT-Scribe, a correction-driven framework for dense labeling that uses each correction to improve future human-machine collaboration. IMPACT-Scribe combines uncertainty-aware boundary scribble supervision, local proposal modeling, cost-aware query planning, structured propagation, and correction-driven adaptation. Experiments and a human study show that this closed-loop design improves labeling quality per effort, enhances boundary accuracy, and fosters better human-machine interaction over time. The code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/BanzQians/IMPACT_AS.

AI.tldr: IMPACT-Scribe是一个基于修正驱动的密集时间标注框架，通过利用每次修正来改进人机协作，实现更高效、更准确的动作视频标注。
AI.motivation: 现有密集时间标注工具反应式且低效，每次修正被视为孤立编辑，未能复用标注者不确定性和模型可靠性的信息，导致标注成本高昂。
AI.method: 结合不确定性感知的边界涂鸦监督、局部提议建模、成本感知的查询规划、结构化传播和修正驱动自适应，形成闭环设计。
AI.result: 实验和人类研究表明，该方法在同等标注努力下提升了标注质量和边界准确性，并随时间推移改善了人机交互效果。
AI.conclusion: 修正驱动的闭环设计能够有效利用每次修正信息来优化后续标注，提升人机协作效率和标注质量。

title: Efficient Temporal Datalog Materialisation for Composite Event Recognition
summary: Several applications demand the timely detection of critical situations, such as threats to safety and transparency, over high-velocity streams of symbolic events. This demand has motivated the development of (i) event specification languages, which define composite events via temporal patterns over simpler events, and (ii) stream reasoning frameworks, evaluating patterns expressed in these languages. However, event specification languages are typically studied in isolation, complicating their comparison in terms of expressivity and obscuring the scope of their associated stream reasoners. To mitigate this issue, we map practical fragments of prominent event specification languages into Temporal Datalog->-, a temporal Datalog with stratified negation and no future dependencies. To support efficient stream reasoning over Temporal Datalog->-, we propose Streaming Trigger Graphs, an extension of a state-of-the-art technique for Datalog materialisation. Our approach yields a uniform composite event recognition mechanism that has the potential to generalise across a wide range of practical event specification languages.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将多种事件规范语言映射到Temporal Datalog->-中，并设计Streaming Trigger Graphs技术实现高效的流推理，从而建立一个统一的复合事件识别框架。
AI.motivation: 现有事件规范语言各自独立发展，难以比较表达能力，流推理系统的适用范围也不清晰，需要统一的理论框架来弥合这一差距。
AI.method: 将多种实用事件规范语言映射到Temporal Datalog->-（带分层否定和无未来依赖的时态Datalog），并提出Streaming Trigger Graphs（扩展自Datalog物化技术）以支持高效流推理。
AI.result: 成功将多种主流事件规范语言映射到统一框架，并提出高效的流推理机制。
AI.conclusion: 该统一框架有潜力泛化到广泛的实际事件规范语言，为复合事件识别提供通用解决方案。

title: ContextualJailbreak: Evolutionary Red-Teaming via Simulated Conversational Priming
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) remain vulnerable to jailbreak attacks that bypass safety alignment and elicit harmful responses. A growing body of work shows that contextual priming, where earlier turns covertly bias later replies, constitutes a powerful attack surface, with hand-crafted multi-turn scaffolds consistently outperforming single-turn manipulations on capable models.
  However, automated optimization-based red-teaming has remained largely limited to the single-turn setting, iterating over static prompts and lacking the ability to reason about which forms of conversational priming induce compliance. While recent multi-turn, search-based approaches have begun to bridge this gap, the mutator design space underlying effective primed dialogues remains largely unexplored.
  We present ContextualJailbreak, a black-box red-teaming strategy that performs evolutionary search over a simulated multi-turn primed dialogue. The strategy leverages a graded 0-5 harm score from a two-level judge as an in-loop signal, enabling partially harmful responses to guide the search process rather than being discarded.
  Search is driven by five semantically defined mutation operators: roleplay, scenario, expand, troubleshooting, and mechanistic, of which the last two are novel contributions of this work.
  Across 50 representative HarmBench behaviors, ContextualJailbreak achieves an ASR of 100% on gpt-oss:20B, 100% on qwen3-8B, 100% on llama3.1:70B, and 90% on gpt-oss:120B, outperforming four single- and multi-turn baselines by 31-96 percentage points on average.
  The 40 maximally harmful attacks discovered against gpt-oss:120B transfer without adaptation to closed frontier models, achieving 90.0% on gpt-4o-mini, 70.0% on gpt-5, and 70.0% on gemini-3-flash, but only 17.5% on claude-opus-4-7 and 15.0% on claude-sonnet-4-6, revealing a pronounced provider-level asymmetry in alignment robustness.

AI.tldr: 提出ContextualJailbreak，一种黑盒红队攻击策略，通过在模拟的多轮对话中进行演化搜索，利用五个语义变异算子和分级危害评分，在多个大模型上实现了高达100%的攻击成功率，远超现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型越狱攻击研究多集中在单轮场景，缺乏对多轮对话中上下文引导（contextual priming）的自动化优化。虽然已有一些多轮搜索方法开始填补这一空白，但有效的"引导致对话"背后的变异算子设计空间仍未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出ContextualJailbreak，一种黑盒红队策略，在模拟的多轮引导致对话上进行演化搜索。搜索过程中使用两级法官（two-level judge）提供的0-5级危害评分作为反馈信号，使部分有害的响应也能引导搜索进程。搜索由五个语义定义的变异算子驱动：角色扮演（roleplay）、场景（scenario）、扩展（expand）、故障排除（troubleshooting）和机制（mechanistic），其中后两个是本文的新贡献。
AI.result: 在50个HarmBench行为上，gpt-oss:20B和qwen3-8B及llama3.1:70B的ASR达100%，gpt-oss:120B达90%，平均超过基线31-96个百分点。攻击可迁移到封闭前沿模型：gpt-4o-mini达90.0%，gpt-5达70.0%，gemini-3-flash达70.0%，但claude-opus-4-7仅17.5%，claude-sonnet-4-6仅15.0%，揭示了显著的提供商层面安全对齐鲁棒性不对称。
AI.conclusion: ContextualJailbreak通过多轮引导致对话的演化搜索，显著提升了黑盒越狱攻击的成功率，证明了自动化多轮上下文引导攻击的有效性。同时，不同模型间攻击迁移率的巨大差异揭示了各提供商在安全对齐鲁棒性上存在明显的不对称性。

title: Beyond ECE: Calibrated Size Ratio, Risk Assessment, and Confidence-Weighted Metrics
summary: Confidence calibration has been dominated by the Expected Calibration Error (ECE), a linear metric that counts calibration offset equally regardless of the confidence level at which it occurs. We show that ECE can remain small even under arbitrarily large overconfidence risk, so we propose Calibrated Size Ratio (CSR) instead, an interpretable metric that equals 1 under perfect calibration, from which we derive the risk probability $P_{\mathrm{risk}}$ that quantifies the statistical evidence for overconfidence. We further argue that overconfidence risk assessment must be complemented by a measure of discriminative value: whether the assigned confidences actively distinguish correct from incorrect predictions. We show that confidence-weighted accuracy $\mathrm{cwA}$ is the natural such complement, and that confidence-weighting extends to all standard classification metrics. In particular, we prove that the confidence-weighted AUC (cwAUC) captures the information about calibration while the classical AUC cannot. We validate the proposed indicators on several synthetic confidence distributions under multiple controlled calibration profiles and on fifteen real datasets with and without post-hoc calibration. Experiments demonstrate that CSR achieves near-perfect sensitivity and specificity across all tested conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文指出现有校准评估指标ECE存在严重缺陷（即使在高置信度过拟合风险下仍可保持较小值），提出新的校准度量CSR及其衍生风险概率P_risk，并强调校准评估必须结合判别能力度量，进而将置信度加权扩展到所有标准分类指标（如cwAUC）。实验验证了新指标在多种条件下的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有的置信度校准评估指标ECE存在根本性缺陷：即使模型存在严重的过拟合风险（任意大的过度自信），ECE仍可能保持较小值，无法真实反映校准问题。因此需要更可靠且可解释的校准度量。
AI.method: 1) 提出Calibrated Size Ratio (CSR)作为新的校准度量，完美校准下为1；2) 从CSR推导风险概率P_risk量化过拟合的统计证据；3) 提出置信度加权准确率cwA作为判别能力的自然补充度量；4) 将置信度加权扩展到所有标准分类指标，证明cwAUC能捕获校准信息而经典AUC不能。
AI.result: 在多个合成置信度分布（多种校准配置）和15个真实数据集上（含后处理校准前后）的实验证明，CSR在所有测试条件下达到接近完美的敏感性和特异性。
AI.conclusion: ECE不足以可靠评估校准质量，CSR与风险概率P_risk提供了更可靠且可解释的替代方案。同时，校准评估必须与判别能力度量结合，置信度加权的指标（如cwAUC）能更好地捕获校准与判别双重信息。

title: TrajRAG: Retrieving Geometric-Semantic Experience for Zero-Shot Object Navigation
summary: Existing zero-shot Object Goal Navigation (ObjectNav) methods often exploit commonsense knowledge from large language or vision-language models to guide navigation. However, such knowledge arises from internet-scale text rather than embodied 3D experience, and episodic observations collected during navigation are typically discarded, preventing the accumulation of lifelong experience. To this end, we propose Trajectory RAG (TrajRAG), a retrieval-augmented generation framework that enhances large-model reasoning by retrieving geometric-semantic experiences. TrajRAG incrementally accumulates episodic observations from past navigation episodes. To structure these observations, we propose a topological-polar (topo-polar) trajectory representation that compactly encodes spatial layouts and semantic contexts, effectively removing redundancies in raw episodic observations. A hierarchical chunking structure further organizes similar topo-polar trajectories into unified summaries, enabling coarse-to-fine retrieval. During navigation, candidate frontiers generate multiple trajectory hypotheses that query TrajRAG for similar past trajectories, guiding large-model reasoning for waypoint selection. New experiences are continually consolidated into TrajRAG, enabling the accumulation of lifelong navigation experience. Experiments on MP3D, HM3D-v1, and HM3D-v2 show that TrajRAG effectively retrieves relevant geometric-semantic experiences and improves zero-shot ObjectNav performance.

AI.tldr: 提出TrajRAG框架，通过检索增强生成技术积累和利用导航轨迹中的几何-语义经验，提升零样本物体目标导航性能。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本ObjectNav方法依赖互联网文本的常识知识，缺乏3D具身体验，且导航过程中的观测信息被丢弃，无法积累终身经验。
AI.method: 提出拓扑-极坐标轨迹表示压缩时空布局与语义信息；设计分层分块结构组织相似轨迹；在导航中生成多种轨迹假设检索历史经验以指导航点选择。
AI.result: 在MP3D、HM3D-v1和HM3D-v2数据集上，TrajRAG有效检索相关几何-语义经验并提升了零样本ObjectNav性能。
AI.conclusion: TrajRAG通过积累和检索导航轨迹经验，弥补了现有方法缺乏具身体验的缺陷，为终身学习型视觉导航提供了新范式。

title: Fuzzy Fingerprinting Encoder Pre-trained Language Models for Emotion Recognition in Conversations: Human Assessment and Validity Study
summary: In Emotion Recognition in Conversations (ERC), model decisions should align with nuanced human perception and ideally provide insights on the classification process. Standard encoder pre-trained language models (PLMs) are the state-of-the-art at these tasks but offer little insight into why a certain prediction is made. This is especially problematic in imbalanced datasets, where most utterances are labeled as neutral, making these models frequently misclassify minority emotions as the majority neutral class. To tackle this issue, we introduced a novel, interpretable approach to ERC by combining PLMs with Fuzzy Fingerprints (FFPs). FFP provide class-specific prototypes that reflect the characteristic class activation patterns in the PLM's latent space. They are derived by ranking and fuzzifying the activations of the pooled conversational context-dependent embeddings across training instances for each emotion. At inference time, each input utterance is similarly fuzzy fingerprinted and matched to the emotion prototypes using a fuzzy similarity function based on the aggregation of the intersection of the fuzzy sets that define each FFP. Experimental results show that FFP integration reduces overclassification into the neutral class and human evaluation further supports the adequacy of FFP predictions. Our proposed method thus bridges the gap between deep neural inference and human perception, performing at state-of-the-art level while simultaneously offering valuable insights into the classification procedure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将模糊指纹（FFPs）与预训练语言模型（PLMs）结合，用于情感识别对话（ERC）任务，在保持高水平性能的同时提供可解释性，尤其解决了少数类情感被错误分类为中性类别的类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有标准PLMs在ERC任务中缺乏可解释性，且在类别不平衡数据集中（多数 utterance 被标记为中性）容易将少数类情感误判为中性类别，需要一种既能提升分类公平性又能提供分类过程洞察的方法。
AI.method: 将PLMs与模糊指纹（FFPs）结合：从训练数据中为每种情感类别生成类特定的原型（基于PLM潜空间中池化上下文相关嵌入的激活排序与模糊化）；推理时将输入 utterance 同样进行模糊指纹化处理，通过模糊相似度函数（基于模糊集交集聚合）匹配情感原型。
AI.result: FFP集成减少了向中性类别的过度分类；人类评估进一步支持了FFP预测的 adequacy；该方法在达到最先进性能水平的同时提供分类过程中的可解释性洞察。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法弥合了深度神经推理与人类感知之间的差距，在维持SOTA性能的同时提供有价值的分类过程可解释性，有效解决了ERC中的类别不平衡问题。

title: Federated Semi-Supervised Graph Neural Networks with Prototype-Guided Pseudo-Labeling for Privacy-Preserving Gestational Diabetes Mellitus Prediction
summary: Gestational Diabetes Mellitus (GDM) is a high-prevalence pregnancy complication that requires accurate early risk stratification to reduce maternal and fetal morbidity. However, real-world clinical deployment of machine learning is hindered by two coupled constraints: (i) label scarcity, where a large fraction of electronic health records (EHR) lack confirmed diagnostic labels, and (ii) data privacy, which prevents sharing patient-level data across hospitals. This paper proposes FedTGNN-SS, a privacy-preserving federated semi-supervised framework for clinical tabular EHR. Each hospital builds a local k-nearest-neighbor patient similarity graph and trains a topology-adaptive GNN encoder. To robustly exploit unlabeled records, FedTGNN-SS combines (1) prototype-guided pseudo-labeling with neighborhood agreement, (2) adaptive graph refinement that periodically updates the k-NN graph using learned embeddings, (3) clinical-aware consistency augmentation applied only to continuous variables, and (4) privacy-safe prototype sharing that exchanges only class-level centroids. Across three diabetes-related datasets (GDM: N = 3,525; Pima: N = 768; Early Stage: N = 520) under 10\%-80\% missing labels per silo, FedTGNN-SS achieves 56 significant wins ($p < 0.05$) against 11 federated baselines and attains strong AUROC under extreme scarcity (Pima: 0.8037 at 80\% missing, Early Stage: 0.9634 at 80\% missing).

AI.tldr: 提出FedTGNN-SS，一个联邦半监督框架，通过原型引导伪标签、自适应图优化和隐私保护原型共享，在标签稀缺和数据隐私双重约束下有效进行GDM风险分层。
AI.motivation: GDM发病率高，需要早期风险分层，但现实临床部署ML面临标签稀缺（大量EHR无确诊标签）和数据隐私（无法跨医院共享患者数据）的双重约束。
AI.method: 各医院构建局部k-NN患者相似图，训练拓扑自适应GNN编码器；结合(1)原型引导伪标签+邻域一致性(2)自适应图优化(3)仅对连续变量的临床感知一致性增强(4)仅交换类级质心的隐私安全原型共享。
AI.result: 在三个糖尿病数据集上（GDM: 3525; Pima: 768; Early Stage: 520），10%-80%标签缺失下，对11个联邦基线取得56次显著胜利(p<0.05)，极端缺失下Pima AUROC 0.8037，Early Stage AUROC 0.9634。
AI.conclusion: FedTGNN-SS有效解决了联邦学习中标签稀缺和隐私保护的耦合问题，为GDM早期风险分层提供了可行方案。

title: Exploring Entropy-based Active Learning for Fair Brain Segmentation
comment: 12 pages, 4 figures. Accepted as a poster at Medical Imaging with Deep Learning (MIDL) 2026. OpenReview submission: 221
summary: Active learning (AL) has emerged as a crucial strategy for reducing the prohibitive costs associated with medical image segmentation. However, standard uncertainty-based AL methods typically focus on maximizing performance metrics, ignoring performance disparities or fairness across groups with sensitive attributes. While fair active learning has been explored in classification tasks, its intersection with medical image segmentation remains unaddressed. In this work, we introduced a fairness-aware active learning framework with a Weighted Entropy selection strategy that modulates uncertainty based on current group-specific performance estimates on the labeled set. To decouple true epistemic uncertainty from anatomical volume variances, we further utilized a masked, scaled entropy restricted to the region of interest. The framework was evaluated on synthetic T1-weighted brain MRIs with controlled left caudate bias in both strong and weak bias settings. A 3D U-Net was trained to segment the left caudate under several AL strategies, starting from both demographically balanced and strongly imbalanced initial labeled sets. Experiments demonstrated that our method markedly reduces performance disparities between groups compared to random sampling and standard uncertainty sampling. By prioritizing poorly segmented subgroups during the AL cycles, our method consistently achieved the highest equity-scaled performance and reduced the disparity metric by 75% (strong bias) and 86% (weak bias) relative to standard entropy at the final budget. Overall, this work is among the first studies on fair AL for medical image segmentation, offering an efficient strategy to train more equitable models in resource-constrained environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向公平性的主动学习框架，通过加权熵选择策略和掩码缩放熵，在医学图像分割中显著减少不同群体间的性能差异，相比标准熵方法将偏差指标降低了75%-86%。
AI.motivation: 标准基于不确定性的主动学习方法只关注整体性能指标，忽视了不同敏感属性群体之间的性能差异或公平性问题；而公平主动学习在分类任务中已有探索，但尚未在医学图像分割领域得到研究。
AI.method: 提出公平感知主动学习框架，采用加权熵选择策略，根据已标注集上当前群体特定性能估计来调节不确定性；同时使用掩码缩放熵（仅限感兴趣区域）来解耦真正认知不确定性与解剖体积变异。
AI.result: 在合成T1加权脑MRI上验证，使用3D U-Net分割左尾状核。相比随机采样和标准不确定性采样，方法显著减少了群体间性能差异；在强偏差和弱偏差设置下，相比标准熵分别将差异指标降低了75%和86%，并持续实现了最高的公平缩放性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文是首个将公平主动学习应用于医学图像分割的研究之一，为资源受限环境下训练更公平的模型提供了有效策略。

title: DataClaw: A Process-Oriented Agent Benchmark for Exploratory Real-World Data Analysis
summary: Evaluating autonomous data analysis agents requires testing their ability to perform exploratory analysis in underexplored data environments. However, many existing benchmarks emphasize final answer accuracy in prior-guided data settings and provide limited support for reasoning process evaluation. We introduce DataClaw, a process-oriented benchmark for exploratory real-world data analysis. DataClaw contains approximately 2.06 million real-world records across enterprise, industry and policy domains, with native data noise preserved. It further includes 492 cross-domain tasks derived from think-tank consulting scenarios, each annotated with intermediate milestones for process-level evaluation. These annotations allow DataClaw to measure how far an agent progresses and where its reasoning breaks down. Experiments with eight advanced LLMs show that current agents remain far from reliable in this setting, with seven models achieving below 50% overall accuracy. Process analysis further reveals partial progress hidden behind wrong answers and distinct exploration strategies across models. Overall, DataClaw provides a less data constrained diagnostic testbed for probing the capability boundaries of autonomous data-analysis agents.

AI.tldr: DataClaw 是一个面向过程的数据分析智能体基准测试，包含约206万条真实世界记录和492个跨领域任务，通过中间里程碑注释进行过程级评估。实验发现当前最先进的LLM智能体在此基准下表现不佳，7个模型准确率低于50%。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试过度强调最终答案准确性，且依赖先验引导的数据环境，缺乏对探索性数据分析过程和推理能力的评估。
AI.method: 构建了包含企业、产业和政策三个领域的约206万条真实数据（保留原生噪声），设计了492个源自智库咨询场景的跨领域任务，并为每个任务标注了中间里程碑用于过程级评估。
AI.result: 在8个先进LLM上的实验显示，7个模型总体准确率低于50%。过程分析揭示了错误答案背后隐藏的部分进展，以及不同模型间存在截然不同的探索策略。
AI.conclusion: DataClaw 提供了一个数据约束较少的诊断性测试平台，有助于探测自主数据分析智能体的能力边界。

title: mdok-style at SemEval-2026 Task 9: Finetuning LLMs for Multilingual Polarization Detection
comment: Accepted to the SemEval-2026 workshop of the ACL 2026 conference
summary: SemEval-2026 Task 9 is focused on multilingual polarization detection. Specifically, it covers the identification of multilingual, multicultural and multievent polarization along three axes (in subtasks), namely detection, type, and manifestation. Online polarization presents a concern, because it is often followed by hate speech, offensive discourse, and social fragmentation. Therefore, its detection before it escalates is crucial for a safer and more inclusive online space. We have coped with this SemEval task by finetuning mid-size LLMs for the sequence-classification task using the QLoRA parameter-efficient finetuning technique. The training data augmented the multilingual (22 languages) training sets by anonymized, lower-cased, upper-cased, and homoglyphied counterparts, making the detection more robust.

AI.tldr: 本文针对SemEval-2026任务9（多语言极化检测），通过QLoRA参数高效微调中等规模LLM，并采用多种数据增强策略（匿名化、大小写转换、同形词替换）提升多语言（22种语言）极化的检测鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 在线极化现象常伴随仇恨言论、攻击性话语和社会分裂，亟需在其升级前实现自动检测，以营造更安全、更具包容性的在线空间。
AI.method: 使用QLoRA参数高效微调技术对中等规模LLM进行序列分类任务微调；训练数据覆盖22种语言，并通过匿名化、小写、大写和同形词替换等策略进行数据增强，提升检测鲁棒性。
AI.result: 通过数据增强和参数高效微调，实现了对多语言、多文化、多事件极化的有效检测（涵盖检测、类型和表现形式三个子任务）。
AI.conclusion: QLoRA结合数据增强是应对多语言极化检测任务的有效方案，有助于在线极化的早期识别与干预。

title: Skipping the Zeros in Diffusion Models for Sparse Data Generation
summary: Diffusion models (DMs) excel on dense continuous data, but are not designed for sparse continuous data. They do not model exact zeros that represent the deliberate absence of a signal. As a result, they erase sparsity patterns and perform unnecessary computation on mostly zero entries. With Sparsity-Exploiting Diffusion (SED), we model only non-zero values, preserving sparsity. SED delivers computational savings while maintaining or improving generation quality by skipping zeros during training and inference. Across physics and biology benchmarks, SED matches or surpasses conventional DMs and domain-specific baselines, while vision experiments provide intuitive insights into the limitations of dense DMs and the benefits of SED.

AI.tldr: 提出Sparsity-Exploiting Diffusion (SED)模型，专门针对稀疏连续数据设计，通过仅建模非零值来保持稀疏性，在训练和推理中跳过零值计算，从而在保持或提升生成质量的同时实现计算节省。
AI.motivation: 传统扩散模型擅长处理稠密连续数据，但不适用于稀疏连续数据（如含有大量零值的数据），因为它们无法建模代表信号刻意缺失的精确零值，会抹除稀疏模式并对零值条目进行不必要的计算。
AI.method: SED方法仅对非零值进行建模，在训练和推理过程中跳过零值计算，从而保持数据的稀疏模式并降低计算开销。
AI.result: 在物理学和生物学基准测试中，SED匹配或超越了传统扩散模型及领域特定基线方法；在视觉实验中，直观展示了稠密扩散模型的局限性以及SED的优势。
AI.conclusion: SED是一种有效处理稀疏连续数据的扩散模型变体，在保持生成质量的同时实现了计算效率的提升。

title: Linear-Time Global Visual Modeling without Explicit Attention
summary: Existing research largely attributes the global sequence modeling capability of Transformers to the explicit computation of attention weights, a process that inherently incurs quadratic computational complexity. In this work, we offer a novel perspective: we demonstrate that attention can be mathematically reframed as a Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) equipped with dynamically predicted parameters. Through this lens, we explain attention's global modeling power not as explicit token-wise aggregation, but as an implicit process where dynamically generated parameters act as a compressed representation of the global context. Inspired by this insight, we investigate a fundamental question: can we achieve Transformer-level sequence global modeling entirely through dynamic parameterization while maintaining linear complexity, effectively replacing explicit attention? To explore this, we design various dynamic parameter prediction strategies and integrate them into standard network layers. Extensive empirical studies on vision models demonstrate that dynamic parameterization can indeed serve as a highly effective, linear-complexity alternative to explicit attention, opening new pathways for efficient sequence modeling. Code is available at https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/WeightFormer.

AI.tldr: 本文提出注意力机制可重构成带动态参数预测的MLP，并证明动态参数化能以线性复杂度替代显式注意力，实现Transformer级全局建模能力。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer的全局序列建模能力被归因于注意力权重的显式计算（二次复杂度）。作者希望从新视角解释注意力机制，并探索能否用线性复杂度的动态参数化替代显式注意力。
AI.method: 将注意力重构成带动态预测参数的MLP；设计多种动态参数预测策略并集成到标准网络层中；在视觉模型上进行大量实验验证。
AI.result: 动态参数化可作为显式注意力的高效线性复杂度替代方案，在视觉任务上取得良好效果。
AI.conclusion: 注意力机制的本质是动态参数化MLP，这为高效序列建模提供了新路径，有望突破Transformer二次复杂度的瓶颈。

title: Improving Model Safety by Targeted Error Correction
comment: This work has been accepted for publication in the Proceedings of International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR) 2026. The final published version should be cited
summary:
The widespread adoption of machine learning in critical applications demands techniques to mitigate high-consequence errors. Our method utilizes a dual-classifier GBDT pipeline to distinguish routine human-like errors from high-risk non-human misclassifications. Evaluated across three domains, animal breed classification, skin lesion diagnosis (ISIC 2018), and prostate histopathology (SICAPv2), our framework demonstrates robust safety improvements.
